name: Rod Dorilas
subject: Do you support African American Republicans?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rod Dorilas for Congress
body:
My parents came to the U.S. homeless to give me the American Dream. Now, I'm running for Congress to keep the American Dream, which saved our lives, a |
No longer want to receive emails from Rod? You may [unsubscribe here](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=06e19053a6d24704822a58aae63b4795&_t=6UBch_n4HhQi48Znd-sVpuqX8M7b_BpwB9aI2mJWV5B3f3URaxYxXkD7cIVXMyzc2bpuPAiSLThSkZvsZctRYCtI8O5OeiM7UlK1FHLrvpa8zg2TCs_BmkIfXmDIUHXvVwHLLXGPql0d22OmFHjK0EVoztZh3dQHC2Q1CuZxtk0%3D).

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=06e19053a6d24704822a58aae63b4795&_e=hyy4iB-ulVw3WNATG9LFfEi0hqpotSX1CxlmEuOnoEWgbwWEiuCfxLjzszk_E00c5H-xQ1BV827_c8y6M_I5B7sNPxATEZeSt3ilxs9XnbranuDTBuhlzLCqtN5F0RtzuHGcr4GaivEtABW75XMyBGr19e24NKV-3TLWx5OloTJaE_-LREZtBYomvBNG8zKPifp_YyytXiTtWqcTdtLPCF9alwj7TnLtaTCQSUma0lR6YPRb7ITzUt-qZibHa-8Q-IxtNP_ipLy8WfaIINMQYS9NBMwqEAFPz2aEyuX7M60kySw9opx6LtjuND2qKJmZVLwXCFwzxwhllGJMOhEkOKtU3xqdBQdRMEzEJE3bSmZvCS2SEzm8EEGXqvkjv8jSWH_cagk99Z_yce7zJLUWMHXgGm0r32K50uJBJXdRDI8QSoyOIUOCIxnQhkQzF4EGoc0wwUCJEfAvsgZPUoWENRl2oOSEBigmhZuGZY_DPAwUFfmym_N9aLilabOhTVcx)

---
Peter,

Never believe the Left’s narrative that America is a racist country; that the American dream doesn’t exist anymore; or that the Constitution is a relic of the past that disproportionately benefits Anglo Americans.

I’m speaking with authority on the matter: **I’m a first generation Haitian-American whose parents came to this country, quite literally penniless, to pick crops in South Florida during the 1980s**. Now, less than forty years after my parents experienced food insecurity and homelessness, I’m running for Congress – as a Republican. **I guess you could say that I don’t fit the Left’s definition of a conservative**.

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=06e19053a6d24704822a58aae63b4795&_e=hyy4iB-ulVw3WNATG9LFfEi0hqpotSX1CxlmEuOnoEWgbwWEiuCfxLjzszk_E00c5H-xQ1BV827_c8y6M_I5B7sNPxATEZeSt3ilxs9XnbranuDTBuhlzLCqtN5F0RtzuHGcr4GaivEtABW75XMyBGr19e24NKV-3TLWx5OloTJaE_-LREZtBYomvBNG8zKPifp_YyytXiTtWqcTdtLPCF9alwj7TnLtaTCQSUma0lR6YPRb7ITzUt-qZibHa-8Q-IxtNP_ipLy8WfaIINMQYS9NBMwqEAFPz2aEyuX7M60VXmQNeub_T-SuamqZl9u2CCUpZehJw3x3SukHbW0EuH0b8_4LbEF-3Kk1hn3U9UU-i_Hyk1QHuoxrsgcqdEOZ-DdtXmSETHEt85G0d3D_7AQComMiZU6ml1790x2-pUlIcCy_2xJO-uLl-0JjTkUslsaZ7GCr-pSh73tnpcpT2C9s_7S2mHwFAyfzYJ4aFiQKUSl2adBwD2mhP3RMBpCX)
My name is Rod Dorilas and I’d like to tell you a few important things about me and why I’m writing to you today.
* I’m a military veteran (**I joined at 17**),
* I’m a lawyer (**I utilized the GI bill to pay for law school**)
* I’m a former Trump Administration appointee, having held various jobs during the four years President Trump held office.

**The thing I’m most proud about? My family built our own American Dream without the help of the government, or left-wing socialist politicians. And I’m running for Congress because some folks in DC just don’t understand that the government is not going to help make individuals successful – grit, determination and personal responsibility are keys to success.**

In his 1967 inaugural address as Governor of California, Ronald Reagan said, “ _**freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction**_.” Coming from an immigrant family, I believe it’s my responsibility to fight to make sure that people in this country know how precious freedom - and the United States - truly is.

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=06e19053a6d24704822a58aae63b4795&_e=hyy4iB-ulVw3WNATG9LFfEi0hqpotSX1CxlmEuOnoEWgbwWEiuCfxLjzszk_E00c5H-xQ1BV827_c8y6M_I5B7sNPxATEZeSt3ilxs9XnbranuDTBuhlzLCqtN5F0RtzuHGcr4GaivEtABW75XMyBGr19e24NKV-3TLWx5OloTJaE_-LREZtBYomvBNG8zKPifp_YyytXiTtWqcTdtLPCF9alwj7TnLtaTCQSUma0lR6YPRb7ITzUt-qZibHa-8Q-IxtNP_ipLy8WfaIINMQYS9NBMwqEAFPz2aEyuX7M62cl3_CWMUfB6E-0zvXNH1-VuRgFeKPJhGTREPvaSWaoyRiROHGpLDZm8UiMV3jWDDrQb4_OUIQvzVvorXXgTniWF93H76CBsZfRHy1yHtCuX-843xN7SQ7fkew5S4AN5R-F8_5QnEIH93VVZVTLFwiepKYweJPo7HnAkRHSg-EpxY7VWE6-LcVrLB73zYriZbG_f2o0OdGcSeKn7WSeFkP)
I’m asking you to continue reading the rest of this email, but if you cannot, **[please consider chipping in whatever you can spare to my campaign today](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=06e19053a6d24704822a58aae63b4795&_e=hyy4iB-ulVw3WNATG9LFfEi0hqpotSX1CxlmEuOnoEWgbwWEiuCfxLjzszk_E00c5H-xQ1BV827_c8y6M_I5B7sNPxATEZeSt3ilxs9XnbranuDTBuhlzLCqtN5F0RtzuHGcr4GaivEtABW75XMyBGr19e24NKV-3TLWx5OloTJaE_-LREZtBYomvBNG8zKPifp_YyytXiTtWqcTdtLPCF9alwj7TnLtaTCQSUma0lR6YPRb7ITzUt-qZibHa-8Q-IxtNP_ipLy8WfaIINMQYS9NBMwqEAFPz2aEyuX7M63BxnCihdOP3qmhJXIeIPQqC86xGZVKMaAOjKTHdxuZl4UQBfJSPK4FjGwgUHKZFoUN7jSlISeZ8mOooQA85iRR1AgA8USMOufqtwGoxsZ4U8RcA26F-j9tnX-mrNbw7i5xaXm5Jm_TDo_aNvtlDhGKQPmoP5FHSPzjYDkKaj4XQNoYrpxtLh-EDfWvfbVlNbQ4QptNN4lvGaCLonRoeXUT)**. I’ve accomplished a lot in my short career, but I’m not independently wealthy and can’t fund my own campaign. I know I would be an effective voice for our party – I just need to make sure people in my district know who I am and what I stand for.

[** Send a 1st Generation American to Congress >>**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=06e19053a6d24704822a58aae63b4795&_e=hyy4iB-ulVw3WNATG9LFfEi0hqpotSX1CxlmEuOnoEWgbwWEiuCfxLjzszk_E00c5H-xQ1BV827_c8y6M_I5B7sNPxATEZeSt3ilxs9XnbranuDTBuhlzLCqtN5F0RtzuHGcr4GaivEtABW75XMyBGr19e24NKV-3TLWx5OloTJaE_-LREZtBYomvBNG8zKPifp_YyytXiTtWqcTdtLPCF9alwj7TnLtaTCQSUma0lR6YPRb7ITzUt-qZibHa-8Q-IxtNP_ipLy8WfaIINMQYS9NBMwqEAFPz2aEyuX7M61qTc3dmqatI6cumbq6pRJugK5vmisA9cm2V1Lb3NUgLWe4MZnwz1q2BdICdzOlhKbyvq_U4TptwitNajiS5HoDKe25Iw69Ag68SrwFn_tmXGjtGnVbYFd0vZsaWkns8oz5HyZKxrAL_9HTvFbWTxoYLdUqqJqSnALeuS2IQN4OA7T8gpot97uvbw-NyHZwMAvF3TkNQhc0c9jrO_hZhc-p)
Every morning that I read the news, it’s more doom and gloom. No one talks about the American Dream anymore. But, my parents and I are living proof that it still exists – and will continue to exist for future generations of immigrants and native-born Americans alike if we wake up to the dangers posed by socialism NOW. That is going to take hard work on all of our parts.

I know a thing or two about hard work, which I believe is one of the key characteristics missing in the folks representing us in Congress today. **I wasn’t happy with the high school I would have had to attend based off my parents address, so I traveled via public train and bus every day to attend one of my choice**. Having the option to attend a high school of my own choosing enabled me to become the man I am today.

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=06e19053a6d24704822a58aae63b4795&_e=hyy4iB-ulVw3WNATG9LFfEi0hqpotSX1CxlmEuOnoEWgbwWEiuCfxLjzszk_E00c5H-xQ1BV827_c8y6M_I5B7sNPxATEZeSt3ilxs9XnbranuDTBuhlzLCqtN5F0RtzuHGcr4GaivEtABW75XMyBGr19e24NKV-3TLWx5OloTJaE_-LREZtBYomvBNG8zKPifp_YyytXiTtWqcTdtLPCF9alwj7TnLtaTCQSUma0lR6YPRb7ITzUt-qZibHa-8Q-IxtNP_ipLy8WfaIINMQYS9NBMwqEAFPz2aEyuX7M63d3RzwHzTYCFeyglNvRTSqYMxmsy_RUufvSSbB16cF6UCqDMCYv4sAvz-BD9_lHrmQOotcV7715pP_2ilVEcQFuCJnJSVIOF5WomkBWi_wBwBDpWnmNRVYBJrm9yubYUJm20qkrs64oGM2XDcBs_3fBIwINuZfEKZ4WF9wkS-IrCuOcWFcnaAZ_7P9a8nYrkMLW4QMKgSaClViwknkOmwA)
**I’d love to know where else in the world, immigrants from one of the Earth’s poorest nations could rise from homelessness and become successful business owners in a matter of two decades. All the while, raising their children with such success that one of them decides to seek federal office. **

Rising from poverty in Haiti to the middle class in South Florida wasn’t quick or easy, but _**what is worth having in life that is easy?**_ I learned from my parents that hard work and grit – along with perseverance – pays dividends. Yet today, many Americans would rather depend on government handouts.

If you’ve found this email inspiring on any level, **[would you please consider a contribution to my campaign for Congress today?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=06e19053a6d24704822a58aae63b4795&_e=hyy4iB-ulVw3WNATG9LFfEi0hqpotSX1CxlmEuOnoEWgbwWEiuCfxLjzszk_E00c5H-xQ1BV827_c8y6M_I5B7sNPxATEZeSt3ilxs9XnbranuDTBuhlzLCqtN5F0RtzuHGcr4GaivEtABW75XMyBGr19e24NKV-3TLWx5OloTJaE_-LREZtBYomvBNG8zKPifp_YyytXiTtWqcTdtLPCF9alwj7TnLtaTCQSUma0lR6YPRb7ITzUt-qZibHa-8Q-IxtNP_ipLy8WfaIINMQYS9NBMwqEAFPz2aEyuX7M63EvGR1IBucIIuI-Wgi1OYHp2x6AuirX9IGmCf3GdI4SrNr8_rONGCi1lt41JIn7NfyP3giaEOmkgsZDR0nw2ZY6KotuyQhOb6CtvbUTehsAiIacWT7czo1E0fNHw1wQ9zLW0mW2KXc6qfL8irCELcH-vwYyrRhh_opq82zeZmu9pzNiCzFWeiHc-f0hLPGV2tTTEek6_Wc3y0bPYIEAknx)** I don’t believe in handouts of any kind, but I won’t be able to do anything about the ones that exist – or stop new entitlements – without first making my way to Congress.

[** Send a 1st Generation American to Congress >>**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=06e19053a6d24704822a58aae63b4795&_e=hyy4iB-ulVw3WNATG9LFfEi0hqpotSX1CxlmEuOnoEWgbwWEiuCfxLjzszk_E00c5H-xQ1BV827_c8y6M_I5B7sNPxATEZeSt3ilxs9XnbranuDTBuhlzLCqtN5F0RtzuHGcr4GaivEtABW75XMyBGr19e24NKV-3TLWx5OloTJaE_-LREZtBYomvBNG8zKPifp_YyytXiTtWqcTdtLPCF9alwj7TnLtaTCQSUma0lR6YPRb7ITzUt-qZibHa-8Q-IxtNP_ipLy8WfaIINMQYS9NBMwqEAFPz2aEyuX7M60VcyJBIKJa8v3a0EB3eJcMOszCIIP124bNNumehtBL-nvE9LL_UTwSyMwZohqnCEBtNSD7mkvd_coqqGZ_O9UJaDzCRSQof6Ctx5mDYrHxztXLOGMgZrdU-jNnPjG9ToOuJg7mdXemlisW43AIK0abB4lG1RqVnfDlBguRYSd9T_-uGGGzpo8Ux0ZmdlakOyi80MuIxDcaE5t1pKWhTIXQ)
Thank you for taking the time to read this email today. I sincerely appreciate your consideration.

For Country,

Rod Dorilas

[** I'M WITH ROD >> **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=06e19053a6d24704822a58aae63b4795&_e=hyy4iB-ulVw3WNATG9LFfEi0hqpotSX1CxlmEuOnoEWgbwWEiuCfxLjzszk_E00c5H-xQ1BV827_c8y6M_I5B7sNPxATEZeSt3ilxs9XnbranuDTBuhlzLCqtN5F0RtzuHGcr4GaivEtABW75XMyBGr19e24NKV-3TLWx5OloTJaE_-LREZtBYomvBNG8zKPifp_YyytXiTtWqcTdtLPCF9alwj7TnLtaTCQSUma0lR6YPRb7ITzUt-qZibHa-8Q-IxtNP_ipLy8WfaIINMQYS9NBMwqEAFPz2aEyuX7M60oJlS_LZ2Z9KWCpxfqmGyStxvDjYhI0HPqjjhV3g35RXIRwIGJa9S9EuHm-6wwai4bl76glcIBAFks-3evxDq7syPKUid5kJ2cGf3EKm7uyo4goQuIM_WXwKYPiXLCdit1Dpb0CCY9dwcjfU9VRLVz_NjrZYjGiitgxEJGAUV_QfwbXescOPlqgMUWeezzoLI_ZwPTv5eu52_PjRojqDJ9)

| _**ABOUT ROD**_

Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service.

At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer.

Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China.

Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. Rod is running for Congress in South Florida to continue Trump's America First Agenda and defend our country from the Radical Left.

[**Will you stand with Rod?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=06e19053a6d24704822a58aae63b4795&_e=hyy4iB-ulVw3WNATG9LFfEi0hqpotSX1CxlmEuOnoEWgbwWEiuCfxLjzszk_E00c5H-xQ1BV827_c8y6M_I5B7sNPxATEZeSt3ilxs9XnbranuDTBuhlzLCqtN5F0RtzuHGcr4GaivEtABW75XMyBGr19e24NKV-3TLWx5OloTJaE_-LREZtBYomvBNG8zKPifp_YyytXiTtWqcTdtLPCF9alwj7TnLtaTCQSUma0lR6YPRb7ITzUt-qZibHa-8Q-IxtNP_ipLy8WfaIINMQYS9NBMwqEAFPz2aEyuX7M60QdM0tGRkQEPZGQaaEM3cBgKOhH2RYmpAI-xhCSDEkJP7JcT3qIs9xJHtTAi97uvyWyfC80rrpjxabKGj-GjHnTA6mbTAvzyEDfRWo3vT25iP9hgsGEKlE34j2d3EvuH_8LaYjMNmCoqRGmvr-HRqbtRNbvVN3xP7USZdrZycjf3voIH6Ucutn5c0gYzmigQwceeE7W2zIybodv6_aoR-W)
---

| Paid for by Rod Dorilas for Congress
---

This message was sent to your email address ending in @gmail.com because it was listed as the best way to contact you.

However, if this is no longer the best way to reach you or you no longer want to receive any more of our emails...

We hate to see you go, but [you can unsubscribe here](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=06e19053a6d24704822a58aae63b4795&_t=6UBch_n4HhQi48Znd-sVpuqX8M7b_BpwB9aI2mJWV5B3f3URaxYxXkD7cIVXMyzc2bpuPAiSLThSkZvsZctRYCtI8O5OeiM7UlK1FHLrvpa8zg2TCs_BmkIfXmDIUHXvVwHLLXGPql0d22OmFHjK0EVoztZh3dQHC2Q1CuZxtk0%3D).

Affordable child care and housing are two crucial issues facing our community and yesterday Wilmot was lucky enough to be joined by working mother Mel | | | [](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=b4bff80b8cf1408796946ff9dd72c9b9&_m=7c5abd35596a4dcebc04857f09ffd007&_e=nu-MgNr7B0tmXnR2OZKS9W0-dNqUk8rM8P1JHYuJe4phs4lUokA9iMBQdDIF4i1GGMr4N7eR69aRIovRtaMScKqERT1VheFM_SHMeugj6SESJrLEPIZG9Xdrg22zsNBKtS2AvqAXPSzQpa2w4X0o4S0aWECXtmJwUdGw5EELUN1Eyo4PvI_cSjLS_wkHn-tQRzLXYw_z-0tBNxxzB25MPcd5Ew-sCujIsbvCREKa8c-ElusNo45aGsnfgN2IceT4TCX4e8OCeOfy6sFqtD6likmWZtKI7AgY3Xy465CQX4RS3uk0WR_zfdcuErhR0QT0U1ffaONKLoRzeUGB2KPvaHv4zixquvf1u40iifbLU9hISuNZN5C4AHxCKBwRu4GFC4e5vDGwa2j4HWy4xuB_SSXjjUJn1WQ6ASACcBQzjdL25FQuYXbQNVBJcXL0xKw9Jzwl8h1gAUQlMsF7MIFWI3DvdKtjAjr4uGb4RtgGqbw%3D) Hey friend, Affordable child care and housing are two crucial issues facing our community and yesterday Wilmot was lucky enough to be joined by working mother Melinda Reed, Montana House leader Kim Abbott and representatives from the YWCA and Habitat for Humanity to discuss how we can find solutions to these growing problems. See the video here: [](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=b4bff80b8cf1408796946ff9dd72c9b9&_m=7c5abd35596a4dcebc04857f09ffd007&_e=CbdB7CxDwuboUFBeaIcipkbp_givLx4_UlZmBh3dfwbaGKpcBNlMmORa5yInckjbutG8BCkYy7-aDeD59bFl9LwfR9IanMBiNcHK39Zc-l3Y6VTrfSPAOlLgCnEzWe9hIirMVFry1wDZoDPd2xYapO_ixJI1BwUJzMV7PlAlmLd1AGgHcwIC6UDJYvw4TJ29fvGWDzNguXcDK7k2EeT9c6-YGneF8X8iEmf0u2NsHpq0TfAixDiRS4Hu0ocgYX-curIPSVBZryMVv5FEnqHs4sbej6xfxlsP06q02umH87jkeLiLRHUltXItI7KnGpt4O5ZCHeIDBpJg32a0R_lZCNjXvTyCm8JId8R4ROwlIIYps5RoTud1v72B2c1aYjIDnDs4Ka_k3eJ52y2vQIQXhqZJksSIAL6wKFPjPg6wK_LVVCW49JsEKibQeYjEfFiTxDvx6QWttiRN7QmFHMSTqGZ7CACEpe_rgdSXUj8KLgY%3D) Affordable housing and child care are two major issues impacting growing communities all across Montana on a daily basis and unfortunately, this is no different for Helena. As a father and a member of this community, Wilmot Collins, along with Kim Abbott, and working mother Melinda Reed care deeply about these issues and want to do their part to make sure that we tackle them in the best possible way. That starts with getting this video out there. **[So please, take a look at this video and consider donating to Wilmot's campaign so that we can make sure these problems are addressed going forward.](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=b4bff80b8cf1408796946ff9dd72c9b9&_m=7c5abd35596a4dcebc04857f09ffd007&_e=CbdB7CxDwuboUFBeaIcipkbp_givLx4_UlZmBh3dfwbaGKpcBNlMmORa5yInckjbutG8BCkYy7-aDeD59bFl9LwfR9IanMBiNcHK39Zc-l3Y6VTrfSPAOlLgCnEzWe9hIirMVFry1wDZoDPd2xYapO_ixJI1BwUJzMV7PlAlmLd1AGgHcwIC6UDJYvw4TJ29fvGWDzNguXcDK7k2EeT9c6-YGneF8X8iEmf0u2NsHpq0TfAixDiRS4Hu0ocgYX-curIPSVBZryMVv5FEnqHs4rOAbI4u-EgCe6Kw3wwv-3lg8hjMYEQ8AyJBomY1k6-Z8utDJZ1N2w04tmaxoiq63Rie9R9mTnYOq379gEZ7-8U_8jLe2BJzx9kM_Kxki0hpx20-CJtxY1xJAr6xl9bFN7JlEW7AuusImwI7ZFruvk2oYkZS2yQEgPGmcRO5XrhhQvL5Sl4tA3TqGmsdCQ0pZAWVX5RIWVMBIt7H46KGlc8%3D)** The election is only a few weeks away and we want to make sure that someone who cares about Helena and the challenges it faces gets elected. Wilmot Collins is that person and will do whatever he can to make this community a better place. Thank you so much for all your help. Together we can solve problems like these and improve the lives of everyone in our community. -Wilmot HQ Paid for by A Whole Lot of Folks for Wilmot Collins

Fellow American,

**They’re spending millions** on one of the largest field programs the Commonwealth has ever seen. **They’re fired up** to try to flip the state red for the first time in nearly a decade. **They have history and Donald Trump on their side, and polls are starting to give them the advantage.**

Enthusiasm is at an all time low, people are pretending that Virginia is just a blue state, and we aren’t seeing people pitch in toward our final filing deadline.

Friend,

Nancy Pelosi is on her way.

**Where you may be wondering?** _Iowa’s 2nd congressional district_.

I won my race by just 6 votes last year, and now I’m Pelosi’s top target for 2022. She already tried to overturn our election victory, now she’s ready to spend millions of dollars to defeat me.
| [**STOP NANCY PELOSI**](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=8438beeae2fc410f9d1f8babb41629db&_e=wpJf6vFlNq4eRlD6CzCHpOmZAOzU0FiT90vNVpKhLyp4ueyUZMg8ca6QukHD1awvnEIoDAt7vmeUMxgHuyUAI-DUUr4SaXiWIejWj1EKS1fcb97HNN9PCfqqVKLPxn-NwkszWVs2j4Bojt9piUwgzu4QGiphBKlbV_UabRklXMMw7sKBimpVxIrG75RWCUXnjtBW_henDam136WcW9LX2DFmELJBi7aBLQlwayoc8hF1ugcbqILbesTLGA69g4Gv6XBV8v7AKMmfLQgeau6sgr9W1mWXJVoOqo02pawHah6EEoKZN4qPkT0zGGI8w2R2tc-LjH5NVnsccw6ZbwfN6Sh0hrFBzr9Q8Zt3ESDPV0AkxSIjwaCATXVfMZSoq45lP-cvuKp2Axe0x_YMBmUpgBS5U-xFVNZ-Eg-KsvKBd5kEqcvismvrvWkYsSytFe-hgwe0Z5zt1HVbZUfI6APQZQqZrnOnjPaUVl2UHUG8FDK68-FDede1IEA8EdAD5A4EI3hBzlpXQaZdr0oeuqyYBp6quP21hYzsthVwkr7mZ6Y%3D)
---

name: Marco Rubio
subject: Sitting down to write you some tough news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
I can’t believe that there is more support for a Trump Impeachment Manager than for a strong Conservative leader.
|
---
| | | Friend,

This is difficult for me to write.

I just can't believe that there is more support for a Trump Impeachment Manager than for a strong Conservative leader.

Even after extending my Mid-Month deadline, we are still not on track to reach our goal. To be honest, we are about 3,000 donations behind our target.

My entire team is calling, texting, emailing and writing as many patriots as possible in an effort to activate 3,000 donors in the next 48 hours, but I'm afraid it won't be enough.

Friend, these goals aren't arbitrary. These are REAL goals and REAL numbers that we REALLY need to hit in order to have a shot at competing with the Democratic movement in Florida.

_I 'm pleading with you, even if it is $8...will you donate today? Maybe people think they need to write huge checks in order to make a difference but that's just not true. I need people who can donate $8, $10, $12.55 or even $17 TODAY in order to reach my goal. _

I know you hear from my team and me a lot, but this is critical. We are on the brink of losing Trump's home state to someone who votes with the Socialist Squad 94% of the time. I hope you understand how deeply concerning that is.

---
Here is a special link my team put together for you. I hope to see your name on the donor list:

**[https://secure.winred.com/link-for-Friend-October2021](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=fdb5420ff0ad42f58b095e9da3796944&_e=2V_bEQkiIYMpK1Zxa9nbvHCQl4xArjOpi6kP8EQEqtB2ybOfvHio-eHWwn1TL73z4uMmn9t8pHdnuEjDjgsMLyIi-v6o_WwYeoNWcUMBKMDb6icKKmnNBp0hXRDvXLUIOIV46XMY6_FyISUbgiDYZgDAwcPt8_hk8qLENALw2AFVcJZQeN7ACpAHhPXxIXTbiAexOiiJpIm0OQ5s3euHMKKl10u5CwH2zXRBHVN3D0xNVmQnXJVSM9S9lMJDqwgq8RN6zG8Vk2pFCkz3x5SSKeMcW5dhxLvTuf5J3N8wGBx46ypBBW3RUAAnVvm_9MSylIIJJv0fHK4B6NPE26KP7Vrm8P1MCdkWIunFTF22UQATfTRrjg1kGnz-UbfHG9GWXUv7Zu8leI96-CDXHOiIZ0fO50EHl9DTWZmJct2r59jkOPVy3AsKKx-XmUxC3QF3oaXW6LLlnOix0Pd8IBTU2X8pvS3LYcgFvSNqkpRYlBJ6WcF4n3UqvD9Qvk6a8jPSLtrNdEADwiui_tcHrS2nQNYC5QH4TuRXtBI7y1Esb7k%3D "https://secure.winred.com/link-for-Friend-October2021")**

body:
[1]Powered By People

Since we launched in 2019, Powered by People has organized tens of
thousands of volunteers, contacted tens of millions of voters, and
registered over 250,000 likely Democrats. Now, we’re working to expand our
reach even further before the 2022 midterms — which means we’re reaching
out to supporters like you.

For the last few days, our team has been reviewing our grassroots
fundraising data. According to our records, you’ve never donated to
Powered by People — but there’s never been a better time to make your
first contribution. If
just 1 out of 10 people reading this email chip in $3, we’d be able to
fund our on-the-ground voter registration efforts in all 254 Texas
counties.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/47509?refcode=ema20211020-159076&t=1002&akid=159076%2E444211%2ECSAPh4 ]Will
you chip in your very first $3 donation to Powered by People today?
Grassroots donors like you are the reason we’re able to reach tens of
millions of Texas voters, and we’re counting on your support!

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/47509?refcode=ema20211020-159076&amount=3&t=1021&akid=159076%2E444211%2ECSAPh4 ]Contribute $3

Thank you for hearing us out. We know you have a lot on your plate,
which means we’re deeply grateful when you take the time to read about our
work. Chipping in a few dollars today may not feel like much, but
together, all of our individual efforts add up to powerful changes to the
Texas electorate.

More soon,

Team Powered by People

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/44727?refcode=ema20211020-159076&t=1022&akid=159076%2E444211%2ECSAPh4 ]Donate »

name: Bryan Steil, Congressman
subject: The Debt Ceiling Crisis
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC
body:
Peter, Democrats love spending other people’s money.
Peter, **_Congress is shifting their problems onto the next generation by adding nearly two million dollars in debt per minute._** Two million dollars in debt per minute! But the Democrat's don't care that spending is out of control because they believe reckless spending has no consequences.**We must become more fiscally responsible. Our children and grandchildren do not deserve a diminished future due to the Democrats' limitless spending.** We must cut back and clean up our bloated budgets and bureaucratic mess. Hard working taxpayers should keep more of what they earn rather than turning it over those in government who want a socialist state.[**Will you stand with me and help our campaign defeat the big government, high debt Democrats? Please help us restore common sense to Washington.**](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zlitktk-idtjvlhlh-r/) Thank you,Bryan
--

| | Derek,

Our FINAL filing deadline of the campaign is midnight TONIGHT. It’s our LAST chance to fully fund our early vote program. AND it’s the final opportunity to send the message that we’re more fired up than ever to protect our democracy and keep Virginia blue.

**Before midnight tonight, we’ve set a goal of finding our 300,000th contribution to our historic grassroots campaign.**

_**[It’s an incredible milestone — can you chip in right now and help me stop Glenn Youngkin and Donald Trump? For today only, your contribution will be matched so you can double your impact.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37764929/312513954/-2023814932?refcode=20211021.1_TM_10FL&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjM5OTg3OS01MTMyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UWiBezClKzZe21NVfYVS4h0XtAQv-Epld2JG8V0fPN0=)**_

Your support is critical right now because early voting is well underway. Polls keep showing a tied race and every dollar we raise right now goes directly into our organizing and ads program.

It’s this simple:

If Democrats turn out like they did in 2020, we’re going to win. If they don’t, we’ll lose. At that point you can kiss all of Virginia’s progress goodbye and say hello to the resurgence of Trumpism in our country.

Derek, I need your help to stop that from happening.

_**[Please, donate now, and until midnight tonight, your contribution will be matched, dollar for dollar.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37764931/312513956/-2023814932?refcode=20211021.1_TM_10FL&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjM5OTg3OS01MTMyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UWiBezClKzZe21NVfYVS4h0XtAQv-Epld2JG8V0fPN0=)**_

Talk soon,

Terry | **[DONATE>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37764933/312513958/-2023814932?refcode=20211021.1_TM_10FL&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjM5OTg3OS01MTMyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UWiBezClKzZe21NVfYVS4h0XtAQv-Epld2JG8V0fPN0=)**

Peter,

**[12 DAYS UNTIL THE BIGGEST GOVERNOR ELECTION IN VIRGINIA'S MODERN HISTORY.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58577939:6LTbai28N:m:1:3298722022:7BCBE4B94149566DECFA1E8802C9D71D:r)**

In 12 days, we find out if our great Commonwealth will continue down a dark path towards government overregulation, if our school curriculum will be controlled by liberal special interests, and if our great Commonwealth will be governed by a businessman like Glenn or a lying career politician like Terry.

In 12 days, so much is at stake -- it is hard for us to even put into words.

_**If you 've never been political before, THIS is the time to care about politics. This is the time to call your friends and get your friends to care about politics.**_

Because in 12 days, our freedoms as Virginians are more in jeopardy than ever before.

Terrible Terry isn't just a nickname -- **it 's a reality.** His failure to lead will hold us back the next four years.

**[This is why we are unlocking 5X MATCHING FOR 12 DAYS:](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58577939:6LTbai28N:m:1:3298722022:7BCBE4B94149566DECFA1E8802C9D71D:r)**
**[12 DAYS LEFT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58577939:6LTbai28N:m:1:3298722022:7BCBE4B94149566DECFA1E8802C9D71D:r) ** **SO MUCH IS ON THE LINE** | | [**$25 = $125 TO TAKE OUT TERRY**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58577939:6LTbai28N:m:1:3298722022:7BCBE4B94149566DECFA1E8802C9D71D:r)

**[This is a time for choosing: Virginians must make a critical choice for the future of our Commonwealth and for America.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58577939:6LTbai28N:m:1:3298722022:7BCBE4B94149566DECFA1E8802C9D71D:r)**

Thank you for everything,

Team Youngkin

name: National Republican Polling
subject: Help us fight socialism
body:
Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that sup
_Sponsored message_
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from National Republican Polling is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zbtsdudebdr8g3od7kg93604gnb0tdt7gipd3rlg_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c3i60ob6c9h2bs)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. That’s why you have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Survey on Socialism. With your response, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans—views that we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. Every month, Hillsdale College is reaching millions of Americans with educational outreach. Your response to this National Survey on Socialism is essential in helping us form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of our country. So please give your views on the political, media, and cultural forces that are promoting socialism in our country today, by completing this National Survey on Socialism: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zrfq2el47bardf2da8lj1qqfblejshuohl1u32q0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c3i60ob6c9h2bs)** There is no doubt in my mind that, especially among younger Americans, socialism is increasingly attractive—and that this threatens the future of American liberty. As Winston Churchill noted, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” And education is the surest way to defeat it. If you agree, please stand with Hillsdale College as we promote intelligent patriotism and defend liberty through education. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. | [**Take the Survey**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z1e9j2hunvr7e3dlpag09g9c970mg2ncku45hdm0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c3i60ob6c9h2bs)
---
Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for National Republican Polling, [please use this preferences page](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/prefs/9z2z8i23ru2i95k0jed8vo3ijok8dof9d51kernbcro).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Your response to this National Survey on Socialism is essential in helping us form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of our country. So please give your views on the political, media, and cultural forces that are promoting socialism in our country today, by completing this National Survey on Socialism: There is no doubt in my mind that, especially among younger Americans, socialism is increasingly attractive—and that this threatens the future of American liberty. As Winston Churchill noted, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” And education is the surest way to defeat it. If you agree, please stand with Hillsdale College as we promote intelligent patriotism and defend liberty through education. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. | Warm Regards, Larry P. name: GOP Presidential
subject: Studying his accomplishments is needed
body:
You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, “Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,” on DVD.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ze3r3oestdnl4k8rtpbcumr0f2707srjpnas4c90_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c3i6ao74c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onlesq78srlcpp7ad75ekpm6sr7cmrb4sb1mli37db261ge3ctjc2ob0p3iehpn0puie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg75d366pib6p1nmtgmcdj0m9h3csh5u)
This sponsored message from GOP Presidential is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zain4cm8den9gbn3lmh3cqt177ihv3hi4iuq18ng_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c3i6ao74c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American, You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,”** on DVD. Thousands of people have enjoyed this in-depth course online since its release, _**and now you can add it to your personal library or give it as a gift.**_ In recent years Winston Churchill, who is best known for his leadership during World War II, has been portrayed in numerous films and television shows, proving without a doubt that Americans find the “British Bulldog” captivating. The reasons for this sustained interest in Churchill are profound. No statesman has better diagnosed the threat of modern technology; no statesman has spoken more effectively in opposition to socialism; and, no statesman has displayed more courage in the face of tyranny. It should come as little surprise that so many “academics” and activists are working to smear his legacy, which makes studying a true account of Churchill’s accomplishments more important than ever. **For precisely this reason, I am so excited to offer you this powerful DVD set:** **_[https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpr09vuv63o1tkpf0rs0d2lo0vus0p7colrk4kd0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c3i6ao74c3h2bs)_** As a student of Dr. Arnn myself, I know that his lectures on Churchill will teach you more about this subject than any of the many books and videos available to you, and they will reveal profound lessons that can be applied to the urgent problems of today. [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9snsvl3cs61ovins1p89mi50fqfhqmceebn168o_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c3i6ao74c3h2bs) Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you’ll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift—before they’re gone. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship** ” on DVD: _[**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmuni54ia5laiu82d43dls4it56iqk5kf91mlvt8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c3i6ao74c3h2bs)_ You’ll undoubtedly enjoy this close study of Churchill’s words and deeds.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College |
---

name: Patrick J. Murphy
subject: DCCC Chair is joining us in person TONIGHT to honor women veterans!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking the Hill
body:
Peter,

[_**Quick update:**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/8hHO11fNIZd17Ako5H9baoFAuV0jyDAS2RMpgYmJnlY=/94wN_K0taYH6Lxs3R__qRc2zDihzc6H40DNVY_eyoAE=) we are incredibly honored to be joined by [_**DCCC Chair Congressmember Sean Patrick Maloney (NY-18)**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/8hHO11fNIZd17Ako5H9baoFAuV0jyDAS2RMpgYmJnlY=/94wN_K0taYH6Lxs3R__qRc2zDihzc6H40DNVY_eyoAE=) and CO-07 Congressmember Ed Perlmutter tomorrow evening at an event _**[honoring women veterans and their allies in Congress](https://act.myngp.com/el/8hHO11fNIZd17Ako5H9baoFAuV0jyDAS2RMpgYmJnlY=/94wN_K0taYH6Lxs3R__qRc2zDihzc6H40DNVY_eyoAE=).**_ We will be featuring Senator Catherine Cortez Masto, Reps. Chrissy Houlahan, Elaine Luria, Mikie Sherrill, Julia Brownley, and more as we come together to hold the House and win the Senate by electing - and re-electing - women veterans to Congress.

This is shaping up to be an incredible evening that you won't want to miss! [_**RSVP for your ticket at this link.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/8hHO11fNIZd17Ako5H9baoFAuV0jyDAS2RMpgYmJnlY=/94wN_K0taYH6Lxs3R__qRc2zDihzc6H40DNVY_eyoAE=) If you'd like to join our Host, Champions, or Heroes committees - and get one-on-one time with our honored guests - [_**you can make that commitment at this link.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/8hHO11fNIZd17Ako5H9baoFAuV0jyDAS2RMpgYmJnlY=/94wN_K0taYH6Lxs3R__qRc2zDihzc6H40DNVY_eyoAE=) If you can't join us, you can still make a difference by [_**chipping in to our Women Veterans Leadership Fund at this link.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/8hHO11fNIZd17Ako5H9baoFAuV0jyDAS2RMpgYmJnlY=/bIQNsHlScyCAuhzpnfvx4odJ42U6tdAi8CA31uJCHo0=)

_**Women Vets + Allies in Congress**_
_**When: Thursday, October 21st / 6:30 - 8:00 pm ET**_
_**Where: Capitol Hill / location upon RSVP**_
_**To RSVP: **__**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tth_womenvets21](https://act.myngp.com/el/8hHO11fNIZd17Ako5H9baoFAuV0jyDAS2RMpgYmJnlY=/94wN_K0taYH6Lxs3R__qRc2zDihzc6H40DNVY_eyoAE=)**_

In more than 240 years only 8 women vets have ever been elected to Congress. If we are to better those numbers, we must do it together. [_**Join us.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/8hHO11fNIZd17Ako5H9baoFAuV0jyDAS2RMpgYmJnlY=/94wN_K0taYH6Lxs3R__qRc2zDihzc6H40DNVY_eyoAE=)

In solidarity,
Patrick

Hon. Patrick J. Murphy
32nd Under Secretary of the Army
Former Congressman, PA-01
[@PatrickMurphyPA](https://act.myngp.com/el/8hHO11fNIZd17Ako5H9baoFAuV0jyDAS2RMpgYmJnlY=/7kT9X134RkZkelg92CzmLsHLQjT_XAd1yl4NzcSuQec=)

To make a contribution, [click here](https://act.myngp.com/el/8hHO11fNIZd17Ako5H9baoFAuV0jyDAS2RMpgYmJnlY=/DNjPZUCm_hDy6zShQNm-thd6cX_1afvRaUskE5qbAQ8= "https://act.myngp.com/el/8hHO11fNIZd17Ako5H9baoFAuV0jyDAS2RMpgYmJnlY=/DNjPZUCm_hDy6zShQNm-thd6cX_1afvRaUskE5qbAQ8=").
Checks may be mailed to:
Taking the Hill PAC
PO Box 2134
Bristol, PA 19007

Paid for by Taking the Hill

Bristol PA 19007 United States

name: Jay Jones
subject: Final deadline tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Friends of Jay Jones
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/5q3DtfupIrL0ceDYpRCMjsK4ZNaV9bE6IMGBzDEC-2U=/eY-nOeeV_6Iv_KRu6tLdCd6NQL-b1wwydtxLQBksXsk=)
---
Friend -- I'm working hard every day to win re-election to the House and help elect Democrats up and down the ticket, but extreme Republicans will stop at nothing to turn back the clocks on the progress we've made with their divisive rhetoric and lies. We know that if Democrats turn out on November 2, we will win. But I need your help to make sure we can reach each and every one of our voters because too much is at stake. [**Tonight at midnight is our final fundraising deadline of the campaign, and I 'm asking directly for your help to make sure we have the resources we need to keep Virginia blue this November.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/5q3DtfupIrL0ceDYpRCMjsK4ZNaV9bE6IMGBzDEC-2U=/yUDKebP4VX1yM_2g2LJ3jkzDCFN4OtvY9qH5jpndlyk=) This Commonwealth needs fresh voices and ideas as we enter this new Virginia decade that reflect who we are, what we value, and where we're going. My commitment to giving a voice to those left behind is unflinching, and we will work tirelessly over the years ahead to make Virginia stronger and more just for every citizen. That starts with keeping our Democratic Majority in the House and securing another statewide sweep this year. **[I hope you will join me in this fight by contributing to our efforts before our fundraising deadline at midnight so we can keep our progress going.](https://act.myngp.com/el/5q3DtfupIrL0ceDYpRCMjsK4ZNaV9bE6IMGBzDEC-2U=/IiRcAZtvSRlURyagBPJL1sGXJNBzJwUYqU5SLdGGxlE=)** \- Jay Jones

clean_body: Maximize your impact. | | | Today is our final filing deadline of the 2021 Virginia elections. We’ll be making our final decisions on our budget once this filing deadline is over, and that means we need to make the most of it. This is your last chance to maximize your impact and keep Virginia blue. After today, our budgets will be finalized, and we’ll be doing everything we can to turn out voters and drive up enthusiasm (which is at an all time low right now). It’s important work, and if we don’t hit our goal tonight, we won’t be able to put nearly the resources we need into our mobilization efforts. This final filing deadline is getting closer by the minute, and we’re running out of time to hit our goal and ensure we have the resources we need in these final days. \-- Common Good VA | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . body:
Friend,
I'll be brief - tonight at midnight is our House and statewide candidates' final fundraising deadline of the campaign, and they need our help making sure we drive out every last Democratic voter in just under two weeks. Every dollar we raise today will be spent on our efforts to protect our Blue Majority so we need our grassroots supporters to step up right now!
[**Join our fight by making a contribution before our deadline at midnight!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/u-4HKjO0wdTbbIVDNWLvhK75NtCh5xW1U1tEAA5dnpc=/VplN8UwVz-9Hn4OZ6Aj1qrwqZcAu82KeJXYvABA0DWk=)
We can't do this without you.
\- Team Northam

Friend, I'll cut straight to the chase: our House candidates' final fundraising deadline of this campaign is tomorrow at midnight, and I need your help. We **__must__** protect our slim Democratic majority in the House of Delegates and secure another statewide sweep if we're going to cement the progress we've made over the past four years. If our voters turn out on November 2, we will win. It's that simple. But this campaign is going to come down to the wire. **[Please contribute as generously as you can before our final deadline Thursday at midnight so we can keep Virginia blue!](https://act.myngp.com/el/u-4HKjO0wdTbbIVDNWLvhK75NtCh5xW1U1tEAA5dnpc=/2TYp0lCWQh0y4I-Setfx0LQkFAUY5y4zFd3Igpzq5vQ=)** I can't do this without you. \- Ralph Northam

name: Mark Warner
subject: Terry needs your help to stop Trump’s handpicked governor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Donald Trump endorsed his candidate for Virginia governor for a sixth time at a rally on Wednesday. Attendees at the rally kicked off the event by pledging allegiance to a flag that was at the deadly January 6 insurrection.

body:
it's a tall order, but I'm confident |

[Donate $10 to elect Charlie Crist and build a Florida for All](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37776175/312560985/1642800997?refcode=20211021_f_2_fl&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTUxOWI1Zi03YjMyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1w5Ouu8RnY9K1QEbYKC6Q8AOIBqpUBR-e_LTL0nj3U8=)

Team,

**I wanted to take a moment to consider _what we can achieve_ if we elect Charlie Crist as the next governor of Florida. We can:**
* Take COVID-19 seriously and save countless lives.
* Protect reproductive rights.
* Defend and expand voting rights.
* Preserve the Everglades.
* Address the existential threat of climate change.
* Combat the “red tide” algae bloom.
* Legalize marijuana.

We can do all of this (and so much more) but _only_ if we defeat Gov. Ron DeSantis. And that’s a tall order. He raised over $5.6 million in September alone, adding even more money to his massive war chest.

**[We really can’t afford to fall short, especially right now. So I’m asking you to keep the faith and chip in $5, $10, or even $20 to elect Charlie and build a brighter future for Florida. I know we can get it done.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37776176/312560987/1642800997?refcode=20211021_f_2_fl&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTUxOWI1Zi03YjMyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1w5Ouu8RnY9K1QEbYKC6Q8AOIBqpUBR-e_LTL0nj3U8=)**

Thank you,
Evan Lawlor
Finance Director, Charlie Crist for Governor

name: Citizens for Turner
subject: I will keep working for you!
body:
| | | | | |
---
| | | | Friends, I need your help and support for my work in Congress to **grow jobs, strengthen our national security, and Wright-Patterson Air Force Base.** Throughout my 8 years as mayor and now in Congress, I’ve always prided myself on finding common ground to bring about **positive change for our community**.
---
| | | | | [GO MIKE GO](https://click.icptrack.com/icp/relay.php?r=126057447&msgid=1008621&act=NE1B&c=493811&destination=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fturner%2Fsupport-mike-turner&cf=64880&v=a9bc398e9f07d9ae65eac8dfeb29126d428ae43df52345c5c3fbf5aec4fa5284)
---
| | | | I’ve worked to improve Dayton and the Miami Valley. From working to secure investment in local brownfields, to supporting small business, and bringing **more than** **10,000 jobs to Wright-Patt** , I am always looking for ways to better our community. Bringing the **Schuster Center, Riverscape, and our beloved Dayton Dragons** to the area are some of my proudest accomplishments that strengthen our economy and bring families together.
---
| | | | | [I SUPPORT MIKE!]()
---
| | | | It is an honor and a privilege to serve as your Congressman. I hope I can count on your continued support. Thank you, Congressman Michael R. Turner

name: Team LBR
subject: [ANSWER] Do you think we should act on the climate crisis?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress**
body:
Let us know.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37776592/312562485/-796730906?refcode=EM_s_211020climate_ocs_tlbr_actives_6_ng_nalogo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTUyZDgzMS03ZDMyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=70ozHc8CXLAdzOF67QL4cIpSb0RUC32E9JtNFOx5adU=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37776593/312562486/-796730906?refcode=EM_s_211020climate_ocs_tlbr_actives_6_ng_nalogo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTUyZDgzMS03ZDMyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=70ozHc8CXLAdzOF67QL4cIpSb0RUC32E9JtNFOx5adU=) It’s clear we’re already feeling the effects of a changing climate, and Delaware, in particular, is susceptible to more severe weather and rising sea levels.

Before we go on: **Do you want to see crucial, substantial investments in our fight against the climate crisis as part of the Build Back Better plan?** | | ****[Yes »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37776594/312562487/319682214?refcode=EM_s_211020climate_ocs_tlbr_actives_6_ng_yes&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTUyZDgzMS03ZDMyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=70ozHc8CXLAdzOF67QL4cIpSb0RUC32E9JtNFOx5adU=)****
---
**** **** | | ****[No »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37776595/312562488/319682214?refcode=EM_s_211020climate_ocs_tlbr_actives_6_ng_no&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTUyZDgzMS03ZDMyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=70ozHc8CXLAdzOF67QL4cIpSb0RUC32E9JtNFOx5adU=)****
---
Just this year, we’ve seen 18 natural disasters hit America -- each one has cost the United States at least $1 billion. From hurricanes to wildfires to flooding, no part of America is immune from the effects of climate change.

Inaction is no longer an option. Our future generations are counting on us to make substantial investments to combat global warming right now.

We have a short window of opportunity to slow the most drastic results of global warming, and if we take action right now to cut greenhouse gas emissions, future generations will have a chance to inhabit a world that looks like ours does today.
**Do you think addressing the climate crisis should be included in the Build Back Better plan?**
| ****[Yes »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37776596/312562489/319682214?refcode=EM_s_211020climate_ocs_tlbr_actives_6_ng_yes&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTUyZDgzMS03ZDMyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=70ozHc8CXLAdzOF67QL4cIpSb0RUC32E9JtNFOx5adU=)****
---
**** **** | | ****[No »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37776597/312562490/319682214?refcode=EM_s_211020climate_ocs_tlbr_actives_6_ng_no&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTUyZDgzMS03ZDMyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=70ozHc8CXLAdzOF67QL4cIpSb0RUC32E9JtNFOx5adU=)****
---
Thanks for giving your two cents,

Team LBR
** **
**Congresswoman Lisa Blunt Rochester is a Democrat representing the First State, Delaware. clean_body: Let us know. = = It’s clear we’re already feeling the effects of a changing climate, and Delaware, in particular, is susceptible to more severe weather and rising sea levels. Before we go on: Do you want to see crucial, substantial investments in our fight against the climate crisis as part of the Build Back Better plan? | | **= | | = Just this year, we’ve seen 18 natural disasters hit America -- each one has cost the United States at least $1 billion. From hurricanes to wildfires to flooding, no part of America is immune from the effects of climate change. Inaction is no longer an option. Our future generations are counting on us to make substantial investments to combat global warming right now. We have a short window of opportunity to slow the most drastic results of global warming, and if we take action right now to cut greenhouse gas emissions, future generations will have a chance to inhabit a world that looks like ours does today. Do you think addressing the climate crisis should be included in the Build Back Better plan? | = | | = Thanks for giving your two cents, Team LBR Congresswoman Lisa Blunt Rochester is a Democrat representing the First State, Delaware. She served as the National Co-Chair of the Biden-Harris campaign and Co-Chair of the DCCC ‘Red to Blue’ program. Lisa is running for reelection to continue fighting for our health care, leading the charge toward environmental justice, and advocating for working families like hers. = Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress PO BOX 9767 Wilmington, DE 19810 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. **

name: Val Demings
subject: CRUSHING news

body:
I'm determined to defeat Marco Rubio and flip Florida blue |
#
Hi, Derek – Adam asked me to reach out with this urgent update: In their efforts to make Florida permanently red, the GOP registered a record-breaking number of Republican voters in Florida. And in a race that was decided by just 10,033 votes in the last election, this could be the difference between winning and losing. **So I need your help. Can you donate immediately to our campaigns? We must do everything we can to reach more voters.** [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37778110/312570772/-494810992?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20211021_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzY2MDRjZC04MDMyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tugKvav0crGXubZc6ATlsz9zdyJgcdVanFFTEntyzhY=) | | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37778111/312570773/-494810992?firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20211021_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzY2MDRjZC04MDMyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tugKvav0crGXubZc6ATlsz9zdyJgcdVanFFTEntyzhY=)
---
I'm determined to defeat Marco Rubio and flip Florida blue, but the GOP is doing everything it can to halt our movement – because we have a real chance to win this race. The Florida GOP is working hard to register EVERY Republican to vote, and national Republicans are pouring $10 MILLION into on-the-ground organizers to keep Florida red for decades.
Thanks to supporters like you, I'm just 2 _points_ behind Marco Rubio in the latest poll – but I need your help to pull ahead _and win_. I have a can't-miss midnight grassroots fundraising goal, so I'm counting on you to donate immediately. Every single dollar will help me reach more voters and win in Florida.
**Political experts are saying this race could decide Senate control, so I'm asking you personally: Will you make a split donation between Adam Schiff and my campaign? We must flip Florida blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority.**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Adam Schiff and Val Demings will go through immediately:_

clean_body: I'm determined to defeat Marco Rubio and flip Florida blue | Hi, Derek – Adam asked me to reach out with this urgent update: In their efforts to make Florida permanently red, the GOP registered a record-breaking number of Republican voters in Florida. And in a race that was decided by just 10,033 votes in the last election, this could be the difference between winning and losing. So I need your help. Can you donate immediately to our campaigns? We must do everything we can to reach more voters. = | | = I'm determined to defeat Marco Rubio and flip Florida blue, but the GOP is doing everything it can to halt our movement – because we have a real chance to win this race. The Florida GOP is working hard to register EVERY Republican to vote, and national Republicans are pouring $10 MILLION into on-the-ground organizers to keep Florida red for decades. Thanks to supporters like you, I'm just 2 points behind Marco Rubio in the latest poll – but I need your help to pull ahead and win. I have a can't-miss midnight grassroots fundraising goal, so I'm counting on you to donate immediately. Every single dollar will help me reach more voters and win in Florida. Political experts are saying this race could decide Senate control, so I'm asking you personally: Will you make a split donation between Adam Schiff and my campaign? We must flip Florida blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Adam Schiff and Val Demings will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I'll never stop fighting for better leadership in Florida. Thank you so much for your support. — Val Demings Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress Schiff for Congress 150 E. Olive Ave. Suite 208 Burbank, CA 91502 United States

name: Senator Josh Hawley
subject: Mark Zuckerberg Lied
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR SENATE**
body:
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58578714:6HyrRi2tN:m:1:3103520637:E1E1700B73A8B817EB945F2CBF74D400:r "Big Tech") Peter, I have been leading the fight against Big Tech on Capitol Hill, and I will not stop fighting until we win. **They have been silencing** any voice that doesn't fit into their ridiculous worldview. [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58578714:6HyrRi2tN:m:1:3103520637:E1E1700B73A8B817EB945F2CBF74D400:r "Headline")**They have been spying** on our lives and then selling our information to the highest bidder. **They have been poisoning our children.** Facebook knows Instagram is toxic for teens. **THEY HAVE KNOWN FOR MORE THAN A YEAR.** They don't care -- they're too busy shutting out conservatives and stifling free speech--and profiting from it all! **[If we are going to finally put an end to these behemoth companies that are poisoning our nation, then I need every conservative reading this email to join my team.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58578714:6HyrRi2tN:m:1:3103520637:E1E1700B73A8B817EB945F2CBF74D400:r "If we are going to finally put an end to these behemoth companies
that are poisoning our nation, then I need every conservative reading this email to join my team.")** Facebook is spending millions on slick PR campaigns and passing out even more to Democrat politicians hoping this will all go away. **As a father of three, I am going to stand and FIGHT.[I need to know if you will help me keep fighting and donate as much as possible to stop them.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58578714:6HyrRi2tN:m:1:3103520637:E1E1700B73A8B817EB945F2CBF74D400:r "I need to know if you will help me keep fighting and
donate as much as possible to stop them.")** It won't work on me. So I have introduced legislation that will hold these platforms accountable for the direct harm to our children. I will finally close the Section 230 Loophole and allow parents to sue these companies, and hold them responsible for the damage they cause to our children. [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58578714:6HyrRi2tN:m:1:3103520637:E1E1700B73A8B817EB945F2CBF74D400:r "Mark Zuckerberg")When Mark Zuckerberg testified before a Congressional Committee, he assured us everything was fine, but it is clear now that he was aware of this research - research which only came to light after leaked documents and a _Wall Street Journal_ investigation. **_No more lies._** I will not allow them to lie to us anymore and I will not stop fighting until we stop them. **These Big Tech companies hate me because I won 't take their dirty money. They know they can't buy me off and they know I won't stop fighting them.** I have stood against them long enough to know what they will do - **[they will come after me, and I need to have your continued support so I can keep fighting back.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58578714:6HyrRi2tN:m:1:3103520637:E1E1700B73A8B817EB945F2CBF74D400:r "they will come after me, and I need to have your continued
support so I can keep fighting back.")** All their algorithms, all their lobbyists and all their slick marketing will not persuade me to stop fighting them. The fight to protect free speech and our children from the gross influence over their lives will be long, and it will be difficult, but we need to fight because we know it is right. **[Are you willing to stand with me?](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58578714:6HyrRi2tN:m:1:3103520637:E1E1700B73A8B817EB945F2CBF74D400:r "Are you willing to stand with me?")** I need to know now. Join me,
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58578714:6HyrRi2tN:m:1:3103520637:E1E1700B73A8B817EB945F2CBF74D400:r "Josh Hawley") Josh Hawley
U.S. Senator, Missouri | | [STAND WITH JOSH](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58578714:6HyrRi2tN:m:1:3103520637:E1E1700B73A8B817EB945F2CBF74D400:r "STAND WITH JOSH")
---
| **PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR SENATE**

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Betsy DeVos just attacked me on Twitter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
Friends – **Right-wing billionaire and Donald Trump's former Secretary of Education, Betsy DeVos, just attacked me on Twitter in an attempt to rally the GOP's far-right base.** **[Before I go any further, can you chip in $5 to protect New Hampshire’s vulnerable Senate seat?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37782141/312587661/-214106137?refcode=e20211021_mwh-devos-tw-b&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWFiNzBmNS04YTMyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hiArAY1SdmH1Cm9cvYwfoC0F_YIXLsOeI_eGUXAePUI=)** This isn't the first time Trump Republicans like Betsy DeVos have attacked me, and it won't be the last. In July, Mike Pence declared New Hampshire as the state where the Republican comeback begins. And most recently, Ms. DeVos paid a visit to New Hampshire as part of the GOP's plan to unseat me and flip the Senate red. During Betsy DeVos' confirmation hearing for Secretary of Education back in 2017, she demonstrated a complete lack of understanding and support for the public education system – and it was clear that she was unqualified to serve as secretary of education. At her confirmation hearing, I specifically questioned Ms. DeVos on whether she would enforce the Individuals with Disabilities Education Act. Not only did she refuse to say she would, but she also demonstrated that she was unaware that this landmark civil rights law was a federal law. Unfortunately, she didn’t improve upon that disastrous confirmation hearing during her tenure in the Trump administration -- pursuing policies that undermined public schools in New Hampshire and across the country. From proposed funding cuts to her efforts to implement a voucher system, DeVos ignored the needs of both educators and students in an attempt to dismantle our public education system. I’m writing today because it has been my honor to represent New Hampshire in the U.S. Senate, and I’m not done fighting for Granite Staters. I only won my last election by 1,017 votes, and it could be even closer in 2022. The GOP's constant attacks, similar to the one DeVos launched against me yesterday, are a clear attempt to unseat me – and if we lose in New Hampshire, Democrats have close to no chance of holding our narrow majority. Having Donald Trump and his allies fully invested in this race is bad news. I hate asking for money, but my campaign is having a slow fundraising month, and we need the funds to fight back against Republican attacks. **[Will you please rush $5 or whatever you can afford right now to help us win in New Hampshire and protect our vulnerable Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37782142/312587662/-214106137?refcode=e20211021_mwh-devos-tw-b&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWFiNzBmNS04YTMyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hiArAY1SdmH1Cm9cvYwfoC0F_YIXLsOeI_eGUXAePUI=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37782143/312587663/-214106137?refcode=e20211021_mwh-devos-tw-b&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWFiNzBmNS04YTMyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hiArAY1SdmH1Cm9cvYwfoC0F_YIXLsOeI_eGUXAePUI=)
---
[Contribute $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37782144/312587664/-214106137?refcode=e20211021_mwh-devos-tw-b&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWFiNzBmNS04YTMyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hiArAY1SdmH1Cm9cvYwfoC0F_YIXLsOeI_eGUXAePUI=)
[Contribute $50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37782145/312587665/-214106137?refcode=e20211021_mwh-devos-tw-b&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWFiNzBmNS04YTMyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hiArAY1SdmH1Cm9cvYwfoC0F_YIXLsOeI_eGUXAePUI=)
[Another amount](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37782146/312587666/-214106137?refcode=e20211021_mwh-devos-tw-b&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWFiNzBmNS04YTMyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hiArAY1SdmH1Cm9cvYwfoC0F_YIXLsOeI_eGUXAePUI=)
I'm fighting to give New Hampshire families a brighter future by strengthening public education, protecting reproductive health care, addressing climate change, and more. But there's still much work ahead – and if Republicans regain control of the Senate, they will undo all of the progress we've made so far.
**[So please, consider making a $5 donation today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37782147/312587667/-214106137?refcode=e20211021_mwh-devos-tw-b&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWFiNzBmNS04YTMyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hiArAY1SdmH1Cm9cvYwfoC0F_YIXLsOeI_eGUXAePUI=)**
Thank you so much.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

name: Glenn Youngkin
subject: My election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
There isn't much time left, so I'll make this quick. There isn't much time left, so I'll make this quick.

| | There isn't much time left, so I'll make this quick.

Virginians have already begun casting their ballots and there are just 12 days left until Election Day.

If Clinton-ally Terry McAuliffe wins this race, there will be dire consequences for Virginia. He's bad on crime, bad for our economy, and bad for our schools.

If I'm elected, on day one I'll cut exploding costs for families, defend our police instead of defunding them, jumpstart job growth, and ban Critical Race Theory.

_**[If you have anything to spare, I'm asking you to step up today to help me and other strong conservatives win our elections.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58581873:JV7XjW2Nk:m:1:3253819041:855ECA4C1588BE0E22973A20664D5AA3:r "If you have anything to spare, I’m asking you to step up today to help me and other strong conservatives win our elections.")**_

---
| | | [CONTRIBUTE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58581873:JV7XjW2Nk:m:1:3253819041:855ECA4C1588BE0E22973A20664D5AA3:r)
---

All eyes are on Virginia. The results of this election will be used as a guide map for what could follow in next year's midterms.

If Republicans _win_ , it will be a huge blow to the Democrats' hopes of holding onto their majority. But if Republicans _lose_ , Democrats will leverage our loss for their own gain.

We _can_ win. In fact, the latest polls have me and McAuliffe neck-and-neck.

**This race will come down to the final get-out-the-vote efforts.** Every single dollar could impact how many more doors we can knock, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach.

_**[So, can I please count on you to pitch in anything you're able ASAP, even if it's just $1?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58581873:JV7XjW2Nk:m:1:3253819041:855ECA4C1588BE0E22973A20664D5AA3:r "So, can I please count on you to pitch in anything you’re able ASAP, even if it’s just $1?")**_

Thank you in advance for your generous support.

Sincerely,

Glenn Youngkin

clean_body: There isn't much time left, so I'll make this quick. There isn't much time left, so I'll make this quick. | | There isn't much time left, so I'll make this quick. Virginians have already begun casting their ballots and there are just 12 days left until Election Day. If Clinton-ally Terry McAuliffe wins this race, there will be dire consequences for Virginia. He's bad on crime, bad for our economy, and bad for our schools. If I'm elected, on day one I'll cut exploding costs for families, defend our police instead of defunding them, jumpstart job growth, and ban Critical Race Theory. "If you have anything to spare, I’m asking you to step up today to help me and other strong conservatives win our elections." | | | All eyes are on Virginia. The results of this election will be used as a guide map for what could follow in next year's midterms. If Republicans win , it will be a huge blow to the Democrats' hopes of holding onto their majority. But if Republicans lose , Democrats will leverage our loss for their own gain. We can win. In fact, the latest polls have me and McAuliffe neck-and-neck. This race will come down to the final get-out-the-vote efforts. Every single dollar could impact how many more doors we can knock, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. "So, can I please count on you to pitch in anything you’re able ASAP, even if it’s just $1?" Thank you in advance for your generous support. subject: Volunteer to Get Out The Vote!
body:
It's all about turnout for OH-15 and our local elections | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/58e33bdbd676/how-to-volunteer-this-weekend-5026429?e=400a181d5a)
### _In Upper Arlington this Saturday at 10! ⤵️_
---
Hi ,We’re racing towards the finish line on Nov. 2, and we need your help. We have hundreds of Get Out The Vote (aka **GOTV**) volunteer shifts to fill between now and Election Day, so I need you to sign up and bring your friends!Wherever there is a Democratic sample ballot, we are carrying those at every canvass! **So by coming out to volunteer, you’ll be helping your local school board, city council, and township trustee candidates as well as Allison Russo.** It’s all hands on deck for the next two weeks, . Are you in?
## _Knock on Doors with Local Democrats:_
_Click to sign-up and share with friends:_
* [**Athens County GOTV Canvass**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=fcd0d2b594&e=400a181d5a)
* [**Canal Winchester GOTV Canvass**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=be5094ea78&e=400a181d5a)
* [**Columbus City Coordinated Campaign GOTV Canvass**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=2f09fbc8f8&e=400a181d5a)
* [**Grove City/SWCSD Coordinated GOTV Canvass**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=40ade4ce22&e=400a181d5a)
* [**Hilliard Coordinated Campaign GOTV Canvass**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=3a0019652a&e=400a181d5a)
* [**Lancaster GOTV Canvass**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=0d7771423d&e=400a181d5a)
* [**Madison County GOTV Canvass**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=f13a5adcba&e=400a181d5a)
* [**Morgan County GOTV Canvass**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=1720844b5f&e=400a181d5a)
* [**Pickerington/Violet Twp. Coordinated Campaign GOTV**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=fcc1c5d74d&e=400a181d5a)
* [**Ross County GOTV Canvass**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=e71e9865ea&e=400a181d5a)
* [**Upper Arlington/NW Columbus Coordinated Campaign GOTV**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=5e0272a4b0&e=400a181d5a)
* _**WITH CONGRESSMAN TIM RYAN THIS SATURDAY AT 10!**_
* [**Victorian Village GOTV Canvass**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=883f5bbe75&e=400a181d5a)
* _**WITH STATE REP. KRISTIN BOGGS THIS SATURDAY AT 10!**_
* [**Wilmington GOTV Canvass**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=0524c48885&e=400a181d5a)

| [VIEW ALL CANVASSES](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=8d1b0a0eec&e=400a181d5a)
---
## _Make Phone Calls and Send Texts:_
* [**GOTV Virtual Phone Bank**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=0742f6580b&e=400a181d5a)**with OPAL!**
* _Trainings are Sunday at 4pm and Tuesday at 6pm_
* _Once trained, make calls every day of the week!_
* [**Rural Voters for Russo Virtual Phone Bank**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=c719905c2f&e=400a181d5a)
* _Trainings are Monday and Wednesday at 6pm_
* _Once trained, make calls every day of the week!_
* [**Seniors for Russo Virtual Phone Bank**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=a6fa802945&e=400a181d5a)
* _Trainings are Tuesday and Thursday at 5pm_
* _Once trained, make calls every day of the week!_
* [**Students for Russo Virtual Phone Bank**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=f39220df23&e=400a181d5a)
* _Trainings are Tuesday and Thursday at 5pm_
* _Once trained, make calls every day of the week!_
* [**GOTV Text Banks!**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=43e566a7d1&e=400a181d5a)
* We have shifts next week and on Election Day!

| [VIEW ALL PHONE BANKS](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=ecaf92c2cc&e=400a181d5a)
---
## _Write Letters to Neighbors:_
Research shows that neighbor-to-neighbor conversations are some of the most impactful political conversations you can have. The campaign can pay for flashy mailers and TV commercials, but [**only YOU can help us send a letter to your folks.**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=267d64fdd4&e=400a181d5a) We'll ask you to write a short note on each letter, and to hand-address each envelope to our targeted voter list. This, along with a return address folks can recognize, makes a huge difference.
_Letters should be mailed no later than October 27th_
| [VIEW TEMPLATE LETTER AND SIGN UP](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=13c68b69b2&e=400a181d5a)
---
| | | | [](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=aeb8587404&e=400a181d5a)| [](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=1132e25b61&e=400a181d5a)| [](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=07b204d4a8&e=400a181d5a)
---|---|---
| | |

Our mailing address is:
RUSSO FOR CONGRESS545 E Town StColumbus, OH 43215-4801
[Add us to your address book](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/vcard?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=1655de56ed)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/profile?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=1655de56ed&e=400a181d5a&c=1c21b06fb7) or [unsubscribe](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=1655de56ed&e=400a181d5a&c=1c21b06fb7)

name: MalcolmKenyatta.com
subject: let me run some numbers by you:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
#

Hey folks, — it’s Malcolm’s Campaign Manager, Vanessa.
As one of Malcolm’s top supporters, you’re a crucial part of the work we’re doing to elect a champion for working families to the U.S. Senate.
And because of that, I wanted to write to you today to lay out our strategy for winning the Democratic primary and flipping this seat from red to blue.
[But before I do, I have an important request to make: Could you pitch in $3 to fund our work to elect Malcolm Kenyatta? Campaigns like ours are expensive and we’re funded by real working people, not corporate PACs.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37784333/312590412/-360183459?refcode2=1b93c6e8-8d32-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211021-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjkzYzZlOC04ZDMyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DQN9fR4PBvQjTE0KH11QeNQ4iidSXRxrZTym1HPS6kw=)
**[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37784334/312590413/-360183459?refcode2=1b93c6e8-8d32-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211021-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjkzYzZlOC04ZDMyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DQN9fR4PBvQjTE0KH11QeNQ4iidSXRxrZTym1HPS6kw=)**
Pennsylvania voters are looking for a Senate candidate who knows the challenges they face first-hand and will work with President Joe Biden to build our nation back better. That candidate is Malcolm.
Unlike other candidates in this race, Malcolm was an early supporter of President Biden, and he aligns with Biden on the issues more than any other candidate. He’ll fight to help pass President Biden’s Build Back Better agenda and rebuild the working class.
When voters hear that and his story of growing up dirt poor in the projects of North Philly, watching his mom ration her insulin, and moving from place to place to avoid eviction, they will join our big coalition for change.
But the key to our strategy is getting the word out about Malcolm — and that's where you come in.
In a super crowded race like ours, it's going to take a huge amount of resources to break through the noise and reach voters in all of Pennsylvania's 67 counties.
**And since we are a grassroots-powered campaign, it's going to take everyone playing a part to fuel our work to elect Malcolm.**
[So, will you please consider making a contribution to Malcolm's campaign today? name: Jessie, Finance Director
subject: Derek needs your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Peter,
I’ll be blunt. We’ve passed the middle of our month and we have fallen seriously behind on our fundraising numbers. The good news is, our target is still within reach. We have 10 more days to raise $10,000, and I believe we can do it. **[If you’ve been waiting to donate, now is the time. Your donation helps us stay afloat during the holiday months which are hardest for fundraising.

](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37786679/312593963/-228151206?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTM0ZTM1Mi05MDMyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Y2aMCiCYUnZY9OX6g8AedQQHuolGGvfHIV2iOwl2no=)**

Derek has been traveling all around the district to meet with supporters and begin the important task of registering voters. **We all know how crucial it is that we expand the electorate and turn out Democrats to flip this district blue once and for all.** But I have to be honest: we can’t do any of that if we don’t raise the resources to fund our ground game in the new year.

Over the next few months, it’s important for our campaign to stay afloat through to the new year when we can start to hire more staff and pay for voter engagement tech and literature. **[Any amount you can give is extremely helpful and greatly appreciated. If you can, a monthly recurring donation in particular helps sustain us for the long run.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37786682/312593966/-228151206?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTM0ZTM1Mi05MDMyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Y2aMCiCYUnZY9OX6g8AedQQHuolGGvfHIV2iOwl2no=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37786685/312593970/-228151206?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTM0ZTM1Mi05MDMyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Y2aMCiCYUnZY9OX6g8AedQQHuolGGvfHIV2iOwl2no=)

We have a winning shot in this race, and we have big plans in place. Your investment will help us go all the way to victory in next year’s primary. But if we don’t raise enough money now, we’ll have to cut costs and weaken our ground game. **[That’s why I’m asking you to rush a donation to us TODAY and help us close our $10,000 gap.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37786688/312593973/-228151206?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTM0ZTM1Mi05MDMyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Y2aMCiCYUnZY9OX6g8AedQQHuolGGvfHIV2iOwl2no=)

Can Derek count on you?**

In Solidarity,
**Derek Marshall**
