clean_body: Let's Retire Liz Cheney | | | | Let's Retire Liz Cheney Friend, Liz Cheney said she will do everything she can to make sure that President Trump never returns to the Oval Office. Let's make sure Liz Cheney never returns to the halls of Congress. Liz Cheney not only betrayed President Trump and the America First Agenda, she betrayed you, and the rest of the 75 million Patriotic Americans who support him. The Establishment hates President Trump because he cannot be controlled by the political elitists. While the leaders of the establishment fight for their own interests in Washington DC, President Trump and I fight for you. This is why President Trump endorsed me, so I can retire Liz Cheney once and for all. President Trump knows I am a true Conservative fighter who will always put America and Wyoming First. He knows that like him, I am tough on immigration and the border, I support the 2nd Amendment, and I will fight to ensure that President Trump's legacy endures. While Liz Cheney partners with Crazy Nancy Pelosi and walk-away Joe Biden, President Trump and I will continue to fight for the hard-working people of Wyoming. Thank you, Harriet Hageman | | | |

It seems like Joe Biden has been making a lot of threats lately.

Get the vaccine...**_or lose your job_** _. _

Make your kids wear a mask...**_or they can’t go to school at all._**

Get on board with his radical far-left agenda...**_or he’ll force you out of the way._**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Pro=2DLife=20Virginia?=
subject: What are Ralph Northam and Abigail Spanberger doing together?
body:
They are hurting our Pro-Life way. |

https://secure.winred.com/tina-ramirez-for-congress-inc/pro-life-advocates?amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=20211021_prolifevirginia_northam-and-spanberger
Friend,

Remember Ralph “Black Face” Northam? Well, he is back out helping Abigail Spanberger. And because these anti-pro-life advocates are together again, it reminded us of how terrible Northam is. Here is what he said about POST-BIRTH “abortions”:

“The infant would be delivered. The infant would be kept comfortable...and then a discussion would ensue between the physicians and the mother.”
Can you believe that, Friend? That is a life, a human being, he is referring to like it's a piece of meat.

We need to get these anti-pro-life advocates out of office!
We need Tina! As a single mother, Tina’s greatest blessing has been bringing her daughter into this world and seeing life in new ways through her daughter’s eyes. The government should not be in the business of aborting babies or supporting organizations that do. For Tina, being pro-life is more than a statement; it’s how she’s lived.

If you agree - please make a contribution today! (https://secure.winred.com/tina-ramirez-for-congress-inc/pro-life-advocates?amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=20211021_prolifevirginia_northam-and-spanberger)

name: Karen Bass
subject: Missing your response, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 (ID # 1441328)
body:
Hey there --

My team will be sharing results from our Priorities Survey with me tomorrow, and I noticed you haven't yet submitted your response. I want to make sure we have representation from every single zip code because it's crucial every voice is heard.

**[We'll be going through the results tomorrow afternoon, so please don't miss this chance to share your thoughts with me before then. Take the Priorities Survey now to let me know what issues are most important to you.](https://act.myngp.com/el/AU2Tmaf4XcwUhq-uydVfhf-rAc-pJmlsNL5815FAVxQ=/AiWpwNIP53SEPqfFcIO5K3M6i5V8JbK-YcefLdLBsqc=?ms=em21_211021_svykkr_esrv_gq_act___kb_ettx_alask1&refcode=em21_211021_svykkr_esrv_gq_act___kb_ettx_alask1&source=em21_211021_svykkr_esrv_gq_act___kb_ettx_alask1&utm_campaign=em21_211021_svykkr_esrv_gq_act___kb_ettx_alask1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=karen-bass)**

In solidarity,

Karen

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Karen Bass for Mayor** <info@karenbass.com>
Date: Sun, Oct 10, 2021
Subject: Will you tell Karen what your top priorities are for Los Angeles? Hey there --

We wanted to make sure you didn't miss Karen's BIG news: She's running to be Los Angeles' next mayor.

In the middle of a financial and public health crisis, it's time the people of Los Angeles have a progressive voice fighting for them in City Hall. Karen is ready to be that voice.

**[Will you take Karen's short survey to let her know what your TOP priorities are for our city? We can't afford to stay silent on the issues that matter to us. **[Tell Karen what your TOP priorities are for our city. Take the survey now»](https://act.myngp.com/el/AU2Tmaf4XcwUhq-uydVfhf-rAc-pJmlsNL5815FAVxQ=/AiWpwNIP53SEPqfFcIO5K3M6i5V8JbK-YcefLdLBsqc=?ms=em21_211021_svykkr_esrv_gq_act___kb_ettx_alask3&refcode=em21_211021_svykkr_esrv_gq_act___kb_ettx_alask3&source=em21_211021_svykkr_esrv_gq_act___kb_ettx_alask3&utm_campaign=em21_211021_svykkr_esrv_gq_act___kb_ettx_alask3&utm_medium=email)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58582133:6sftsW2xN:m:1:3253819041:5F5A6EA0107918E5BC42F4F7D997F184:r "Video") Peter: The Democrats have hit the PANIC button in Virginia. **For all their talk about fairness, they only care about one thing: winning.** If they have to send Stacey Abrams there to smile and wave with a man who has called Black Americans "colored people," _then so be it._ **Stacey Abrams will do as she is told.** She is happy to stand by while another old, racist white guy, who pals around with Bill Clinton and Joe Biden, talks down to Black Voters. They walk through black churches to persuade us to vote for politicians who have let us down **_for more than four decades._** With the Democrats flying in the big guns and the polls getting tighter, we only have days left to swing this close race to Glen Youngkin - the self-made businessman running against Terry McAuliffe. **[The New Journey PAC is leading the charge, and we need your last-minute EMERGENCY donation to help win this race.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58582133:6sftsW2xN:m:1:3253819041:5F5A6EA0107918E5BC42F4F7D997F184:r "The New Journey PAC is leading the charge, and we need
your last-minute EMERGENCY donation to help win this race.")** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58582133:6sftsW2xN:m:1:3253819041:5F5A6EA0107918E5BC42F4F7D997F184:r "Photo")I guess I shouldn't be surprised - Virginia has a "Progressive" Governor now, and the media barely cared that _this in his college yearbook photo, he wore blackface._ **_And Terry McCauliffe, a man who spent four years calling President Trump a "racist," was more than happy to accept an endorsement from Virginia's "Blackface" Governor._** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58582133:6sftsW2xN:m:1:3253819041:5F5A6EA0107918E5BC42F4F7D997F184:r "Rush")This is Bo Snerdley, the one-time producer and call screener for Rush Limbaugh. Rush and I uncovered a lot about Terry McAuliffe and Bill Clinton - things they both wish we would all forget - not a chance. **Working with Rush for nearly two decades has confirmed the truth about liberals:_they HATE it when a Black person in America dares to think for themselves._** People like Terry McAuliffe believe they can secure the Black vote by bragging about giving felons the right to vote - _does he think we're all criminals?_ **_How is the media not calling him out for his racism?_** It is precisely why I started the New Journey PAC - to show Black America the true face of the Democrat Party - and we need your help to prevent Black Voters from being duped by another progressive politician. **[I need every true patriot reading this email to do all they can to help us defeat Terry McAuliffe in Virginia and every other liberal racist across the nation.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58582133:6sftsW2xN:m:1:3253819041:5F5A6EA0107918E5BC42F4F7D997F184:r "I need every true patriot reading this email to do all they can

Peter,

**[12 DAYS UNTIL THE BIGGEST GOVERNOR ELECTION IN VIRGINIA'S MODERN HISTORY.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58583495:JWJOsW2PN:m:1:3298722022:F63B3E406BEED375E7871DCDD836113A:r)**

In 12 days, we find out if our great Commonwealth will continue down a dark path towards government overregulation, if our school curriculum will be controlled by liberal special interests, and if our great Commonwealth will be governed by a businessman like Glenn or a lying career politician like Terry.

In 12 days, so much is at stake -- it is hard for us to even put into words.

_**If you 've never been political before, THIS is the time to care about politics. This is the time to call your friends and get your friends to care about politics.**_

Because in 12 days, our freedoms as Virginians are more in jeopardy than ever before.

Terrible Terry isn't just a nickname -- **it 's a reality.** His failure to lead will hold us back the next four years.

**[This is why we are unlocking 5X MATCHING FOR 12 days:](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58583495:JWJOsW2PN:m:1:3298722022:F63B3E406BEED375E7871DCDD836113A:r)**

**[This is a time for choosing: Virginians must make a critical choice for the future of our Commonwealth and for America.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58583495:JWJOsW2PN:m:1:3298722022:F63B3E406BEED375E7871DCDD836113A:r)**

Team Youngkin

Sponsor some shirts here! - tshirts-email?utmsource=sgrc&utmmedium=email&utmcampaign=2021oct21hf - tshirts-email?utmsource=sgrc&utmmedium=email&utmcampaign=2021oct21hf& amount=20 SPONSOR 2 SHIRTS » - tshirts-email?utmsource=sgrc&utmmedium=email&utmcampaign=2021oct21hf& amount=50 SPONSOR 5 SHIRTS » - tshirts-email?utmsource=sgrc&utmmedium=email&utmcampaign=2021oct21hf& amount=100 SPONSOR 10 SHIRTS » - tshirts-email?utmsource=sgrc&utmmedium=email&utmcampaign=2021oct21hf& amount=250 SPONSOR 25 SHIRTS » - tshirts-email?utmsource=sgrc&utmmedium=email&utmcampaign=2021oct21hf& amount=500 SPONSOR 50 SHIRTS » - tshirts-email?utmsource=sgrc&utmmedium=email&utmcampaign=2021oct21hf& amount=1000 SPONSOR 100 SHIRTS »This campaign is a grassroots movement. It’s personified by the thousands of Georgians — from Blue Ridge to Macon, Albany to Savannah — who are demanding more of the green shirts to share the message. We’re placing this order soon, and if you haven’t already donated to power this campaign, I hope you’ll help cover the costs of this t-shirt order. Thanks for standing with us! - tshirts-email?utmsource=sgrc&utmmedium=email&utmcampaign=2021oct21hf Gary Black - tshirts-email?utmsource=sgrc&utmmedium=email&utmcampaign=2021oct21hf SPONSOR 5 SHIRTS »Keep Reading For A Quick Message From Gary: I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why. Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $10 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts. With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37789063/312602011/1761773496?refcode=211021_FR_JUSTINBIBBENDO_B_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZWEyZmM5OS05NzMyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yuLZ6CGytVVrqNnkbvM82V0nQy89P5QTym1vAkHRmQY=)

Hello Somebody!

Let me tell you a little about Justin Bibb. He’s a fellow Democrat running for Mayor of Cleveland, and I am proud to announce my official endorsement of Justin today.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37789064/312602012/1761773496?refcode=211021_FR_JUSTINBIBBENDO_B_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZWEyZmM5OS05NzMyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yuLZ6CGytVVrqNnkbvM82V0nQy89P5QTym1vAkHRmQY=) Now, I am not just supporting Justin simply because he’s a Democrat. You know me better than that.

What I admire about Justin is the type of campaign that he’s running — he is taking the same people-first approach that I have always had. He is talking to the people. Working people of all generations, creeds, and classes in the great city of Cleveland, my hometown!

I am talking about the type of campaign grind that is focused on organizing, mobilizing, and groundwork. It’s about being accessible and establishing an interpersonal connection with folks.

That means meeting voters where they are and talking to them on the issues that they care about. It means knocking on doors. It means making direct phone calls. It’s the true scrappy, grassroots stuff. _The things that candidates always say they will do but never do. He’s doing this thing, and I am here to help him by asking you to join me in supporting Justin Bibb for Mayor._

**Because if we are going to advance our movement starting right here in Cleveland, it’s critical that we back bold leaders who put working people first.**

**[**We’re building a coalition of leaders fighting to flip Ohio blue — one seat at a time -- and we urgently need your grassroots support. clean_body: Our movement starts here in Cleveland. | | | = Hello Somebody! Let me tell you a little about Justin Bibb. He’s a fellow Democrat running for Mayor of Cleveland, and I am proud to announce my official endorsement of Justin today. = Now, I am not just supporting Justin simply because he’s a Democrat. You know me better than that. What I admire about Justin is the type of campaign that he’s running — he is taking the same people-first approach that I have always had. He is talking to the people. Working people of all generations, creeds, and classes in the great city of Cleveland, my hometown! I am talking about the type of campaign grind that is focused on organizing, mobilizing, and groundwork. It’s about being accessible and establishing an interpersonal connection with folks. That means meeting voters where they are and talking to them on the issues that they care about. It means knocking on doors. It means making direct phone calls. It’s the true scrappy, grassroots stuff. The things that candidates always say they will do but never do. He’s doing this thing, and I am here to help him by asking you to join me in supporting Justin Bibb for Mayor. Because if we are going to advance our movement starting right here in Cleveland, it’s critical that we back bold leaders who put working people first. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ____= ____= ****** **** Thanks for being a part of this movement, **Nina Turner** ************ ********** ****************EXPRESS DONATE to Nina Turner**************** ****************If you've stored payment info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:**************** | ****************= "="**************** | ****************= "="**************** | ****************= "="**************** | ****************= "="**************** ---|---|---|--- Nina Turner has a long track record of protecting reproductive justice, supporting labor rights, championing criminal justice reform, and spearheading the way toward a more equitable and inclusive Ohio. | | Derek,

This is it. The last filing deadline of 2021’s most important election. I’m going to explain to you why Virginia is a must win for Democrats in the Commonwealth and in our country, but first, I’m humbly asking for your support before tonight’s midnight deadline.

_**[Please contribute anything you can afford right now — if you donate before midnight, your contribution will be matched, doubling your impact.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37790145/312606927/-2023814932?refcode=20211021.6_TM_10FP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTg0OGJiNy05ODMyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=buDE5Y7Fl59_EkBTEuYfA93OvShJ4yu7CJ9prxfSptU=)**_

So here’s why we have to win:

Glenn Youngkin became the Republican nominee by making Donald Trump’s ‘big lie’ the central issue of his campaign. He spent more than $10 million of his own money buying the nomination. He’s promised to ban abortion and defund Planned Parenthood.

**And, like Trump, he’s used hate and racist dog whistles to divide us instead of bringing us together.**

Look, if we don’t stop Glenn Youngkin, right-wing extremists across the country will become emboldened. Disgraceful displays like the one we saw last week where Youngkin supporters pledged allegiance to an insurrection flag will become more common.

AND Donald Trump’s 2024 presidential campaign will get a HUGE surge of momentum.

I’m not about to let that happen. But right now, with polls showing a tied race, I need your help.

_**[Please, Derek, contribute now and help me win for the Commonwealth and our country. If you donate before the midnight filing deadline, your contribution will be matched and your impact will be doubled.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37790146/312606928/-2023814932?refcode=20211021.6_TM_10FP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTg0OGJiNy05ODMyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=buDE5Y7Fl59_EkBTEuYfA93OvShJ4yu7CJ9prxfSptU=)**_

Terry | **[DONATE>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37790147/312606930/-2023814932?refcode=20211021.6_TM_10FP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTg0OGJiNy05ODMyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=buDE5Y7Fl59_EkBTEuYfA93OvShJ4yu7CJ9prxfSptU=)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Brian?=
subject: BIG NEWS
disclaimer_text: paid for by lobbyists
body:
RE: Idaho campaign |
---
| | **BIG ANNOUNCEMENT!**

I’ve done A LOT of thinking over the past few months.

I’ve talked to hundreds of people (strangers, friends, new acquaintances, current state legislators, and elected officials)... and one thing has become _CRYSTAL CLEAR_ :

The fight for Idaho will be won (or lost) in the state legislature - not Washington D.C. (I'm now convinced that the demon is in too deep to make a difference there).

Why a state race? Because our state legislature is FAILING.

They don’t FIGHT for our rights.

Instead, the self-proclaimed "conservatives" are fighting to conserve the Republican party establishment. They’re bought and paid for by lobbyists. They're hypnotized by federal money, and they're in love with special interests.

Want proof?

The American Conservative Union gives the state legislature a failing grade of 62% ([http://ratings.conservative.org/states/ID](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=50c94a096a&e=dea908e0fe))

And the Idaho Freedom Foundation is about the same. They give the senate a 53.6% rating, and the house a score of 69% ([https://idahofreedom.org/.../2021-Idaho-Freedom-Index-web...](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=0e507bcf9e&e=dea908e0fe)).

Bottom line: **_we’re in trouble._**

So after a lot of thinking and discussion, I made the choice to pivot.

I officially wound down my campaign for the House seat in D.C., and instead, I'll be focusing ALL my energy and attention on the Idaho state legislature.

Because that's where I can make a real difference and it's EXACTLY where an America-first, principled conservative who loves liberty and freedom is most needed.

Now, I can't give you all the details... yet.

Because the current redistricting process may shift things a bit.

But, once the redistricting is done, I’ll be able to give you ALL the info and details on my campaign (it’d be foolish to do that now because as it stands, I’m not 100% sure I’ll be running against the same individual... who like most legislators in Idaho has a failing grade with both the ACU and the IFF).

For now, just know I'll be running in**Nampa**.

And I can't wait to get in the fight.

So please, stay tuned!

Cheers,

Brian
---
| | _Copyright © 2021 Brian Lenney for Idaho, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Brian Lenney for IdahoPO Box 3753Nampa, ID 83653-3753
[Add us to your address book](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/vcard?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=57cc6bf1b7)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/profile?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=57cc6bf1b7&e=dea908e0fe&c=9cf9101eb7) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=57cc6bf1b7&e=dea908e0fe&c=9cf9101eb7).

[](http://www.mailchimp.com/email-referral/?utm_source=freemium_newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=referral_marketing&aid=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&afl=1)

There are just twelve days left in this race, Peter!

_I’ve never been busier on the campaign trail_ — we’ve stumped with First Lady Dr. Jill Biden, voting rights activist Stacey Abrams, and tonight I will be joining Vice President Kamala Harris on stage!

**But here’s the hard truth: My far-right opponent is ramping up her attacks.** And my campaign needs all the support we can muster to fight back!

[**We can’t do it alone, Peter — please chip in $3, $7 or whatever amount you can to help me win this race. My team tells me we need to reach our $30,000 goal as soon as possible!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37791731/312612754/-1547699132?amount=3&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250&refcode=HAFV_20211021_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDIwNTEwMi05ZjMyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4m2NhdOhQ6HDVFAwlGvMijpUjJ1rAnakMls1_PfbFjE=) | [CONTRIBUTE $3 TO DEMOCRAT HALA AYALA »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37791732/312612755/-1547699132?amount=3&refcode=HAFV_20211021_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDIwNTEwMi05ZjMyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4m2NhdOhQ6HDVFAwlGvMijpUjJ1rAnakMls1_PfbFjE=)

Peter, we’re facing an unprecedented threat to our Commonwealth.

**Everything is on the line, and that’s no exaggeration.** If extremist Winsome Sears wins on November 2nd, we will lose it all.

Voting rights. Abortion. Accessible health care. Gun control. The environment. Raising teacher pay. Building back better as the pandemic rages on in Virginia.

So I’m traveling from community to community to win this race and protect our hard-fought Democratic progress. _But Peter, I really need you._

body:
It's a myth that we don't vote, but speaking from experience, we need to do more work to reach young people where they're at. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37792025/312614127/390307162?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTI3ZjhhNS1hMDMyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=spdZsH58gb6LmOYNYuSmaiV5x7c2ybIoQvOZBKvi9UE=)
Hi, friend. If we haven't met yet, my name is Holley and I'm joining Max's campaign as a lead campus organizer.

In a moment I'm going to ask you to **[chip in a contribution](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37792027/312614129/-209993060?refcode=em-102121-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTI3ZjhhNS1hMDMyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=spdZsH58gb6LmOYNYuSmaiV5x7c2ybIoQvOZBKvi9UE=)** to a project I'm working on. But first, I'm excited to let you know why I'm supporting Max:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37792028/312614130/-209993060?refcode=em-102121-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTI3ZjhhNS1hMDMyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=spdZsH58gb6LmOYNYuSmaiV5x7c2ybIoQvOZBKvi9UE=)
I'm supporting Max because he's bringing a new vision and bold leadership to the North State. For too long this community has been represented by the embarrassment that is Doug LaMalfa. He's been a disaster on issues like women's rights, solving our climate crisis, and protecting our Democracy.

LaMalfa is banking on apathy from young people like me. That's why I'm coming on board to make sure more college students know that Max is a viable Democrat who can beat him. It's a myth that we don't vote, but speaking from experience, we need to do more work to reach young people where they're at.

One of my first orders of business is applying for a grant from the California Democratic Party to bolster our youth and student organizing efforts. But in order to demonstrate our grassroots fundraising power, we want to raise $5,000 toward our organizing efforts before the end of the week. That's why I'm asking:

**[Can you chip in $3 to help us meet our $5,000 goal to help demonstrate to the California Democratic Party that we have grassroots strength? subject: I Say Audit Pima County NOW
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Trump is right |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=62d6de00ea&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
My name is Mark Finchem. I am the Election Integrity Conservative leading the charge in Arizona. And today I’m writing you with an important update.
President Trump just released a statement about the terrible fraud in Pima County!

**This is what he said...**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=2261abca70&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=26ffcf7de4&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=295e9798b2&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **The findings that President Trump mentions in this statement are the very findings I was talking about at his Des Moines, Iowa rally!**

One of the key statistics that the President Trump brings up is that he was winning in the middle of the night in Pima up until the truckloads of mail-in votes started showing up.

_And the mail-in votes caused a REVERSAL in the trend proportional exactly to how many mail-in votes that there were. And this only happened in the middle of the night while most everyone was sleeping._

**But it gets worse than that. If we peel back the data, what we see is something that is mathematically IMPOSSIBLE!**
* **The first is that in Pima County, the total number of mail in ballots that were returned was over 100% of what was sent out.**
* **The second is that there were multiple other precincts that had return rates in the high 90’s, when the average was in the 70’s nationwide. Statistical outliers like these are just as much an indicator of fraud as having more ballots returned than sent out to begin with!**

Additionally, the President cites evidence from the Maricopa Audit which I helped lead which absolutely proves that the election should be decertified:
* 6,545 ballots with no envelopes
* 2,580 bad signatures
* 1,919 mail-in ballots without signatures.

**_This is more than the margin of Biden’s so-called “victory!”_**

This is why we need to do two things:

_The first is to Audit Pima County. There is clear evidence of fraud and we cannot let the thieving Democrats get away with this._

_The second is to decertify Arizona’s election and recall the electors. There is sufficient evidence to do so._
[_Will you help me push for the Pima Audit and decertification of Arizona with a donation today?_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=b31fc3b6f4&e=44b8c466b0)
**Make no mistake, there has been substantial progress that has been made in Arizona while I have been leading the Election Integrity movement!**
* **We have demonstrated and proved that there has been substantial election fraud in Maricopa County**
* **We have found statistically accurate results that show that President Trump actually won the election.**
* **Attorney General Mark Brnovich has just recently began to investigate the Maricopa Case, in particular those who fraudulently deleted election files.**
* **We have now gathered tens of thousands of signatures to Audit Pima County**
* **I am meeting with Election Integrity Patriots and Experts from around the country to help them push for audits in their state.**
* **I have worked with third party firms to develop currency-level authentication processes with ballots – a technological innovation that simply has not been seen and we can apply to our elections here in America!**

[_This is a tremendous amount of progress, and none of it happens without your continued support!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=f9014a076f&e=44b8c466b0)

_I have accomplished every single one of these things with your help. And now I am pushing to Audit Pima and Decertify Arizona. [Will you help me take the next step for America with a donation today?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7e09b2bbea&e=44b8c466b0)_
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=ea6c72dbf7&e=44b8c466b0)
God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=eaf7ad5941&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

P.S. I am trying to Audit Pima County. If you support my efforts, [please contribute whatever you can by the end of this month](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=f64585f427&e=44b8c466b0).

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE

# Nothing in life is free.
---
Nothing in life is free. As Democrats are handing out money to buy votes while increasing our national debt, the short and long-term impacts are devastating. But what many don't realize is that inflation disproportionately hurts the poor most of all; it's simply a hidden tax.
We are paying more for goods and services right now, but the long-term view is equally dismal. Those who own assets such as a home may see an increase in price, but it's offset by the devaluation of the dollar. Destroying the purchasing power of the dollar affects us all. Unfortunately, Democrats are creating endless debt, ensuring our children will be forced into economic bondage. This must stop, and I intend to stop it.
---

clean_body: Erik on Democrat spending and the consequences to us | | | | == | | == | Nothing in life is free. Nothing in life is free. As Democrats are handing out money to buy votes while increasing our national debt, the short and long-term impacts are devastating. But what many don't realize is that inflation disproportionately hurts the poor most of all; it's simply a hidden tax. We are paying more for goods and services right now, but the long-term view is equally dismal. Those who own assets such as a home may see an increase in price, but it's offset by the devaluation of the dollar. Destroying the purchasing power of the dollar affects us all. Unfortunately, Democrats are creating endless debt, ensuring our children will be forced into economic bondage. This must stop, and I intend to stop it. | | == | As the next U.S. Senator from Colorado, I will oppose reckless and abusive spending, implementing ways our government can operate more efficiently. Spending reform is the only solution to this perilous situation, as America rushes headlong towards $30 trillion in debt. | | | | You can help in two ways: first, write your current lawmaker opposing the current spending spree. Second, help me go to Washington to fight for you, your children and the future of our country. | == | == PO Box 630552 Littleton, co 80163 (303) 903 1985 | == == == | | | | | | | Aadland For Senate | PO Box 630552, Littleton, CO 80163 | | Sent by mailto:info@aadlandforcolorado.com in collaboration with |

name: Mark Jefferson - Executive Director
subject: The East Coast Democrats are trying to buy Wisconsin, AGAIN
body:
| [ ](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=east_coast_dems_1021_3&n=1) | |
---|---|---
Friend -- The crowded field of liberals lining up to try to take Senator Ron Johnson’s seat are EXTREMELY motivated, as we can see from their latest fundraising reports. The Democrat primary is looking to be a nasty one, and we need to be prepared to take on whoever comes out of the primary. [**_East Coast Democrats are trying to buy our U.S Senate seat next year by continuing to flood the fundraising accounts of Wisconsin Democrat candidates._**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVhf38c8mXRYLf9lqiB0AY9GCCCuPLKtQE-CiuGSRwFbQ&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=east_coast_dems_1021_3&n=2) Here are the highlights from the reports:
* Mandela Barnes had more donations pouring in from New York, California, and Illinois than from Wisconsin;
* Sarah Godlewski and New York trust fund baby Alex Lasry both personally contributed $1 million to help their flailing campaigns;
* Not counting his personal contribution, less than 20% of Alex Lasry’s donations came from Wisconsin.

[**_Friend, are you willing to chip in to ensure that we keep Senator Johnson’s U.S. Senate seat red?_**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVhf38c8mXRYLf9lqiB0AY9GCCCuPLKtQE-CiuGSRwFbQ&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=east_coast_dems_1021_3&n=3) The Democrats don’t care about putting forward quality candidates -- they only care about electing fringe liberals, funded by coastal elites, who will support their far-left agenda. **It’s up to us to ensure these horrific candidates don’t get elected, but we can’t compete with the Democrats’ flood of East Coast money without the help of grassroots supporters like you. Are you able to chip in $25, $50, $100, or even $250 to help fuel our efforts ahead of 2022?** Thanks, Mark Jefferson
Republican Party of Wisconsin **_P.S. Elections in Wisconsin are always a game of inches, and every dollar could mean the difference. We could really use your help, Friend._** | [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVhf38c8mXRYLf9lqiB0AY9GCCCuPLKtQE-CiuGSRwFbQ&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=east_coast_dems_1021_3&n=4 "CONTRIBUTE") [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVhf38c8mXRYLf9lqiB0AY9GCCCuPLKtQE-CiuGSRwFbQ&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=east_coast_dems_1021_3&n=4)
---

Dear Peter,
I'm Holly McCormack and today I'm announcing my candidacy against Marjorie Taylor Greene for Georgia's 14th Congressional District. We are kicking off our campaign today by reaching out to you because we need your support. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc]
I am a mother, small businesswoman, and a community activist. I have lived in this District most of my life and the issues our residents are facing are not addressed with conspiracy theories.
Rush a donation today:
$5.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $50.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $10.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $75.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $25.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $100.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vvydox3IxDY [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vvydox3IxDY]Northwest Georgia is currently represented by someone who parachuted into the District just before the election because she thought it would be an easy win. She likes to make noise and fuel hate while ignoring the needs of those who actually live in our District. That is not who we are ! We need someone from our community who knows our struggles and who can stand up for us to get things done in Congress.
We need a leader who has values and empathy for everyone in her District, not just those with the loudest voices. Let's cut through the noise and get to work.
Check out our Website [http://www.hollyforcongress.org/] , Twitter [https://twitter.com/Holly_4Congress] , and Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/HollyForCongress/] . We have a tough road ahead of us but with your help we can fire Marjorie. Donate $50 today and help me take Northwest Georgia back. I couldn’t do it without you. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc]
In solidarity,
Holly McCormack

Planned Parenthood Action Fund just endorsed Cheri!
#

Huge endorsement news!
Planned Parenthood Action Fund just endorsed Cheri!

North Carolina is going to be at the forefront of the fight for the Senate majority. Mitch McConnell sees this as a must-win state for Republicans, but together, we have the power to stop them and their extreme agenda.
With all that’s at stake, we need a leader who has the experience and vision to flip North Carolina’s Senate seat.
That leader is Cheri Beasley, and it’s why Planned Parenthood Action Fund, End Citizens United // Let America Vote, EMILY’s List, the Congressional Black Caucus PAC, and so many others have backed her. They all understand just how important this race is, and they know Cheri and this people-powered movement are Democrats’ best hope for flipping this seat.
Can Cheri count on you to help us keep up our momentum?
[**Please consider making a $3 donation to our campaign today. Every donation puts us one step closer to turning North Carolina blue and expanding the Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37792262/312615632/-572197399?refcode2=4ffdd126-a132-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211021-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmZkZDEyNi1hMTMyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a_g_n0MRg4hbhWO_TN0vS8xLLyWZ8Tcmdufh-qVk3e0=)

\- Team Beasley

Planned Parenthood Action Fund just endorsed Cheri! = This is a massive deal for Planned Parenthood Action Fund to get involved this early. Reproductive freedom is on the ballot in 2022, and their endorsement sends an absolutely clear message that Cheri is THE candidate who can flip this seat and protect our rights. But Cheri cannot do it alone, so we’re asking for your support too. = North Carolina is going to be at the forefront of the fight for the Senate majority. Mitch McConnell sees this as a must-win state for Republicans, but together, we have the power to stop them and their extreme agenda. With all that’s at stake, we need a leader who has the experience and vision to flip North Carolina’s Senate seat. That leader is Cheri Beasley, and it’s why Planned Parenthood Action Fund, End Citizens United // Let America Vote, EMILY’s List, the Congressional Black Caucus PAC, and so many others have backed her. They all understand just how important this race is, and they know Cheri and this people-powered movement are Democrats’ best hope for flipping this seat. Is there anything we can say to convince you to make a contribution to Mark Kelly’s Senate campaign today?

What if we told you this month is a critical deadline month and we need to hit our goal if we want to have a shot at re-electing Mark?

What if we told you Mark is already facing down millions of dollars in attack ads from special interests who would love to beat him in this race?

And what if we told you that the majority of the donations we need to fight back come in response to emails like this one?

body:
We’re running out of time.
| Peter,
---
If we’re going to win this open Senate seat and FLIP Kamala’s 50-50 Senate majority, we can’t afford to let this latest deficit continue to drag us down.
---
After Facebook’s outages blocked our fundraising ads, our finance team assessed that we lost **__$15.89 every 6 seconds__** that our ads were down.
---
_And we still need to make up another $6,915 if we’re going to have any shot at hitting our end-of-month goal._
---

clean_body: We’re running out of time. | Peter, If we’re going to win this open Senate seat and FLIP Kamala’s 50-50 Senate majority, we can’t afford to let this latest deficit continue to drag us down. After Facebook’s outages blocked our fundraising ads, our finance team assessed that we lost $15.89 every 6 seconds that our ads were down. And we still need to make up another $6,915 if we’re going to have any shot at hitting our end-of-month goal. Thank you, Eric Greitens Navy SEAL Candidate for U.S. Senate (Missouri) \- - - - Forwarded Message - - - - From: Eric Greitens (via mobile) Date: Tues, Oct 19, 2021 Subject: re: We lost thousands To: dpwillis67+greitens@gmail.com Peter, I just spoke with our campaign’s finance director, and I’ll be honest, I’m deeply concerned. We had no idea just how much of an impact this month’s Facebook outages would have on our fundraising. Because our ads were BLOCKED during the outages, we lost THOUSANDS in grassroots contributions from patriots like YOU. As a result, we’ll have to offset a $19,350 deficit before the end-of-month deadline to still meet our October goal to win the OPEN seat needed to END Kamala’s 50-50 Senate majority. Thank you in advance! \- Eric Greitens Paid for by Greitens for U.S. Senate PO Box 989, Chesterfield, MO 63006 Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

name: Roger Marshall
subject: We must stop Biden’s vaccine mandate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KANSANS FOR MARSHALL
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/d207cb560f17ab28/00f5a9fc1abc4671c3d6b838967d376c)
---
# **Friend — Either we stop Biden’s vaccine mandate or face record unemployment. Simple as that.**

---
Airline workers shouldn’t be laid off for refusing a vaccine. Police officers and frontline workers shouldn’t be fired for refusing one. And our military heroes shouldn’t be discharged like felons, either. We _must_ put a stop to this, but it’s going to take ALL of us coming together to say ENOUGH. [**Can I count on you to stand with me against Biden’s vaccine mandate? SIGN your name here if so.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/d207cb560f17ab28/8d684ba2d07e6a79c3d6b838967d376c)
---
[**STOP BIDEN'S MANDATE »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/d207cb560f17ab28/230a5b05da419ad1c3d6b838967d376c)
---
I’ve met with aviation unions and small businesses who could lose up to half of their workforce if this mandate is allowed to stand... in the middle of a supply chain crisis and crippling labor shortages. I’m a veteran and the proud son of a police chief. And it sickens me to see law enforcement and military heroes treated like second-class citizens because they choose not to get a vaccine. I’m also a physician — and my family is fully vaccinated. **But this is a personal choice, and Joe Biden’s mandate is flatly unconstitutional.** **I’m saying ENOUGH, and I’m asking YOU to join me.[SIGN your name here and stand with Kansans and Americans who won’t bend a knee to Joe Biden’s unconstitutional mandates.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/d207cb560f17ab28/d26e28e41e840e57c3d6b838967d376c)**

Senator Roger Marshall

Doc is defending life. He's standing for our jobs, our families, and our faith. **He's taking our Kansas values to the U.S. Senate, but he can't get it done without your help.** We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. The truth is, these emails are the key to keeping our supporters updated on ways they can make a difference. clean_body: | | | Friend — Either we stop Biden’s vaccine mandate or face record unemployment. Simple as that. Airline workers shouldn’t be laid off for refusing a vaccine. Police officers and frontline workers shouldn’t be fired for refusing one. And our military heroes shouldn’t be discharged like felons, either. We must put a stop to this, but it’s going to take ALL of us coming together to say ENOUGH. I’ve met with aviation unions and small businesses who could lose up to half of their workforce if this mandate is allowed to stand... in the middle of a supply chain crisis and crippling labor shortages. I’m a veteran and the proud son of a police chief. And it sickens me to see law enforcement and military heroes treated like second-class citizens because they choose not to get a vaccine. I’m also a physician — and my family is fully vaccinated. But this is a personal choice, and Joe Biden’s mandate is flatly unconstitutional. I’m saying ENOUGH, and I’m asking YOU to join me. Senator Roger Marshall | | | Doc is defending life. He's standing for our jobs, our families, and our faith. He's taking our Kansas values to the U.S. Senate, but he can't get it done without your help. We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. name: Keystone Progress
subject: Let’s get together, have fun, & GOTV. Join us in Erie this Saturday.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
Dear Friend,

We’re co-hosting an exciting and engaging Vote for Justice in PA event this Saturday in Erie to join forces to mobilize the PA vote. Will you join us?

This fundraiser will feature a live musical performance by the Cee Brown Experience, as well as open mic performances by attendees, and talks with local elected officials -- including history-making Erie County Executive candidate Tyler Titus and Erie County Councilman Andre Horton.

Suggested donation levels are $10, $25, $50 and $100. Feel free to provide a donation for the event ahead of time at this link.
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/contribute-to-keystone-progress?refcode=102121]
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/contribute-to-keystone-progress?refcode=102121]

These funds will help co-hosts Keystone Progress [https://www.keystoneprogress.org/] and 1Hood Power [https://www.facebook.com/1HoodPower] build a more progressive future in PA by getting voters out for the upcoming November 2nd General Election. The support will fuel our efforts to get PA voters out to vote in key local elections and county and statewide judicial elections. These elections can make or break our democracy -- in the last presidential election, PA state judges were essential in ensuring the integrity of our votes.

RSVP on Facebook [https://fb.me/e/OMV9UTGR] to join us!

Saturday, October 23 from 2:00 - 4:00 pm

Lavery Brewery, 128 West 12th Street, Erie, PA 16501

We can't wait to see you there!

Keystone Progress

https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/ [https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/]

Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www.kpef.info. Not affiliated with any candidate or candidate's committees.

Keystone Progress Education Fund
PO Box 1206
Harrisburg, PA 17108
United States

name: Mike Johnson
subject: We don’t need parenting advice from the government
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
Why are the domestic terrorists who burned our country and destroyed our cities last year not under investigation—but suddenly concerned parents are?! | [ ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=021319ddf4084a8c97b99171acbf10a8&_e=yVQdAsApjrjrXrq0Ng2hHyr9qR0-a2G60oX3rbkdGamDZSOo_j5j06cmmdKovFKPULEKKS2wb5nitdcx2s3mQT89yt7VAsG7KK7J2knolYTApZrb3cC4EepvFUg3W97gX0KUG1WA--fdXo61WhWcmFVbWSCjdoA2oeRV-AzRQm59qVLwcqEy4t4z1gFNs3rcitK4TojlMTFIF7HzfydpuYWUmVNyAVa72J_W1yOb3ogkmzO_OHp39zvrKSz7ZShes4B_MOWRyNMNL9PfnrvtPGWyhIp-prBApQm3C_cID_H221WBd7BGgucEBuj_NdM1Gc1GbDbZu-T7-LhzSt3BGQfYdTk9rRsf31goADBcpr11-yGdVznbxQfIxPYru865yD6afNl2LmVGnuKGk8WnGOCKsGsyTGdTi5UhN7X1Zh7AYHKx17e3ZThknexrTtsPZeDag0kKnjlWQpDRyGojFu6lOQJaRXWyT552yNnrEitI1T-ztYoZ9pZjrjiVTe60CEGwL88uPoQmczFlr9OVdGUuB6A_2HPhoP2soHqDywaGRoXJKuxaCMsWtoEauawt)

---
Fellow American -

Just when you thought the Biden Administration could not go any lower, now they want to use the full force of the federal government to stop-not anarchists and criminals who burned and pillaged American cities last year- but concerned parents standing up for their children at local school board meetings.

Joe Biden’s power-obsessed Department of Justice wants to crush all dissent and force their radical agenda on our children. They realize that their ideas aren’t popular, so they resort to intimidation and threats, labeling parents as “domestic terrorists” for simply exercising their First Amendment rights.

The parents that Democrats are targeting are American citizens who are deeply concerned about the propaganda and indoctrination being forced in schools across America.

We can’t let up for a moment, because as soon as we do, we know that Republicans will try it all again. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Thanks, Team Cooper | **= = mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign. By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

body:
Your support makes the difference. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37793765/312621841/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjBlZjcwOC1hNzMyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MpXhfU76wGuJ1RbAS_cJgy6N7Lex3cfVWrBOLUnFcA8=)
_“National Republicans see Colorado as a potential pickup in the 2022 midterm elections, when the GOP needs just a one-seat net gain to regain the Senate majority it lost in the 2020 cycle.”_ — _Fox News_ **First:** CNN called Colorado one of the top 10 Senate seats most likely to flip and National Republicans, Rick Scott, and Mitch McConnell raised over $76 million to take back the Senate. **Then:** Fox News and the Colorado GOP called Michael a top target in 2022. **Now:** Eight Colorado Republicans are on the attack against Michael while Mitch McConnell and the National GOP have millions stashed away to flip his seat, including one opponent who’s already blanketing Colorado airwaves with an ad attacking Michael. We knew this race wouldn’t be easy but with attacks coming from all sides and control of the Senate on the line, Michael is counting on grassroots supporters like you. You see, folks, Michael is the only Senator running for re-election who refuses corporate PAC and federal lobbyist money. Michael is fighting to get corporate special interest money out of politics and crack down on dark money. On the other hand, we can expect whoever wins the GOP primary to welcome corporate special interest donations and work with Mitch McConnell to obstruct campaign finance reform and halt all the progress Michael has made for Coloradans. **We’re counting on you, so please pitch in $10 — or whatever you can — to help Michael fend off attacks sent from National Republicans, new opponents, Fox News, and the Colorado GOP. We rely on people like you to power our campaign so anything you can contribute will go a long way.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | **[Donate $10 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37793766/312621842/-699711448?express_lane=true&amount=10&&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211021_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjBlZjcwOC1hNzMyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MpXhfU76wGuJ1RbAS_cJgy6N7Lex3cfVWrBOLUnFcA8=)**

clean_body: Your support makes the difference. | = “National Republicans see Colorado as a potential pickup in the 2022 midterm elections, when the GOP needs just a one-seat net gain to regain the Senate majority it lost in the 2020 cycle.” — Fox News First: CNN called Colorado one of the top 10 Senate seats most likely to flip and National Republicans, Rick Scott, and Mitch McConnell raised over $76 million to take back the Senate. Then: Fox News and the Colorado GOP called Michael a top target in 2022. Now: Eight Colorado Republicans are on the attack against Michael while Mitch McConnell and the National GOP have millions stashed away to flip his seat, including one opponent who’s already blanketing Colorado airwaves with an ad attacking Michael. We knew this race wouldn’t be easy but with attacks coming from all sides and control of the Senate on the line, Michael is counting on grassroots supporters like you. You see, folks, Michael is the only Senator running for re-election who refuses corporate PAC and federal lobbyist money. Michael is fighting to get corporate special interest money out of politics and crack down on dark money. On the other hand, we can expect whoever wins the GOP primary to welcome corporate special interest donations and work with Mitch McConnell to obstruct campaign finance reform and halt all the progress Michael has made for Coloradans. We’re counting on you, so please pitch in $10 — or whatever you can — to help Michael fend off attacks sent from National Republicans, new opponents, Fox News, and the Colorado GOP. We rely on people like you to power our campaign so anything you can contribute will go a long way. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Michael is fully dedicated to extending the expanded Child Tax Credit for years to come, strengthening Colorado’s infrastructure, and protecting Colorado from the effects of climate change. subject: Will you buy us a box, Peter? 📦
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We crunched some numbers.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20211021-3095-header&t=1&akid=3095%2E434096%2EVwcCeA)
We wanted to be sure you saw this, Peter.
**A box of our brand new, union-printed campaign literature just arrived at our office in Pittsburgh.** Take a look! 👀
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33197?refcode=em20211021-3095&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3095%2E434096%2EVwcCeA)
The team is pretty stoked about this. Because a fresh box of campaign flyers like these means our organizers can pass these out + keep spreading the word about John Fetterman's campaign to flip this seat blue and finally be that 51st Democratic vote in the U.S. Senate.
Here's why we're telling you this, Peter:
Each box of campaign literature costs the campaign around $200 bucks. Each box contains 2,500 flyers, give or take a few. **That means, by donating even $10 right now, you'd directly fund roughly 125 new flyers that are a potential entry point to our campaign for a brand new John Fetterman supporter.**
**Now that you've gotten an exclusive look at our brand new, union-printed campaign literature,**[**_will you donate $5 or any amount you can to help fund even more boxes for our organizers? Like we said, $10 = 125 flyers, meaning 125 more opportunities to reach a new voter for John Fetterman for U.S. Senate._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33197?refcode=em20211021-3095&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3095%2E434096%2EVwcCeA)
[$10 = 125](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33203?refcode=em20211021-3095&t=10&akid=3095%2E434096%2EVwcCeA) [$20 = 250](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33204?refcode=em20211021-3095&t=11&akid=3095%2E434096%2EVwcCeA) [$50 = 625](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33205?refcode=em20211021-3095&t=12&akid=3095%2E434096%2EVwcCeA) [$100 = 1,250](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33206?refcode=em20211021-3095&t=13&akid=3095%2E434096%2EVwcCeA) [$200 = 2,500](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33207?refcode=em20211021-3095&t=14&akid=3095%2E434096%2EVwcCeA) [Give another amount](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33197?refcode=em20211021-other-3095&t=15&akid=3095%2E434096%2EVwcCeA)
---
Thanks so much in advance for your support today. If we see enough donations come in through today's email, we'll be able to purchase enough union-printed lit to reach every single one of Pennsylvania's 67 counties. 📦
Yours,
— Team Fetterman HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211021-3095-footer&t=16&refcode2=3095_434096_VwcCeA&akid=3095%2E434096%2EVwcCeA)**

name: Team Nikki
subject: This is ridiculous
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Team,

Today, Governor DeSantis announced that he’s calling a special session to pass a ban on vaccine mandates put in place by private employers.

And that begs the question — with everything going on in our state, why the hell is he calling a special session on this ?

I think I know the answer. Because he’s running for President as Donald Trump Jr. Junior.

Instead of helping Florida workers and families, DeSantis is going to make it harder for private businesses to keep their employees and customers safe.

This is authoritarian government overreach, team, and we deserve better. Click here to chip in $10 or more and support the only person who can defeat Ron DeSantis next year. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-oct-21?refcode=1021session]
Last year, thousands of Floridians were out of work and couldn’t access unemployment benefits for months due to our state’s disastrous unemployment system.

And what did DeSantis do to help them when Democrats called for a special session? Absolutely nothing.

He refused to provide critical relief during the peak of the pandemic, but he’s more than happy to call a session to advance his pro-COVID, conspiracy theorist agenda by imposing new restrictions on private businesses.

DeSantis is damaging our economy and our health. This is an attack on Florida’s tourism industry, an attack on workers, and an attack on businesses large and small.

Help us bring something new to Florida: leadership that’s focused on keeping us safe instead of scoring political points. Chip in $10 right now to support Nikki’s campaign. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-oct-21?refcode=1021session]

Thank you for your support.

— Team Nikki

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States

| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=4f247504dd&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

Have you ever wondered why good leaders like President Trump and Governor DeSantis all hate the media so much?

Mostly, it's because the media lies. President Trump was right; they truly are the "enemy of the people"!

[_That's why real America First leaders like me have to ask for your help- we can't depend on free media. We have to pay to get the truth out!_](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=9b9e9ca80d&e=afa21b7626)

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a Christian and a combat vet [running to take back Florida's 9th district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=68d4b4c659&e=afa21b7626), in the Orlando area. It's currently held by Darren Soto- a Dem media darling!**
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=11b188fc2b&e=afa21b7626)
---
| It used to be that guys like Brian Williams and Dan Rather hid their bias. Now the media is coming on out and celebrating it!

_Reporters from several outlets supported calls to end "both-siderism" in media with even harsher treatment of Republicans after another columnist decried covering Democrats too critically.

Los Angeles Times columnist Jackie Calmes published an opinion piece titled "Why journalists are failing the public with ‘both-siderism’ in political coverage." Calmes, a New York Times reporter before joining the Los Angeles Times, called out "journalistic pressure" to produce seemingly balanced stories that prevents journalists from reporting what she referred to as "the new truth."

She targeted journalists who "focus critically on President Biden and Democrats" as opposed to "Republicans’ obstructions."

Calmes repeatedly criticized Republicans, warning that "democracy is literally at stake" surrounding the GOP’s recent election laws.

"This is a Republican Party that is not serious about governing or addressing the nation's actual problems, as opposed to faux ones like critical race theory," Calmes wrote._

_So, let me get this straight.... idiots like this actually think that, with total Democrat control over the Federal government, the disaster in Afghanistan, runaway inflation, open border humanitarian crisis, empty shelves, and COVID out of control... that it's the REPUBLICANS that need accountability???_

**These people are crazy, high on crack. Biden is a disaster, and they want to coddle him. **

This is why the media has next to no trust from the American people. They are living in an alternate universe. They are not truth-tellers; they are leftist activists.
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=9f3cdf1a22&e=afa21b7626)
---
| _The media is totally out of control. The only way to treat them is with utter contempt- to deny them funding and deny them interviews._

They wouldn't know the truth if it hit them over the head.

[I will go around them to get out the truth about our country.](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=cfe1270ee3&e=afa21b7626) And here's the truth:

-My district is a tossup, trending red.
-I won more votes than any Republican Congressional candidate ever had here.
-Trump really won the 2020 election.
-Biden is destroying the country.
-[I will get this truth out to the voters, with YOUR help!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=3ea45d0e51&e=afa21b7626)

_I will stand up for America against Biden and his media apologists. We can save this country together!_

Help me bring America First policies to Congress! [Help me get elected and put a check on Biden!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=86cf9ab6e0&e=afa21b7626)

[Thank you for your support!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=f85ae15661&e=afa21b7626)
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=fa38466171&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=5a9fbc9666&e=afa21b7626)
---
| P.S. I am in the fight of my life against the Democrat machine here in Florida. [Will you contribute before the end of this month to help me reach my goal?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=6cfe21557f&e=afa21b7626)

name: Erica Smith
subject: Ummm, what?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
I’ve always supported abolishing the filibuster, and I give you my word that I’ll proudly vote YES to end it.
#
**A historic measure to protect and expand the sacred right to vote — the Freedom to Vote Act — failed in the Senate because of a Republican filibuster yesterday afternoon.**
Enough is enough. Despite our Democratic majority, Senate Republicans will continue to use the filibuster to block urgent changes like protecting voting rights and expanding health care.
We need Democrats in the Senate who will fearlessly advocate for real change, and have the political will to do what’s right for our democracy.
**When I’m in the U.S. Senate, it will be my honor to vote to abolish the filibuster once and for all.** But the truth is, we’re up against those who want to maintain the status quo.
**So I’m respectfully asking:** [**With progress *literally* on the line, will you chip in any amount today so we can have the resources to help send me to the U.S. Senate in 2022?**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/23032?refcode=em20211021-567&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=567%2E3698%2Ee2to4j)
**[Donate $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/23032?refcode=em20211021-567&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=567%2E3698%2Ee2to4j)**
The majority of Democrats see the filibuster for what it is: a Jim Crow relic and a racist tool of oppression.
But our primary opponents, like Senators Joe Manchin and Kyrsten Sinema, care more about their corporate donors than doing the right thing for our democracy.
**Our top Democratic opponent in this Senate primary even said that the Senate filibuster “has in many ways benefited Democrats and people in North Carolina.”**
_Ummm, what?_ That is outrageous!
I’ve always supported abolishing the filibuster, and I give you my word that I’ll proudly vote YES to end it.
[**If you’re with me in this fight, will you make your first contribution to our campaign right now? As your Democratic Senator from North Carolina, I will ALWAYS vote on the side of the people.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/23032?refcode=em20211021-567&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=567%2E3698%2Ee2to4j)
Thank you from the bottom of my heart,
Erica

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20211021-567-footer&t=22&refcode2=567_3698_e2to4j&akid=567%2E3698%2Ee2to4j)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=23&akid=567%2E3698%2Ee2to4j)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=567%2E3698%2Ee2to4j)

It's the worst case scenario in Virginia right now - the polls are tied, and Democratic enthusiasm is trailing the frenzied Republicans. Extreme, national right-wing special interests are pouring money into the state. First _Americans For Prosperity_ spent $191,159 opposing educator Debra Gardner, now it's the _Home School Legal Defense Association_ funneling $184,016 into Virginia in just the last 6 days! Just today, we got word that another right-wing group is targeting two of our educators, spending:
* $5,504 attacking teacher Shelly Simmonds
* $6,680 attacking teacher Kelly Fowler

If we lose both those races, Democrats in Virginia are toast and Republicans will have gained a majority in the House. We're sending $15,000 this week to help increase the number of Democratic educators elected in Virginia, but we know we need to do more. [Give today and your contribution will go to all five educators in competitive elections and to EEE's efforts to aid their campaigns. ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37794492/312627449/-727790733?refcode=email_fr_20211021vapm_E3__ln1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1NzI0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcwOTg2YmY3LWE5MzItZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WEp52HUaoQj3GL6z4wThMxxWbSD9zjyz9a2bOmgHP1g=)

name: Derek Kilmer
subject: Worried about the future of our country? Don't skip this email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter, if you're worried about the future of our country, our economy, and our environment, then don't skip this email.

Right now, we're working on infrastructure and spending negotiations in Congress, and it's all part of enacting President Biden's Build Back Better Agenda. I'm fighting to make sure the final version of the Build Back Better legislation includes investments to ensure families have affordable health care and child care, investments to protect our environment and combat the climate crisis, and investments to further support our economic recovery.

I can't overstate the importance of enacting the Build Back Better Agenda. It's a recognition that we can't just go back to the way things were "pre-pandemic," but rather that we need a "new normal." Our new normal needs to ensure that workers don't have to choose between their health and their paycheck. It needs to help families so they can afford child care and health care. It needs to protect our environment and ensure we have economic growth that doesn't leave families and communities behind. **Now is the time to get this done, and that 's what I am fighting to do.**

**[I won't stop until Congress has secured the investments hardworking Americans deserve in health care, child care, our environment, and our economy. Will you sign on now to show you support the Build Back Better Agenda?](https://act.myngp.com/el/xokSNWTx-VTSr7LJBt-iie6g7u3rsCX5IMhCcm_mNoQ=/cgA6gWcdEg4_UUNz9XFltttD4vkYUdRS4ROpYhAqHTg=?ms=em21_211021_InfBBB_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&refcode=em21_211021_InfBBB_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&source=em21_211021_InfBBB_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211021_InfBBB_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata={{ContactData}}
)**

More updates to come, Peter.

It's an honor to represent you,

Derek

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/xokSNWTx-VTSr7LJBt-iie6g7u3rsCX5IMhCcm_mNoQ=/E8EcitF-PCHrrpOejX135kF2zInKWOt9c66e-VbZd-Q=?refcode=em21_211021_InfBBB_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211021_InfBBB_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email)

name: Adem Bunkeddeko
subject: Autumn's Beginning
body:
Peter,

I hope this note finds you well as the leaves are getting ready to turn in Brooklyn!

As the fall season begins, change is all around us here in New York City. We have a new Governor and we'll have a new Mayor in short order. Both of whom will have much to do in the months and years ahead.

At Coro NYC, we've just wrapped up a strategic planning process. As Coro's Executive Director, it was incredible for me to hear from alumni, staff, board members, and various stakeholders about where the organization has been, where it is now, and where we should go. The energy from those conversations inspires me as I look ahead to what we can do together to build a better and stronger version of Coro to positively impact New York.

In the days, weeks, and months ahead, I’ll be filling you in on the work I’ll be doing to continue to support our community, Coro, and beyond.

With gratitude,
Adem

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

subject: Don’t miss this
body:
I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD b
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zs899paeo5dq4akh4quq8co03alo5egdartirk00_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf9d31chrr2c70m1i75dpm6koj9cbhecprctjn65qm9pjlegor6t30e1imddbgmurt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0eaq6cdj76mpmfchhcoq61cj26pp238h1e8he4933cpgm1ob3c5i60oh5u)
| | | This sponsored message from GOP Presidential is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zaf8fce3ae8fjc4h2f5euu8t7kikd6ntug5clp78_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c3gm6ob4c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American, [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqnu7c6opql7aroekknv4h9mfmkvsnefbfe9fij0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c3gm6ob4c1h2bs) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3nu9smncsjgcvauttq20fd3lo92j63q4pm5l5q8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c3gm6ob4c1h2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844
---

name: Marco Rubio
subject: Sitting down to write you some tough news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
This is difficult for me to write. I just can’t believe that there is more support for a Trump Impeachment Manager than for
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
I can’t believe that there is more support for a Trump Impeachment Manager than for a strong Conservative leader.
|
---
| | | Friend,

This is difficult for me to write.

I just can't believe that there is more support for a Trump Impeachment Manager than for a strong Conservative leader.

Even after extending my Mid-Month deadline, we are still not on track to reach our goal. To be honest, we are about 3,000 donations behind our target.

My entire team is calling, texting, emailing and writing as many patriots as possible in an effort to activate 3,000 donors in the next 48 hours, but I'm afraid it won't be enough.

Friend, these goals aren't arbitrary. These are REAL goals and REAL numbers that we REALLY need to hit in order to have a shot at competing with the Democratic movement in Florida.

_I 'm pleading with you, even if it is $8...will you donate today? Maybe people think they need to write huge checks in order to make a difference but that's just not true. I need people who can donate $8, $10, $12.55 or even $17 TODAY in order to reach my goal. _

I know you hear from my team and me a lot, but this is critical. We are on the brink of losing Trump's home state to someone who votes with the Socialist Squad 94% of the time. I hope you understand how deeply concerning that is.

---
Here is a special link my team put together for you. I hope to see your name on the donor list:

**[https://secure.winred.com/link-for-Friend-October2021](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9jthlf6d3us94m3do2u6vvt9hu99v2hsc96hp8g_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c3gm6ob4clh2bs "https://secure.winred.com/link-for-Friend-October2021")**
---

With urgency,
Marco
---
| |
* * *
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zc4k6no5bk7ovpj31916p74mds5ju16c898c3ueg_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c3gm6ob4clh2bs "MarcoRubioFooter")
---
| _Personal note from Marco Rubio:_

Friend, thank you for standing with me and having my back every step of the way. But I need you to stand with me once again.

Fox News said my race could be the most expensive ever, CNN said my race was even MORE likely to flip blue, and now my opponent has outraised me. I need each and every patriot who receives this to join me in the fight to take back the Senate.

If you stand with me, **[please click here to donate now](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zn0ba484j05q76f2122qsg204ge522u687c0aqpg_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c3gm6ob4clh2bs "please click here to donate now")**.

Thank you for everything you do,

Marco Rubio

I just can't believe that there is more support for a Trump Impeachment Manager than for a strong Conservative leader. Even after extending my Mid-Month deadline, we are still not on track to reach our goal. To be honest, we are about 3,000 donations behind our target. My entire team is calling, texting, emailing and writing as many patriots as possible in an effort to activate 3,000 donors in the next 48 hours, but I'm afraid it won't be enough. Friend, these goals aren't arbitrary. These are REAL goals and REAL numbers that we REALLY need to hit in order to have a shot at competing with the Democratic movement in Florida. I 'm pleading with you, even if it is $8...will you donate today? Maybe people think they need to write huge checks in order to make a difference but that's just not true. I need people who can donate $8, $10, $12.55 or even $17 TODAY in order to reach my goal. I know you hear from my team and me a lot, but this is critical.
