name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: this is serious, team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Tonight’s deadline is a big one | | |
---
Friend, I’m running against an extreme, Trump-backed culture warrior. I know you understand how serious the Virginia governor’s race is for Virginia and America’s future. _**That’s why I’m so stunned that we haven’t gotten more support to hit our fundraising goal tonight!**_ Let me remind you why this goal is so important, team. We are less than 2 weeks away from Election Day, and polling shows a tied race. The final filing deadline of the campaign is TONIGHT, and we have to reach our goal to have the resources we need for the campaign homestretch. **[Please, split a donation of any amount right now between my campaign and Maggie Hassan's before midnight tonight to power this campaign through the finish line:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37794909/312630339/1415752491?refcode=e20211021_trm-split2-a&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzI5YTIwNi1hYzMyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hukXen6ah47F_StMUO5U1_zdKQMQeqdN0QQR-1fZvBU=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37794910/312630340/1415752491?refcode=e20211021_trm-split2-a&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzI5YTIwNi1hYzMyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hukXen6ah47F_StMUO5U1_zdKQMQeqdN0QQR-1fZvBU=)
---
[Contribute $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37794911/312630341/1415752491?refcode=e20211021_trm-split2-a&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzI5YTIwNi1hYzMyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hukXen6ah47F_StMUO5U1_zdKQMQeqdN0QQR-1fZvBU=)
[Contribute $50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37794912/312630342/1415752491?refcode=e20211021_trm-split2-a&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzI5YTIwNi1hYzMyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hukXen6ah47F_StMUO5U1_zdKQMQeqdN0QQR-1fZvBU=)
[Another amount](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37794916/312630344/1415752491?refcode=e20211021_trm-split2-a&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzI5YTIwNi1hYzMyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hukXen6ah47F_StMUO5U1_zdKQMQeqdN0QQR-1fZvBU=)
I really can’t overstate the importance of your support, friend.
Every dollar we raise helps us reach one more voter with our positive message for Virginia's future — and in a race this close, every single vote makes a huge difference.
Polls show a lot of Virginia voters are still undecided, so we need your help to keep our ads on the air and our organizing team on the doors.
**[Right now, will you split a donation to help fund our voter mobilization efforts before midnight tonight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37794921/312630350/1415752491?refcode=e20211021_trm-split2-a&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzI5YTIwNi1hYzMyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hukXen6ah47F_StMUO5U1_zdKQMQeqdN0QQR-1fZvBU=)**
Thank you for everything,
Terry McAuliffe

name: Heidi St. John for Congress
subject: Dr. Dobson Supports Heidi. Do You?
body:
The country is waking up!
---
| | | | | |
---
| Friends,
People are waking up to what is happening in this country. Our families are under attack. Children are being taught graphic sex classes in elementary school, that our country is racist, and that there are more than two genders.
This has got to stop.
That's why I am so honored to have received the endorsement from Dr. James Dobson. For decades he has been advocating for parents and the protection of children's minds and so have I.
---
| "I am honored to endorse Heidi St. John for Congress, and pray that her election will be the start of a new generation of leaders who will return this nation to the constitutional principles on which it was founded." ~Dr. James Dobson
---
| He supports me in my run for Congress because freedom and families are worth fighting for. I'm counting on your support as well.

For decades he has been advocating for parents and the protection of children's minds and so have I. | "I am honored to endorse Heidi St. John for Congress, and pray that her election will be the start of a new generation of leaders who will return this nation to the constitutional principles on which it was founded." ~Dr. James Dobson | He supports me in my run for Congress because freedom and families are worth fighting for. I'm counting on your support as well. | For Liberty! | | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | | Find Heidi's upcoming events online at == | | | | == | America's Town Hall Today we're going to tackle the topic of limited government. Should the federal government be able to limit the personal property rights of individuals? == | | == | | == | | | | | == | == == | | | | | Friends of Heidi St. John for Congress | PO Box 2828, Battle Ground, WA 98604 | | Sent by mailto:info@heidistjohnforcongress.com powered by

body:
Our next move decides whether Republicans win or lose. Our next move decides whether Republicans win or lose.

|
---
| | | **URGENT: REPUBLICANS LACK THE RESOURCES NEEDED TO FUND THEIR VICTORY IN VIRGINIA**
Peter, this is dire. We just got word from Virginia that polling shows the Gubernatorial Election is NECK-AND-NECK.

That's right. Republicans are not only still in this, but we have a real shot at making history by flipping Virginia from **BLUE to RED**.

**But right now, we don 't have funds to bring us over the finish line. [Will you help us get across the finish line?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58583001:67n2CW2NZ:m:1:3253819041:1DCA5F2E43A8C6FC128C4A94D10F74E1:r "Will you help us get across the finish line?") **
** HOUSE GOP BLUE TO RED FUND:**
---
| | | [CHIP IN NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58583001:67n2CW2NZ:m:1:3253819041:1DCA5F2E43A8C6FC128C4A94D10F74E1:r "CHIP IN NOW")
---
The Democrats know that a Republican win in this election is critical to our plan to restore our Conservative majority in Congress. It sets the stage for what is to come. **If we lose on November 2nd, we will continue to lose all the way through the 2022 midterm elections..._maybe even longer!_**

We can change the course of history, but we can't do it without the help of our grassroots supporters. **[Will you join the fight to defy history?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58583001:67n2CW2NZ:m:1:3253819041:1DCA5F2E43A8C6FC128C4A94D10F74E1:r "Will you join the
fight to defy history?")**
**HOUSE GOP BLUE TO RED FUND:**
---
| | | [CHIP IN NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58583001:67n2CW2NZ:m:1:3253819041:1DCA5F2E43A8C6FC128C4A94D10F74E1:r "CHIP IN NOW")
---
I won't sugarcoat it, Peter. The Far Left has dumped THOUSANDS UPON THOUSANDS of dark money dollars given from ultra liberal mega donors to keep this seat in the hands of the Radical Left.

And with less than two weeks until the November 2nd Gubernatorial Election, I worry we won't be able to catch up and take out the Democrats once and for all. **[Can you help us?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58583001:67n2CW2NZ:m:1:3253819041:1DCA5F2E43A8C6FC128C4A94D10F74E1:r "Can you help
us?")**
**HOUSE GOP BLUE TO RED FUND:**
---
| | | [CHIP IN NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58583001:67n2CW2NZ:m:1:3253819041:1DCA5F2E43A8C6FC128C4A94D10F74E1:r "CHIP IN NOW")
---
The countdown is on, and we're rapidly running out of time. **[Please, help us take back Virginia and take back our country.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58583001:67n2CW2NZ:m:1:3253819041:1DCA5F2E43A8C6FC128C4A94D10F74E1:r "Please, help us take back Virginia and take back our country. ")**

To victory,

GOP Elections Fund (via House Conservatives)

**ATTN TRUMP PATRIOTS: TRUMP 'S 2024 RUN HINGES ON FLIPPING 5 SEATS RED!**

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. She's determined to ERASE Trump's legacy and OBLITERATE his allies in Congress... _because she knows if we TAKE BACK THE HOUSE, Trump will run for PRESIDENT!_

We're facing an uphill battle. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER. **[Peter, can we count on you to step up?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58583002:67n2CW2NZ:m:1:3253819041:1DCA5F2E43A8C6FC128C4A94D10F74E1:r "Peter, can

Peter,

I’m proud to report to you that after 5 months of hard work, the National Republican Congressional Committee has chosen me as one of their inaugural members of the 2022 “**Young Guns** ” program.

My campaign certainly wouldn’t be in the strong position we’re in now without your financial help. It’s pretty amazing what can be accomplished when we all have a vested interest in flipping the House Republican.

As you might recall, the Young Guns program highlights and showcases candidates in competitive congressional districts, like Oregon’s 4th District, and serves to provide a framework to promising Republican candidates nationwide on how to forge a clear path to victory.

**9,060**

**I have 9,060 people to thank for helping me reach this milestone so early in the election cycle**. 9,060 conservatives saw the potential we have to oust the 4th longest serving member of Congress. Let me just say to each of you reading this now who has made a donation to my campaign: your contribution is appreciate and it certainly will be used efficiently.

Last year when I ran, we weren’t on the NRCC’s radar until January. Needless to say, this is an honor.

**$43.22**

The average donation from May 1st to today is $43.22 – so you see, it doesn’t take a donation that breaks the bank to put a campaign like mine on the firm footing we’re on right now. It’s small, **[incremental donations of $50 here or $25 there](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=96e0d34012f149de8b63257bb6da8258&_e=FULR95PSY9L_pTiyMJZQ673o0-OZufVMIjCdwYtgFbWOEor9qbGft5NyCECS_LnLGuKGqEm1IjVFxpGEGNxncNlJiTXN2IFZl4zPFUqgtrv-6iWB4QIjEgbd2zFq-MBwszgQ1qPQB_ASeooUKMZQu4KVa1SS05pKzYzfJE8ZQW43UTGxpVNAXGPE74K2CFK5NaqwUllvGjdK0c6X9RHDVSEJ-7FkgFNZPXia09h8TG4yB_8B2Qvs1JTUG-MKfZS84FW6zrchrXDMOLBqOSEQnenk6vy0UkJW-7Ve_2eyui8pofzHE0nLM2cxReZZPCOscztVYmgkTMi2E613KpQzn67JTL0GGJLzMVQIWgKAo6Hy46-PsSrh6avHifT2SE1wvtqHZPGGpDZCpMhAozGJE0GcIexZ3CTsPJPu59oFhAZnTkqTLCp82RLcOzZm-pQ6)**. I’ve written in emails to you before, but it’s so true: a little goes a very long way.

**1.96**

That’s the average times a donor contributed! Nearly everyone whose made a contribution to my campaign this year has done so more than once. I’m humbled. That speaks volumes to me and tells me how committed you are to seeing a strong class of conservatives retake the House majority.

If you’re reading this today and have yet to make a contribution, I’m asking you to make your first donation today. subject: Republicans made a choice to not protect our democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#

Friend,
Yesterday, Republicans blocked the Freedom to Vote Act, and made the choice to not protect the integrity of our democracy.
This transformative legislation protects our election system, expands access to the ballot box, and ensures every American can request mail-in ballots, register to vote on Election Day, and fairly participate in our electoral process.
Republicans made it clear that they’re not concerned with saving our democracy — so Democrats will have to do it alone, but we won’t get very far if Republicans continue weaponizing the filibuster to obstruct progressive legislation.
**[Please add your name next to mine if you agree that we can no longer allow Republicans to stand in the way of Congress passing critical legislation. It’s time for the Senate to abolish the filibuster so we can get things done in Washington.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37796542/312637119/363524726?refcode=AU_MLJ_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20211021_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTU3NjZlOS1iMjMyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=--dei2yMp9NLuSx33Dw24lRqPirRbcHoWxZXE7MiMJw=&emci=9d6413db-b232-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=395766e9-b232-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=24719896)**
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37796543/312637120/363524726?refcode=AU_MLJ_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20211021_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTU3NjZlOS1iMjMyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=--dei2yMp9NLuSx33Dw24lRqPirRbcHoWxZXE7MiMJw=&emci=9d6413db-b232-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=395766e9-b232-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=24719896)**
We’ve seen numerous threats to our democracy as Republican-controlled state legislatures pass stricter voter ID laws, remove ballot drop boxes from primarily Black and brown districts, and use partisan gerrymandering to manipulate the outcome of elections.
Only a few generations ago, my grandparents grew up in Jim Crow Virginia where similar tactics were used to infringe on their basic civil rights.
The assaults on our democracy are only getting worse. Now is not the time to go backward.
**[Join me in urging the Senate to take immediate action and abolish the filibuster.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37796544/312637121/363524726?refcode=AU_MLJ_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20211021_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTU3NjZlOS1iMjMyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=--dei2yMp9NLuSx33Dw24lRqPirRbcHoWxZXE7MiMJw=&emci=9d6413db-b232-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=395766e9-b232-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=24719896)**
There’s too much on the line for us to sit back and do nothing. We can’t let Republicans continue to attack our democracy.
Thank you for standing with me,
Mondaire Jones

Donald Trump’s hand-picked candidate is knocking on the Governor’s office door, the Virginia legislature could flip red, and Democratic enthusiasm is at an all time low.

name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: Read this. It’s really important.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37796574/312637315/-2023814932?refcode=20211021.75_TM_10CQR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTE1YmZkOS1iMTMyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SEmuyHzlKBuEKEScR-LOcpOMC60vQfA9jW-O8HupI34=)

| | Let me lay it out for you, Derek: **this is the most important election in the country this year. Virginia is a must win for Democrats.**

For the last decade, Virginia Democrats have led the nation by delivering victory after victory for working families.

But now, our progress is under attack. If my opponent Glenn Youngkin becomes Virginia’s governor, he’ll roll back every inch we fought so hard for.

And right now, **Youngkin winning is a real possibility.** A new Monmouth poll shows this race is TIED 46-46, we’re being outraised, and initial reports show diminishing enthusiasm amongst Democrats.

**That’s why I set this goal to reach 300,000 contributions online by midnight, Derek:** we’ve got to raise enough money to fund our massive voter turnout operation, _and we won’t have much time to make up ground if we miss._

_**[So right now, will you chip in to my campaign? Tonight is the FINAL filing deadline of this campaign, so I need all hands on deck to reach tonight’s goal. Plus, if you chip in today, your contribution will be matched.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37796575/312637316/-2023814932?refcode=20211021.75_TM_10CQR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTE1YmZkOS1iMTMyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SEmuyHzlKBuEKEScR-LOcpOMC60vQfA9jW-O8HupI34=)**_

Derek, Donald Trump wants to use this election as the launchpad for his 2024 campaign — and Glenn Youngkin has already said he supports four more years of Donald Trump.

If a Trump-wannabe like Youngkin can win in Virginia, a guy like him can win anywhere. We have to send the message that we’re ready to end Trumpism in this country once and for all.

_**[With stakes this high, we can’t afford to miss even one fundraising benchmark. So please, chip in whatever you can right now, and your donation will be matched, dollar for dollar.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37796576/312637317/-2023814932?refcode=20211021.75_TM_10CQR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTE1YmZkOS1iMTMyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SEmuyHzlKBuEKEScR-LOcpOMC60vQfA9jW-O8HupI34=)**_

Thank you,

Terry McAuliffe | **[DONATE>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37796577/312637318/-2023814932?refcode=20211021.75_TM_10CQR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTE1YmZkOS1iMTMyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SEmuyHzlKBuEKEScR-LOcpOMC60vQfA9jW-O8HupI34=)**

**_But the truth is: I 'm not a dead man walking, because thousands of patriots like you have defended me from this unjust assault on my life and my freedom._**

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Republicans just filibustered voting rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=W2T6a87w%2Fyz7ucDEawRd7nLpU1vp%2B2%2Fq&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
Earlier this week, the Senate voted on the Freedom to Vote Act, a bold and urgent piece of legislation that would strengthen voting rights and counter the GOP-led voter suppression that's happening across the country.
**At perhaps one of the most pressing moments for American democracy, the legislation failed to pass. Mitch McConnell used the filibuster, and not a single Republican senator joined Democrats to bolster our most basic democratic freedom.**
We are living through the consequences of Republican obstruction in real time: The Supreme Court's conservative majority already dealt a death blow to the Voting Rights Act of 1965, and in 2021 alone, Republicans have introduced more than 425 bills with restrictive voting provisions in 49 states. Our fundamental right to vote is under a coordinated, widespread, and effective attack from the Republican Party - and we won't be able to stop their voter suppression unless we eliminate the filibuster.
Friend, the U.S. Senate is often described as the world's greatest deliberative body. It's the embodiment of democracy in our country, and really, the rest of the world. **But if the world 's most deliberative body is hamstrung from protecting the very democracy it exists to uphold, it's no longer working properly. We must reclaim our cherished democratic institution by getting rid of the filibuster once and for all.**
I know you've spoken out on this issue before, but in the face of Senate Republicans filibustering legislation that would stop voter suppression, it is beyond urgent that this team speaks out again - and as often as it takes - until the filibuster is a relic of the past. **So please, will you be one of the 650 signers I need on my petition before midnight tonight? I 'm counting on you:**
[Add your name to support eliminating the filibuster to protect voting rights.](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-0721voting?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&code=jtk1085-su-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)
The soul of the Republican Party has been lost to extremism, and the filibuster is the most effective tactic they have to ensure that the minority of our nation rules _through_ that extremism. For the sake of our democracy, the filibuster must be eliminated. Thank you for joining me in this fight.
Dick
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=BJRmbeyz%2F3mi3G1KOCNUu3LpU1vp%2B2%2Fq&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

name: Great America Update
subject: Your 2021 Second Amendment Survey
body:
The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation’s history and undermine our Constitution [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c401%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=ik8DGX9Wc6A9W3iPbUdBhQ&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66274%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2feCFj%2fhwNLPHwRnEU0YpMA&sysid=1) Dear Friend of the Constitution, The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation’s history and undermine our Constitution--with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment. Today, you’re receiving Hillsdale College’s **Second Amendment Survey** because you’re someone who understands that education is essential to the defense of liberty. We are reaching and teaching millions of Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding. Could you take a few minutes to complete our **Second Amendment Survey** using the secure link below? **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66285%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zpbOaPe4GBmVcwfgT0czNA&sysid=1 "https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/")** Your timely survey answers will help us reach and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year about the importance of liberty--which includes the rights protected by the Second Amendment. There is no question that one of the Left’s most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is **ignorance**. Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in 1844. Today our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment. As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: “The Second Amendment is an expression of **first principles**.” This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom. This kind of thinking is foreign to most college and university campuses today, where “safe spaces” are now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here’s an example... Not long ago, the University of Virginia canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day. Why? The administration was concerned that firing guns in honor of those who served their country and did their part to defend our freedom would cause “panic” among the student body. Unfortunately, there are many more such examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the ongoing decline in civics education in America. **But instead of just TALKING, it’s more important to DO something about it.** That’s why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. And this work continues today. That’s why I would like your answers to our brief **Second Amendment Survey.** You can complete the survey today at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66285%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zpbOaPe4GBmVcwfgT0czNA&sysid=1)** We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, “Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction.” Do you agree? I hope so. This is why we **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It’s also why we need your help today. As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. It also means your gift really matters. **Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve liberty --including the Second Amendment--for future generations.** After completing your **Second Amendment Survey** , please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today. And, when you give a $100 gift or more, we’ll send you a special, limited-edition Hillsdale College hat as our thank you. This hat commemorates our partnership with USA Shooting, the organization dedicated to preparing the best American shooters to represent our country in the Olympics and Paralympics. But hurry--supplies are limited! Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed **Second Amendment Survey.** Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
**P.S.** Our Constitution--including the Second Amendment--is under attack today. Do you agree? Then please take our **Second Amendment Survey** at the secure link below. It will only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve liberty for future generations. Thank you! **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66285%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zpbOaPe4GBmVcwfgT0czNA&sysid=1)**
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c401%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=ik8DGX9Wc6A9W3iPbUdBhQ&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c401%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=ik8DGX9Wc6A9W3iPbUdBhQ&sysid=1)

name: Drew Thompson
subject: Timken, Tailgate, Trump!
body:
3 Days Away! [](https://) **Join Jane and the team before all the action kicks off!** Peter, In 3 days, Jane Timken will grab the mic at the Center for Christian Virtue Forum in Westerville to advocate for an America First agenda here in Ohio. As the only candidate in the race that has been endorsed by President Trump in the past, and delivered the Buckeye state for him in 2020, the choice is crystal clear. It is up to us to make sure that this U.S. Senate seat is not stolen by any phony, never Trump candidates, or anyone who has quit on our state before. For the first time, central Ohio will get a chance to hear from all the candidates on the same stage, and we need your help... name: Self Reliance Central
subject: Be one of the first
body:
I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD b
| | | This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z1qvi270eq5kfic4n0gote48692afb096b23sljo_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c3im8o74c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zo513crrs92o8evde3j3nfdj273nohirqm5dn3e8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c3im8o74c5h2bs) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zoktolvjdujnbmq35co2fqur8bgrt7flvfhio7o8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c3im8o74c5h2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844

body:
In 12 days, we find out if our great Commonwealth will continue down a dark path [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c404%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=813cmRygZtvtiK9w1AuKyA&sysid=1)

---
Friend,

**[12 DAYS UNTIL THE BIGGEST GOVERNOR ELECTION IN VIRGINIA’S MODERN HISTORY.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66289%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DGjCaN1xtsiRgcXjkJc3gA&sysid=1)**

In 12 days, we find out if our great Commonwealth will continue down a dark path towards government overregulation, if our school curriculum will be controlled by liberal special interests, and if our great Commonwealth will be governed by a businessman like Glenn or a lying career politician like Terry.

In 12 days, so much is at stake -- it is hard for us to even put into words.

_**If you’ve never been political before, THIS is the time to care about politics. This is the time to call your friends and get your friends to care about politics.**_

Because in 12 days, our freedoms as Virginians are more in jeopardy than ever before.

Terrible Terry isn’t just a nickname -- **it’s a reality.** His failure to lead will hold us back the next four years.

**[This is why we are unlocking 5X MATCHING FOR 12 days:](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66280%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=w3yqDdgyFdRrxXp2JZzMfw&sysid=1)**
**[12 DAYS LEFT](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66281%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GGZfkMsASTWNMbRTs7zD%2fQ&sysid=1) ** **SO MUCH IS ON THE LINE** | | [**$25 = $125 TO TAKE OUT TERRY**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66282%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZWCZdJmfUNZkMeKZ2qjBWQ&sysid=1)
---
**[This is a time for choosing: Virginians must make a critical choice for the future of our Commonwealth and for America.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66283%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mUNnvhs9tciwaCuGTXstGw&sysid=1)**

Thank you for everything,

Team Youngkin

The only way to bring effective representation to Congress is by working together with a coalition of leaders at every level of government. = We’re 12 days away from Election Day, and we need all the help we can get! = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Shontel has already used the power of coalition building to successfully create change in Ohio. Now, she’s bringing our fight to Congress. Together, Shontel Brown for Congress As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent that last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. As the next Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District, she will fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and equity and justice for all. name: Glenn Youngkin
subject: My election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
| | There isn't much time left, so I'll make this quick.

Virginians have already begun casting their ballots and there are just 12 days left until Election Day.

If Clinton-ally Terry McAuliffe wins this race, there will be dire consequences for Virginia. He's bad on crime, bad for our economy, and bad for our schools.

If I'm elected, on day one I'll cut exploding costs for families, defend our police instead of defunding them, jumpstart job growth, and ban Critical Race Theory.

_**[If you have anything to spare, I'm asking you to step up today to help me and other strong conservatives win our elections.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58583952:J5R8lW2Nw:m:1:3298722022:65A547E89E625514B218CDFF01EF7CAA:r "If you have anything to spare, I’m asking you to step up today to help me and other strong conservatives win our elections.")**_

---
| | | [CONTRIBUTE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58583952:J5R8lW2Nw:m:1:3298722022:65A547E89E625514B218CDFF01EF7CAA:r)
---

All eyes are on Virginia. The results of this election will be used as a guide map for what could follow in next year's midterms.

If Republicans _win_ , it will be a huge blow to the Democrats' hopes of holding onto their majority. But if Republicans _lose_ , Democrats will leverage our loss for their own gain.

We _can_ win. In fact, the latest polls have me and McAuliffe neck-and-neck.

**This race will come down to the final get-out-the-vote efforts.** Every single dollar could impact how many more doors we can knock, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach.

_**[So, can I please count on you to pitch in anything you're able ASAP, even if it's just $1?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58583952:J5R8lW2Nw:m:1:3298722022:65A547E89E625514B218CDFF01EF7CAA:r "So, can I please count on you to pitch in anything you’re able ASAP, even if it’s just $1?")**_

Thank you in advance for your generous support.

Sincerely,

Glenn Youngkin

| | | [CONTRIBUTE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58583952:J5R8lW2Nw:m:1:3298722022:65A547E89E625514B218CDFF01EF7CAA:r)

Image")
---
_**EXCLUSIVE MESSAGE FROM NIKKI HALEY:**_

I'm focused on helping Republicans win the next election and I want YOU to play an important part. This is a great opportunity to support political leaders who believe America is inherently good, and who understand that the Democrats' far-left policies undermine our freedoms and American values.

Please help me fight back against the Democrats and their radical agenda. We can only defeat them if we stand united.

**[Will you join my team today?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58583953:J5R8lW2Nw:m:1:3298722022:65A547E89E625514B218CDFF01EF7CAA:r "Will you join my team today?")**

name: Tom Nelson
subject: A win for labor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin**
body:
---
| | One year ago today, 89 machinists were on strike for affordable health care at Asten Johnson in Appleton, Wisconsin. These members of the International Association of Machinists and Aerospace Workers (IAMAW) Local 1855 are vital members of our paper industry, and deserve the dignity of insurance coverage.

[Chip in now if you agree that Wisconsin should have a Senator who will stand with workers, not corporate donors!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37797678/312642198/422549536?amount=10&refcode=TN_EM_FR_1MO_211021_1_1&refcode2=0fb340d4-b832-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmIzNDBkNC1iODMyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=36BGhZ_gI-mUuBNSj14SdS58iOem_R6rMTbLtGTQ-X4=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37797679/312642199/422549536?amount=10&refcode=TN_EM_FR_1MO_211021_1_1&refcode2=0fb340d4-b832-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmIzNDBkNC1iODMyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=36BGhZ_gI-mUuBNSj14SdS58iOem_R6rMTbLtGTQ-X4=)
Facebook: Lee Snodgrass
**I was proud to stand with them on the picket line, fighting for what’s right:**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37797680/312642200/422549536?amount=10&refcode=TN_EM_FR_1MO_211021_1_1&refcode2=0fb340d4-b832-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmIzNDBkNC1iODMyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=36BGhZ_gI-mUuBNSj14SdS58iOem_R6rMTbLtGTQ-X4=)
When workers stand together and are given a voice, **they win**. After a week-long strike, they were able to negotiate a greatly improved contract, securing better health insurance during the height of the pandemic.

**Standing with workers is not new to me and I have the track record to prove it. I’ve done it my entire career and I will continue to do so in the U.S. Senate. Wisconsin workers and manufacturing have been neglected for far too long.** [Please, contribute today to help our people-powered movement →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37797681/312642201/422549536?amount=10&refcode=TN_EM_FR_1MO_211021_1_1&refcode2=0fb340d4-b832-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmIzNDBkNC1iODMyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=36BGhZ_gI-mUuBNSj14SdS58iOem_R6rMTbLtGTQ-X4=)

For far too long, Washington elites have ignored the needs of working class American families. Unfair trade agreements and Ron Johnson’s tax policy have made it easier to ship our jobs overseas by the same people who spend their weekends on multi-million dollar yachts.

Once I’m in office, I can promise you this: I will use every bit of my power to fight for **YOU** , not for the top 1%. I refuse to take any money from Wall Street and Big Business because I won’t let my beliefs be swayed by a check – I know how hard it is to deal with these issues, which is why I’m determined to fix them in Congress.

**Because I’m not taking money from rich mega donors and corporations, I am depending on grassroots efforts to succeed.** [If you can, join our team today by donating to help bring change to Washington D.C. →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37797682/312642202/422549536?amount=10&refcode=TN_EM_FR_1MO_211021_1_1&refcode2=0fb340d4-b832-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmIzNDBkNC1iODMyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=36BGhZ_gI-mUuBNSj14SdS58iOem_R6rMTbLtGTQ-X4=)

Thank you,

Tom

body:
LET US KNOW IF YOU CONDEMN REPUBLICANS FOR ATTACKING VOTING RIGHTS >>
| | | **_BREAKING from the New York Times:
Senate GOP blocks Voting Rights Bill for Third Time This Year_
**
| [LET US KNOW IF YOU CONDEMN REPUBLICANS FOR ATTACKING VOTING RIGHTS >>
](https://links.e.dccc.)
[RESPONSE STATUS: PENDING
DCCC ID: 5907903
DEADLINE: 11:59 PM](https://links.e.dccc.)

| | [**SIGN ON NOW >>**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/We_)
---

We're LIVID.

Mitch McConnell and his Senate Republicans just BLOCKED Democrats' latest efforts to save voting rights -- _**AGAIN!!**_

**We will never forget** what Senate Republicans just did to our democracy at this moment -- or their ruthless, ongoing attacks on our voting rights nationwide.

**And we will never allow** Republicans' power-hungry, anti-democratic schemes to diminish our resolve to vote every last one of them out of office.

**But we need to be honest:** Unless we see a SURGE in grassroots support -- and FAST -- things look pretty grim.

We simply can't overcome the GOP's attacks on our democracy without steadfast support from every last grassroots Democrat across the country leading up to next fall.

**That 's why we're urgently asking you to rise up and let us know that we can count on your support in the fight to save voting rights before it's too late.**

[**Please: Sign on straight away and tell us you CONDEMN Mitch McConnell and his Senate Republicans for their outrageous attacks on voting rights.**](https://links.e.dccc.)
| [**SIGN ON NOW >>**](https://links.e.dccc.)

Thank you,

DCCC

name: Jake Evans
subject: Reminder: Empty Shelves Joe Biden
body:
Under Joe Biden's failed leadership, our nation's once great economy is struggling....
---
| | | | | |
---
| | Dear Friends,
Under Joe Biden's failed leadership, our nation's once great economy is struggling to stay afloat.
A record 4.3 MILLION people quit their jobs in August.
Gas prices have reached a 7-year high.
Food and groceries have reached the highest level in over 10 years.
Inflation is skyrocketing at 5.4%, a 13-year high.
Estimates say it will cost 30% more this winter to heat our homes.
Up to 20% of items are now out of stock as shelves remain empty.
Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi have managed to cripple the world's strongest economy in a matter of 9 months, and if we don't take back the House in 2022, it will only get worse.

Peter, **I’ve always been deeply proud and grateful to be an American. ** As the grandson of a World War II veteran and two Holocaust survivors who came to this country as refugees, that’s just how I was raised. **My belief in America is what drove me to become a federal prosecutor,** where I investigated and prosecuted some of America's worst enemies and most dangerous criminals – including al-Qaeda terrorists, child sex traffickers, and mafia bosses. **My belief in America is also what drove me to run for Congress. ** **[And I need your support, Peter, to help get there.](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=373ea0e568474cbca1c956b1bd663bfc&_e=AkJb9uqCakIqDMypwVML2vP_X_TbPI07KtZi3AiBgQQmc7qNOJ5tQoter-I9S2ky4aWO2SC0RFfRC8-u_VlL0Nvyy97log7rlKpq6tFvOwY3ZOGku_L1rBQPUZrsoItNCH0dgv1aDK3byiWr3QNzT8NfmLJzy74tWt-4GmEdMHa51ooPVH2U043nQrEW5menVcqDkYb-S1WX04Ksw5VhmO6auTFNKzPOx2-9N0hhB5GKlP87P8OAsMZAPo3R0Lt6a39TWzNVddmDHvohUNxQ4Gp_y1JLznE9ND9CbGIKyr2v7wfw5DbSyNzNvtOl0KU1TOjGgj-VHbhy8a9HPXKOKz-jrerpt1hbgXkCpNNQtWpUzzRLscazf6-P7qtqrzXpIhpbyTI9vpWBMF4-8OmPymLZhzYH3rnHY-lTQmqdYnp78ZewEqcM9DoXMRFMM0rtvddpYI_H9acoMSA3ivLY9iDXn7qUkkwTHLQCd90YM_tdiyj_sYRyfxMSjmutSWfq)** While my family’s history is unique in many ways, it’s also part of the larger American story – a story that must continually be celebrated and defended. ** ** **Sadly, a growing number of Leftists in Congress – led by “the Squad” – don’t believe in the fundamental goodness of America. **They say America is systemically rotten. They compare America to the Taliban. They denounce America’s economic system. They say the American Dream is dead. ** ** **Well, I disagree.** So would my grandparents. And so would countless others who’ve come to our shores over the centuries in search of freedom and opportunity. ** ** If we want to keep the American Dream alive – if we want to preserve core American values like individual liberty, limited government, free enterprise, and equality of opportunity – then we must end single-party Democrat rule as soon as possible. **That means taking back the House in 2022. ** ** ** [**Invest in my campaign for Congress so I can fight for you, your family, and our country.**](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=373ea0e568474cbca1c956b1bd663bfc&_e=AkJb9uqCakIqDMypwVML2vP_X_TbPI07KtZi3AiBgQQmc7qNOJ5tQoter-I9S2ky4aWO2SC0RFfRC8-u_VlL0Nvyy97log7rlKpq6tFvOwY3ZOGku_L1rBQPUZrsoItNCH0dgv1aDK3byiWr3QNzT8NfmLJzy74tWt-4GmEdMHa51ooPVH2U043nQrEW5menVcqDkYb-S1WX04Ksw5VhmO6auTFNKzPOx2-9N0hhB5GKlP87P8OAsMZAPo3R0Lt6a39TWzNVddmDHvohUNxQ4Gp_y1JLznE9ND9CbGIKyr2PS57tnjW3hk9IA8FjjBOqdSrsnEUidBMhAZlcWTiuWjU2N6VMruts8SiuF0GM25GjAE3b3yFAl5PLDrLdcKsqJ0NPV8FjAZ_de7SaNraXmRDTp0EwoUzChS_ETGSEqFVGu0xBLf3EXYBw9HdVrw8_wIRjpm_f2NEhXw5hHojtTsO5_927VKpIwqCExZJdRPxSaHfixrtOsPeGKSnReNI-) name: American Update
subject: Is socialism on the rise?
body:
Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8966%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=sEMF3FlyYyfegHo%2fUm5Sig&sysid=1)
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16711%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=48zSqpvIkqtl6CDDYgyNXg&sysid=1)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. That’s why you have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Survey on Socialism. With your response, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans--views that we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. Every month, Hillsdale College is reaching millions of Americans with educational outreach. Your response to this National Survey on Socialism is essential in helping us form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of our country. So please give your views on the political, media, and cultural forces that are promoting socialism in our country today, by completing this National Survey on Socialism: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16712%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=48bGq4ZcTqCLnMTVRaiy5w&sysid=1)** There is no doubt in my mind that, especially among younger Americans, socialism is increasingly attractive--and that this threatens the future of American liberty. As Winston Churchill noted, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” And education is the surest way to defeat it. If you agree, please stand with Hillsdale College as we promote intelligent patriotism and defend liberty through education. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. | [**Take the Survey**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16713%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6%2fidRPjp7bJE1OR4DOspvA&sysid=1)
---

Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

name: Nicole Neily, Parents Defending Education
subject: DOJ: “Concerned parents = domesticterrorists?”
body:
Maybe you heard the news – recently, the U.S. Department of Justice said they will mobilize the FBI against parents ... for st
_Sponsored message_
[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2za8ee2kgsd37uvv2vg4jap4mtpo3hdgovksa0lk8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c3imcor1cph2bs) Fellow American, Maybe you heard the news – recently, the U.S. Department of Justice said **they will mobilize the FBI against parents ... for standing up for their own children!** On October 4, 2021, the DOJ announced a new initiative to address “harassment, intimidation and threats of violence” against school board members and employees – including but not limited to **the creation of a federal task force as well as dedicated lines of communication for threat reporting, assessment, and response by law enforcement under the auspices of the FBI.** [**Tell the DOJ this is unacceptable**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zs8ju2o4ekmh8rr5qmg3rdjkt684kqr7hql6778g_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c3imcor1cph2bs) My name is Nicole Neily, and I’m the President of Parents Defending Education. We’re a national grassroots organization working to reclaim our schools from activists promoting harmful agendas, and fighting against indoctrination in the classroom -- and _for_ the restoration of a healthy, non-political education for our kids. We are also standing with parents like you who are troubled by what’s happening in our schools today. You might be wondering how something so outrageous -- **the FBI being mobilized against parents for simply speaking up for their own children** \-- could happen in “the land of the free.” It all started recently, when the National School Board Association (NSBA) sent a letter to President Biden asking for help **silencing parents like you** who are demanding change at school board meetings. In their letter, NSBA cites a tiny number of minor incidents to insinuate that** parents who are criticizing and protesting the decisions of school boards are or may be engaging in “domestic terrorism and hate crimes."** While PDE naturally does not support _anyone_ who uses violence or threats against school board members, officials, or teachers, the NSBA choosing to invoke the PATRIOT Act (which was passed after 9/11 to uncover potential terrorist plots) takes it WAY too far. The association of legitimate protest with terrorism and violence reveals both NSBA’s contempt for parents and their unwillingness to understand and hear the sincere cries of parents on behalf of their children. In short, **_NSBA’s letter to President Biden was a thinly veiled threat_** , intended to intimidate into silence and submission the very constituents -- parents and taxpayers like you, -- that its members ostensibly represent. And the Department of Justice is wholly complicit in this charade. [**Tell the DOJ you OPPOSE FBI persecution of parents**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z03pa8rc561tf62scoerq4ccqa8o6f529lbhb0m0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c3imcor1cph2bs) I’m in awe that NSBA would choose to threaten parents for having the courage to hold them accountable -- as I’m sure you are. And it’s unthinkable that concerned parents should be equated with domestic terrorists. **We will not be bullied.** We refuse to have our free speech chilled by threats. America’s parents have a constitutional right to petition our elected officials -- and Parents Defending Education will continue to do so, with the support of parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens like you! The good news is that this proves the NSBA, the teachers’ unions, and radical school boards around the country are running scared. They’ve been bullying us for decades -- and now that parents are standing up to them, they’re terrified. **The mere fact that they’ve summoned the Biden administration to back up their crazy power trip clearly shows they feel the power slipping from their hands.** In cities and towns across America, we’re seeing a backlash against the school administrators and bureaucrats who disdain the parents whose children they are entrusted with educating. This behavior is arrogant and out of touch and these fiefdoms must be exposed and held accountable. And that’s exactly what Parents Defending Education is doing -- keeping the pressure on the NSBA, teachers’ unions, and school boards. But we need the support of parents, teachers, and concerned Americans like you to effectively fight back against these bullies and defend the rights of American parents and school children. [**Tell the DOJ you won’t be bullied**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z6tbu5s2b5u7quepngmavs9q90jeq4f3gmerrrb8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c3imcor1cph2bs) So thank you for standing with us -- and standing _up_ for America’s parents! Nicole Neily President Parents Defending Education 4532 Lee Hwy #119
Arlington VA 22207
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z7ajidr4frno8im2o05jaujdhrehk4borjh02e20_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or6c5geapj3c5j649fg)

name: Alex Padilla for California
subject: An update on the Freedom to Vote Act
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
It is time to end the filibuster and protect our democracy.
#

Hey
After Alex emailed you yesterday, we wanted to reach out with an update on the Freedom the Vote Act.
As expected, Senate republicans once again used the filibuster to block a bill that protects and expands the right to vote, ends partisan gerrymandering, and pushes back on big money in politics.
[**We cannot let this go on any longer. It is time to end the filibuster and protect our democracy. Add your name to stand with Alex if you agree >>>**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/End-Filibuster-Oct21?source=em211021-1-subs&akid=407%2E159979%2EcM6Aeu)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/End-Filibuster-Oct21?source=em211021-1-subs&akid=407%2E159979%2EcM6Aeu)**
Thank you for standing with Alex in the fight to protect voting rights.
\- Team Padilla

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=407%2E159979%2EcM6Aeu)

subject: Should someone lose their job for being unvaccinated?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
Do you agree that House Republicans should do everything in our power to stop hospitals from terminating medical professionals? Democrats want to require covid vaccine mandates but let COVID positive illegal immigrants cross the southern border. Don't want to receive our emails? Peter,

When the Biden Administration announced their intention to institute a vaccine mandate for anyone working at a company of 100 employees or more, we reached out to you to ask if you agreed with the decision. Unsurprisingly, the response was overwhelmingly against the mandate.

Now that some time has passed since Biden’s announcement, companies are beginning to terminate employees who don’t bend to the will of Democrats in Washington. **Even hospitals that are claiming to be at capacity – unable to treat everyone attempting to receive service -- are terminating nurses who won’t comply with Biden’s vaccine mandate**.

But sure, mock parents who object to the government teaching Critical Race Theory in our **PUBLICALLY FUNDED SCHOOLS**.

You know where I stand on vaccine mandates: It’s a personal choice. That said, **I want to know where you stand on hard-working Americans losing their jobs for refusing a vaccine**.

**[Do you agree that House Republicans should do everything in our power to stop hospitals from terminating medical professionals?](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=3dbed42b7a3145b79c47da988bbc1e1c&_e=vnT5supIHsx9OQeuLOdVrftH2jT6bFQLbNk-OvYChjU9xiZk6g81Ucs1Jlw41Vw_M6r6-Kz-u8Kb-PFb8uYOnYeBdGMmRcczZZmb6A2o2F5ymHMONELxzPJUlawEV4NbPMjx_EacT-WoLJIW66hfIIl-TafGRen7dI5CTd_v4h0vFkSWDHYnpV2b3FZZ0i4T9HcHBgutxW5X14zXK6VyFc8D-VYEWUOEjqjo-xTSHw44ooO0GqYbrZ28aOw8kuXI5dk_KahZzReAca0zX3FXI5oSLJREJVM8RSYx7BAjgFR--IpZlS4WMORpmEMOs3kcnXX5gFWgajhizXsOu9dDXcelgSi5Cqh3kMCGOMfBJrtMrtc-CaSF_JSB1fSeql0NczS_-XJIF82ntNSLSKAsMsC6IhWBojq19QtJ64aqqgiatXPefy0_mxfIvDyT3AudHtt26t4jHjR8gQ9I4LvmnfLnP-uHJKsvJX5ChJgewTWS96d4Ku4-Ze5RwiA1z8Xy)**

SURVEY REQUEST FOR: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Response Deadline: MIDNIGHT, October 21st

I find all of the mandates coming from Biden’s White House to be troubling, but I’m particularly perplexed that the Biden-Harris Administration is now MANDATING a vaccine that Vice President Harris said she wasn’t sure she would take, simply because it was developed by the TRUMP ADMINISTRATION.

**Democrats will have you FIRED from your job if you don’t comply with their absurd vaccine mandate. But if you’re a vaccinated undocumented immigrant with no ID to vote – NO PROBLEM!**

Thanks for taking the time to let us know where you stand on this today.

Thank you,
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=3dbed42b7a3145b79c47da988bbc1e1c&_e=vnT5supIHsx9OQeuLOdVrftH2jT6bFQLbNk-OvYChjU9xiZk6g81Ucs1Jlw41Vw_M6r6-Kz-u8Kb-PFb8uYOnYeBdGMmRcczZZmb6A2o2F5ymHMONELxzPJUlawEV4NbPMjx_EacT-WoLJIW66hfIIl-TafGRen7dI5CTd_v4h0vFkSWDHYnpV2b3FZZ0i4T9HcHBgutxW5X14zXK6VyFc8D-VYEWUOEjqjo-xTSHw44ooO0GqYbrZ28aOw8kuXI5dk_KahZzReAca0zX3FXI5oSLJREJVM8RSYx7BAjgFTmquRP71t6jnZV7dCTALUEQkJIn1RsPZAVCgEUgLCI2Xk6uHloJWIZLbtgatXKkWxztausUnZIqRLZ2o1zhjtFM8Ne-ydy6bRmgwbtbdKJJTYoCAsuk0zWV1B0sArqZEivq9GJlmWxTZRNTI7zTZeMKfNWs3GP7CMv0zypxS2t_bh9nHXJD1Fg_sEVO45c-Aw2pzcxonmKYmY9oGAE2vqF)
Jim

name: Dr. Mary L. Trump
subject: He says “Donald Trump represents so much of why I’m running”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
That’s disqualifying.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37799049/312648624/-2023814932?refcode=20211021.8_MT_10FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjhiMDY3MC1iZTMyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t8QONDbbQDcu5kNXnwrO5fEs8FKwU5JOHH2mcVAbjQI=)

| | Derek, in 2020, we saw voters turn out in record numbers to defeat the most dangerous man in America, my uncle, Donald Trump.

But now, the Republican candidate for Governor of Virginia, Glenn Youngkin, is a Donald Trump acolyte who says that Donald Trump represents so much of why he's running.

That’s disqualifying. No one in politics today should hold my uncle up as a role model. He’s a narcissist and a danger to America.

But I’m worried people aren’t as concerned about this as I am. Early voting turnout is way down in the Virginia election, polls have Glenn Youngkin tied with Terry McAuliffe (some even show Youngkin _**winning**_), and election analysts say the race is a toss up!

**[Derek, we can’t let someone who worships my uncle become the Governor of Virginia! Please, pitch in $15 or whatever you can afford right now to help Terry turn out the voters he needs. name: American Update
subject: An honest American history resource
body:
American civics education, and specifically the teaching of American history, is at a crisis point. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8960%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=IatmQTUThVNfbieboRydGQ&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16726%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IUv6oJ84CsdrXfaV%2bHRCQw&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, American civics education, and specifically the teaching of American history, is at a crisis point. In K-12 schools nationwide, false narratives are being constructed, and content is being cherry-picked to fit an ideological (and frankly anti-American) agenda. Maybe you’ve even seen this happening in your local schools. As a result, we are faced with a choice: will we allow our children to be indoctrinated using curricula developed by anti-American ideologues and promoted by Left-wing education bureaucrats? Or will we insist that our children are taught honestly, using a curriculum that presents a fair, unbiased, and comprehensive view of our nation’s history? We must insist on the **latter** , both for the sake of truth and for the sake of our children and America’s future. For this reason, we have produced the **Hillsdale** **1776 Curriculum** --and I’m writing to ask your help in promoting this curriculum to educators, homeschool families, and concerned citizens nationwide. **What is the Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum? ** The**Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum** is a K-12 history and civics curriculum that covers the triumphs and tragedies of American history fairly and comprehensively. This curriculum has been designed not by activists or ideologues but by teachers and professors at Hillsdale College--and we are making it available **free of charge**. To be clear, the **Hillsdale** **1776 Curriculum** is not a _slap-dash_ response to the efforts of anti-American ideologues to indoctrinate our children. It is a 2,000-page, 85-lesson curriculum based on decades of studying American history. Developed over 18 months of intense and focused effort, its roots extend as far back as the beginning of Hillsdale College in 1844. And we need your help to make the **Hillsdale** **1776 Curriculum** available to educators, homeschool families, and concerned citizens nationwide...and to make it available **free of charge** so that it will have the greatest impact. _We have set a budget goal of $400,000 to promote the**Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum** and our other outreach efforts--including _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and our classical K-12 charter school initiative. _ That’s an ambitious budget, and we need to get started as soon as possible. One reason why your support really matters: **Hillsdale College refuses to accept one penny in taxpayer support --not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans**. This makes our work uniquely dependent on the support of citizens like you--citizens who agree with Hillsdale’s mission on behalf of liberty. We remind ourselves daily of Hillsdale’s 177-year-old mission--to provide “sound learning” of the kind needed to preserve “the inestimable blessings of civil and religious liberty.” With that mission in mind, we produced the **Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum** --and now we need your help to promote it nationwide. Will you take this opportunity to _**support the Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum and our other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty?**_ Understanding that a proper education is vital to the preservation of liberty--and that the anti-American indoctrination now being forced on too many American children poses an existential threat to liberty--I hope you will make your most generous tax-deductible gift today. **I’ve included a secure link for your convenience here: ** _**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-hillsdale-1776-curriculum](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16727%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CzQve1nPll8LUUX0clvrVw&sysid=1)**_ Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to hearing from you. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

clean_body: American civics education, and specifically the teaching of American history, is at a crisis point. This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Fellow American, American civics education, and specifically the teaching of American history, is at a crisis point. In K-12 schools nationwide, false narratives are being constructed, and content is being cherry-picked to fit an ideological (and frankly anti-American) agenda. Maybe you’ve even seen this happening in your local schools. As a result, we are faced with a choice: will we allow our children to be indoctrinated using curricula developed by anti-American ideologues and promoted by Left-wing education bureaucrats? Or will we insist that our children are taught honestly, using a curriculum that presents a fair, unbiased, and comprehensive view of our nation’s history? We must insist on the latter , both for the sake of truth and for the sake of our children and America’s future. For this reason, we have produced the Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum --and I’m writing to ask your help in promoting this curriculum to educators, homeschool families, and concerned citizens nationwide. What is the Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum? TheHillsdale 1776 Curriculum is a K-12 history and civics curriculum that covers the triumphs and tragedies of American history fairly and comprehensively. This curriculum has been designed not by activists or ideologues but by teachers and professors at Hillsdale College--and we are making it available free of charge. To be clear, the Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum is not a slap-dash response to the efforts of anti-American ideologues to indoctrinate our children. It is a 2,000-page, 85-lesson curriculum based on decades of studying American history. Developed over 18 months of intense and focused effort, its roots extend as far back as the beginning of Hillsdale College in 1844. And we need your help to make the Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum available to educators, homeschool families, and concerned citizens nationwide...and to make it available free of charge so that it will have the greatest impact. We have set a budget goal of $400,000 to promote theHillsdale 1776 Curriculum and our other outreach efforts--including Imprimis , free online courses, and our classical K-12 charter school initiative. That’s an ambitious budget, and we need to get started as soon as possible. One reason why your support really matters: Hillsdale College refuses to accept one penny in taxpayer support --not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. This makes our work uniquely dependent on the support of citizens like you--citizens who agree with Hillsdale’s mission on behalf of liberty. We remind ourselves daily of Hillsdale’s 177-year-old mission--to provide “sound learning” of the kind needed to preserve “the inestimable blessings of civil and religious liberty.” With that mission in mind, we produced the Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum --and now we need your help to promote it nationwide. Will you take this opportunity to support the Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum and our other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty? Understanding that a proper education is vital to the preservation of liberty--and that the anti-American indoctrination now being forced on too many American children poses an existential threat to liberty--I hope you will make your most generous tax-deductible gift today. I’ve included a secure link for your convenience here: Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to hearing from you. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

body:
This deadline is a big one.
#
Team, I’m running against an extreme, Trump-backed culture warrior. I know you understand how serious the Virginia governor’s race is for Virginia and America’s future. **_That’s why I’m so stunned that we haven’t gotten more support to hit our fundraising goal tonight!_**
Let me remind you why this goal is so important.
We are just days away from Election Day, and polling shows a tied race. The final filing deadline of the campaign is TODAY and we have to reach our goal to have the resources we need for the campaign homestretch.

Terry McAuliffe

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: I'm logging off after this email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
Peter – it's been a long day, but it's important to me that I send out this email before logging off.
Donald Trump endorsed my opponent Sen. Grassley less than 10 days ago. It's made me more resolved than ever to win, but frankly, I’m deeply worried about what this endorsement means for our country. With Sen. Grassley's enthusiastic embrace of Trump – and all of his conspiracy theories, radicalism and dangerous attempts to overthrow the election – the Republican Party has officially chosen Trump over our country. And I'd bet I'm not the only one who's lost sleep over it.
But what I'm hearing from voters on the campaign trail is totally different than the extremism and conspiracy theories coming out of Washington (or Mar-a-Lago). I've met countless Iowans who are ready for new leadership. Don't just take it from me, polling shows nearly two-thirds of voters don't want to reelect Sen. Grassley.
The momentum on the ground is real. But we're up against powerful forces: conspiracy theories, alarmist rhetoric, and – above all – tens of millions of dollars that the Republican establishment is ready to deploy at a moment's notice to stop us. We can win, but we need the resources to compete with GOP spending and make sure our message reaches voters.
So please, can you donate $5 or whatever you can spare before midnight tonight so we can capitalize on this momentum? Here's the best link:****[**https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/abby-finkenauer-email**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37800037/312652114/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk272-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzg0N2I1NC1jMzMyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kO6jcXh_FCX4_HUSj7BuE7lDKQK_hQoEZdQkbBdVkNY=)
Thank you,

Abby

That's why we need 26 more Democrats from 18326 to speak out before tonight's midnight deadline, so please – don't lose this chance to make your voice heard in this fight: DO YOU SUPPORT UNIVERSAL VOTE-BY-MAIL FOR ALL ELIGIBLE VOTERS? | | | | MIDNIGHT DEADLINE | COMPLETION RATE IN 18326: 96.8% Thank you, Team Lopez Please read on for a personal message from Democrat Marco Lopez:** Friend, I’m so grateful you’re part of our people-powered movement to flip Arizona blue. But I have to be honest: I’m counting on your help now more than ever. I’m a proud Democrat, former border city mayor and Obama administration alum – and I’m running for governor to build a state that works for all our people. But failed GOP politicians like Kelli Ward and Doug Ducey are spreading delusional conspiracy theories and putting Donald Trump’s interests ahead of what’s best for our state. Enough is enough. But with Arizona slated to be the nation's TOP battleground in 2022, Republicans are gearing up to spend MILLIONS to keep the governorship red, so we’ll only win this race with overwhelming grassroots support. If you’re with me, = Thank you so much. – Marco Lopez = | | | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Marco Lopez for Governor PO Box 34672 Phoenix, AZ 85067 United States | | 2021 | Paid for by Marco Lopez for Governor Authorized by Marco Lopez

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jahmal=20Cole?=
subject: Police Reform & Accountability
body:
Statement on Former Mayor Rahm Emanuel's Appointment | | |
#### ACCOUNTABILITY FOR EVERYONE
---
[View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/cd9bd1ff2e1e/police-reform-accountability?e=339f142c50)
---
| |
---
| |
---
|
### Change starts with us.

This month I’ve talked about police reform and the injustices Black and Brown people face at the hands of CPD. But one thing has become abundantly clear: we must hold**everyone** accountable for their role in these crimes. Yesterday, I spoke at Laquan Day about police reform and reform failures. But while we are fighting for justice, politicians are staying silent, even as former Mayor Rahm Emanuel has been nominated to an ambassadorship with Japan. This nomination fails to hold Rahm Emanuel accountable for his actions. Laquan McDonald was a young black man who was shot 16 times by Jason Van Dyke, and Rahm Emanuel was complicit in the cover up and this injustice. **I cannot, in good conscience, support him being nominated to this position, or any position of public service.** The City of Chicago is still dealing with the impact of this incident, and we are still working to heal. The people of this city and myself are asking Senators to vote NO on his confirmation, and I sincerely hope that they will. Yours in service,

Jahmal Cole

---
|
---
|
---
| |
## JOIN ME
---
|
---
| [ ](https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=f5a7d4dd5b&e=339f142c50)
---
On **Tuesday, October 26th at 12pm CT/1pm ET** , I will be joined by **professor Alex Vitale** , author of "The End of Policing" for a conversation about police reform. I'm looking forward to talking about concrete solutions to the harms that we as a community face at the hands of police. Register for the event [here](https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=c0904041ab&e=339f142c50).
| |
## LISTEN TO MY RECENT REMARKS
---
|
---
| [ ](https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=368fe4b9cc&e=339f142c50 "Jahmal Cole “Burning the Consent Decree” Speech")
---
Last week, I shared my thoughts on the consent decree. The reality is, CPD never even admits guilt, even though they found a "pattern or practice" of 4th amendment violations. We can't make progress if we fail to recognize the problem.

The COVID pandemic has made clear what we’ve known for years — care workers are crucial to our communities. A significant investment in-home and community-based services — or HCBS — would not only support care workers, most of whom are women of color and immigrant women, but would create 1.1 million new jobs each year over the next decade. name: Dr. Caraveo
subject: Why Latina Equal Pay Day matters:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS
body:
57 cents on the dollar. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37800294/312653097/1561815853?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDhiZTliOS1jNDMyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lLEI-mzUKQVDfWHnCeYsMXGZfeViq-mm79zQkNyRYDE=&emci=58759deb-ba32-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=308be9b9-c432-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=12666102)
---
| | Peter,

Today is Latina Equal Pay Day. That means that today, October 21, 2021, average Latina pay catches up to what white, non-Hispanic men made in 2020.

More than 50 years after the passage of the Equal Pay Act of 1963, Latinas typically earn only 57 cents for every dollar a white man makes.

**57 cents is not equal to one dollar.**

Throughout the COVID-19 pandemic, Latinas kept our country up and running. We represent a disproportionate percentage of the essential workforce, and that’s exactly what our work is: essential.

**It’s time our pay reflected that.**

If elected, I would be the first Latina to represent Colorado in Congress. Our district is 38% Hispanic. But until we are visible in Congress, the challenges we face will be invisible to Congress.

That’s why our district needs a representative who understands the issues that impact Latinas. **[That’s why, on this Latina Equal Pay Day, I’m asking you to take action to elect Colorado’s first Latina to Congress. clean_body: 57 cents on the dollar. | | Peter, Today is Latina Equal Pay Day. That means that today, October 21, 2021, average Latina pay catches up to what white, non-Hispanic men made in 2020. More than 50 years after the passage of the Equal Pay Act of 1963, Latinas typically earn only 57 cents for every dollar a white man makes. 57 cents is not equal to one dollar. Throughout the COVID-19 pandemic, Latinas kept our country up and running. We represent a disproportionate percentage of the essential workforce, and that’s exactly what our work is: essential. It’s time our pay reflected that. If elected, I would be the first Latina to represent Colorado in Congress. Our district is 38% Hispanic. But until we are visible in Congress, the challenges we face will be invisible to Congress. That’s why our district needs a representative who understands the issues that impact Latinas. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | | = ---|---|--- = | | = = | | = Thank you, Dr. Yadira Caraveo | Dr. Yadira Caraveo is a pediatrician, state representative, and daughter of immigrants. She’s running to represent Colorado’s new Congressional district in Congress and to be the first Latina to represent Colorado in Congress. In the state legislature, Dr. Caraveo has a strong record for delivering real results for Colorado families — and she has proven she isn’t afraid to go toe-to-toe with special interests. She’s ready to take on tough fights in Congress. | | | Peter, I can't believe this.

It's Marco, I'm on track to miss my End of Month goal and be outraised...again. I hate to bother you about this, but I promise it's important. My team and I put together this ad that does just that, and I'm very excited about it! ⬇ ⬇WATCH MY NEW AD⬇ ⬇ With the lockdowns, hypocrisy, censorship... our county is unrecognizable, and I'm sick of standing by while Americans suffer. My opponent has the elitist Democrat establishment behind him and will have unlimited shady resources to run his campaign. I need your support to combat the lies and hypocrisy of the Left. Our country needs us to step up and join the fight. We need to push back against the hypocrisy being forced on us. Thank you for your continued support, Mark Meuser Candidate for U.S. Senate, California | | Paid for by Mark Meuser for U.S. Senate Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but.

body:
