| | Peter, The House of Representatives just voted to hold top Trump-ally Steve Bannon in contempt for refusing to comply with the January 6 Select Committee's subpoenas. This follows Donald Trump's frivolous lawsuit filed Monday to stop Democrat bulldog Adam Schiff and the Select Committee from securing top-secret documents that will unequivocally expose that he orchestrated the January 6 Insurrection at the Capitol. See, Trump knows when cop-on-the-beat Adam Schiff opens this pandora's box of incriminating documents, or compels Bannon to talk, then his 2024 reelection campaign— Trump's sole focus— will go down. That's if Adam Schiff can lead Democrats to this monumental victory over Trump & Co. When that happens, Trump's hand-picked 2022 House and Senate candidates won't be able to sell their base on the Big Lie they've been hawking since Joe Biden was inaugurated and set the stage for Trump to win in 2024. But if Trump's loyal sycophants help Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy claw back control of both chambers of Congress, McConnell and McCarthy will deliver Donald Trump a fully-staffed establishment machine that will ensure his reinstallation in the White House. When Democrats Turn Out won't stop until every truth is told, and we're fighting the insidious GOP machine with all we've got. We're revving up our aggressive digital and ground campaign to insulate Adam Schiff, protect our brave Democrat investigators, and protect every single progressive in Congress from Team Trump's electioneering playbook. But today we are $4,185 short of our mission-critical monthly fundraising goal. If we can't close the gap, we'll have to dramatically scale back our efforts to ward off the GOP's Trump 2024 electioneering gameplan. name: John Fetterman
subject: Definitely not your usual giveaway, and I think that’s a good thing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Coming to a Sheetz (or Wawa) near you!
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20211021-3105-header&t=1&akid=3105%2E434096%2EcjRnMQ)
You’re an important part of our campaign, Peter. It would be my *deep honor* to treat you to a Walker Breakfast Ranger and some Totz (or a Sizzli, if that’s what you prefer).
**That’s right — we’re going to Sheetz together (or Wawa 🙄)!**
[**_Will you kick in $5 or any amount right now to be automatically entered to win? Gisele and I would love nothing more than to meet you in person._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33387?refcode=em20211021-3105&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3105%2E434096%2EcjRnMQ)
**[Donate + Enter](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33387?refcode=em20211021-3105&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3105%2E434096%2EcjRnMQ)**
Yesterday, we officially launched our first-ever, one-of-a-kind contest. If you enter the contest and win, Gisele and I will come meet you near Cresco for a Sheetz (or Wawa) run on us.
[**_If you make a donation of any amount to our campaign right now, you’ll be *automatically* entered to win a trip to Sheetz (or Wawa) with me + Gisele!_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33387?refcode=em20211021-3105&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=3105%2E434096%2EcjRnMQ)
**_[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33387?refcode=em20211021-3105&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=3105%2E434096%2EcjRnMQ)_**
**[Donate + Enter](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33387?refcode=em20211021-3105&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=3105%2E434096%2EcjRnMQ)**
Look, you know I’ve always believed Sheetz is the superior, far more delicious gas station establishment in PA.
But for you, Peter — I’m willing to make an exception.
Your support of our campaign keeps us going, more than any Walker Breakfast Ranger ever could. But this is better discussed in person, I hope you’ll make a contribution today and we _juuuuuust_ might be able to hash it out.
[**_Will you kick in a donation of any amount to be automatically entered to win a trip to Sheetz* with me + Gisele? This is a one-of-a-kind contest that won’t be open forever, and I don’t want you to miss out._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33387?refcode=em20211021-3105&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=7&akid=3105%2E434096%2EcjRnMQ)
**[Donate + Enter](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33387?refcode=em20211021-3105&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=3105%2E434096%2EcjRnMQ)**
Hope to get to meet you very soon!
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
No purchase, payment, or contribution is necessary to enter or win and will not improve chances of winning. Void where prohibited. Entries must be received by October 31, 2021. Enter by [**contributing here**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20211019-contest?refcode=em-footer&t=9&refcode2=3105_434096_cjRnMQ&akid=3105%2E434096%2EcjRnMQ), or visit this page to **[enter without contributing](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/jf-sheetz-wawa-nodonate-contest-signup?source=em-3105&t=10&akid=3105%2E434096%2EcjRnMQ)**. One winner will receive the following prize package: An opportunity to meet John and Gisele Fetterman at your local Sheetz or Wawa (approx. retail value $30). Odds depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents of Pennsylvania. View full official rules at **[this link](https://johnfetterman.com/contest-rules/)**. Sponsor: Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh, PA 15211.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=11&akid=3105%2E434096%2EcjRnMQ)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=3105%2E434096%2EcjRnMQ)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

But this is better discussed in person, I hope you’ll make a contribution today and we juuuuuust might be able to hash it out. Hope to get to meet you very soon! John John Fetterman Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com No purchase, payment, or contribution is necessary to enter or win and will not improve chances of winning. Void where prohibited. Entries must be received by October 31, 2021. Enter by , or visit this page to . One winner will receive the following prize package: An opportunity to meet John and Gisele Fetterman at your local Sheetz or Wawa (approx. retail value $30). Odds depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents of Pennsylvania. View full official rules at . Sponsor: Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh, PA 15211.

body:

** Volunteer/s needed for the Gun Show.
------------------------------------------------------------
The Melissa Martz Campaign will be at the Gun show (Nov. 13th and 14th) to collect Candidate Petition form signatures. We need 2600 signatures to get Melissa Martz on the ballot. Volunteer/s are needed this November 13th. If you can volunteer for the whole day (9a-5P), a lunch stipend will be provided. In the alternative the day may be divided by two volunteers - 9A-1P and 1P - 5P. Melissa will be there on the 14th.

If you are free to help, please reply to this email.

When: Saturday November 13th
Where: Martin County Fairgrounds

Thank you to all who continue to support our grassroots efforts!

Stay Free,

Melissa Martz Campaign

name: Nicole Neily, Parents Defending Education
subject: DOJ: “Concerned parents = domestic terrorists?”
body:
Maybe you heard the news – recently, the U.S. Department of Justice said they will mobilize the FBI against parents ... for standing up for their own children! [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8978%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=wkRV%2bXUZZcCoh9ME9Mtv1Q&sysid=1)
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16747%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9%2fkfYCM5ffHHu9MoYAsTdQ&sysid=1) Fellow American, Maybe you heard the news - recently, the U.S. Department of Justice said **they will mobilize the FBI against parents ... for standing up for their own children! ** On October 4, 2021, the DOJ announced a new initiative to address “harassment, intimidation and threats of violence” against school board members and employees - including but not limited to **the creation of a federal task force as well as dedicated lines of communication for threat reporting, assessment, and response by law enforcement under the auspices of the FBI.** [**Tell the DOJ this is unacceptable**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16748%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RPRVshjdlyfY6SjXmX0JEg&sysid=1) My name is Nicole Neily, and I’m the President of Parents Defending Education. We’re a national grassroots organization working to reclaim our schools from activists promoting harmful agendas, and fighting against indoctrination in the classroom -- and _for_ the restoration of a healthy, non-political education for our kids. We are also standing with parents like you who are troubled by what’s happening in our schools today. You might be wondering how something so outrageous -- **the FBI being mobilized against parents for simply speaking up for their own children** \-- could happen in “the land of the free.” It all started recently, when the National School Board Association (NSBA) sent a letter to President Biden asking for help **silencing parents like you** who are demanding change at school board meetings. In their letter, NSBA cites a tiny number of minor incidents to insinuate that** parents who are criticizing and protesting the decisions of school boards are or may be engaging in “domestic terrorism and hate crimes."** While PDE naturally does not support _anyone_ who uses violence or threats against school board members, officials, or teachers, the NSBA choosing to invoke the PATRIOT Act (which was passed after 9/11 to uncover potential terrorist plots) takes it WAY too far. The association of legitimate protest with terrorism and violence reveals both NSBA’s contempt for parents and their unwillingness to understand and hear the sincere cries of parents on behalf of their children. In short, **_NSBA’s letter to President Biden was a thinly veiled threat_** , intended to intimidate into silence and submission the very constituents -- parents and taxpayers like you, -- that its members ostensibly represent. And the Department of Justice is wholly complicit in this charade. [**Tell the DOJ you OPPOSE FBI persecution of parents**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16749%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ulg5UPOSuSCxom39sAq0NQ&sysid=1) I’m in awe that NSBA would choose to threaten parents for having the courage to hold them accountable -- as I’m sure you are. And it’s unthinkable that concerned parents should be equated with domestic terrorists. **We will not be bullied.** We refuse to have our free speech chilled by threats. America’s parents have a constitutional right to petition our elected officials -- and Parents Defending Education will continue to do so, with the support of parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens like you! The good news is that this proves the NSBA, the teachers’ unions, and radical school boards around the country are running scared. They’ve been bullying us for decades -- and now that parents are standing up to them, they’re terrified. **The mere fact that they’ve summoned the Biden administration to back up their crazy power trip clearly shows they feel the power slipping from their hands.** In cities and towns across America, we’re seeing a backlash against the school administrators and bureaucrats who disdain the parents whose children they are entrusted with educating. This behavior is arrogant and out of touch and these fiefdoms must be exposed and held accountable. And that’s exactly what Parents Defending Education is doing -- keeping the pressure on the NSBA, teachers’ unions, and school boards. But we need the support of parents, teachers, and concerned Americans like you to effectively fight back against these bullies and defend the rights of American parents and school children. [**Tell the DOJ you won’t be bullied**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16740%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hFHKUoao%2bgk8ReVSh%2flmQA&sysid=1) So thank you for standing with us -- and standing _up_ for America’s parents! Nicole Neily President Parents Defending Education 4532 Lee Hwy #119
Arlington VA 22207
---

clean_body: Maybe you heard the news – recently, the U.S. Department of Justice said they will mobilize the FBI against parents ... for standing up for their own children! Fellow American, Maybe you heard the news - recently, the U.S. Department of Justice said they will mobilize the FBI against parents ... for standing up for their own children! On October 4, 2021, the DOJ announced a new initiative to address “harassment, intimidation and threats of violence” against school board members and employees - including but not limited to the creation of a federal task force as well as dedicated lines of communication for threat reporting, assessment, and response by law enforcement under the auspices of the FBI. My name is Nicole Neily, and I’m the President of Parents Defending Education. We’re a national grassroots organization working to reclaim our schools from activists promoting harmful agendas, and fighting against indoctrination in the classroom -- and for the restoration of a healthy, non-political education for our kids. We are also standing with parents like you who are troubled by what’s happening in our schools today. You might be wondering how something so outrageous -- the FBI being mobilized against parents for simply speaking up for their own children \-- could happen in “the land of the free.” It all started recently, when the National School Board Association (NSBA) sent a letter to President Biden asking for help silencing parents like you who are demanding change at school board meetings. In their letter, NSBA cites a tiny number of minor incidents to insinuate that parents who are criticizing and protesting the decisions of school boards are or may be engaging in “domestic terrorism and hate crimes." While PDE naturally does not support anyone who uses violence or threats against school board members, officials, or teachers, the NSBA choosing to invoke the PATRIOT Act (which was passed after 9/11 to uncover potential terrorist plots) takes it WAY too far. The association of legitimate protest with terrorism and violence reveals both NSBA’s contempt for parents and their unwillingness to understand and hear the sincere cries of parents on behalf of their children. In short, NSBA’s letter to President Biden was a thinly veiled threat , intended to intimidate into silence and submission the very constituents -- parents and taxpayers like you, -- that its members ostensibly represent. And the Department of Justice is wholly complicit in this charade. I’m in awe that NSBA would choose to threaten parents for having the courage to hold them accountable -- as I’m sure you are. And it’s unthinkable that concerned parents should be equated with domestic terrorists. We will not be bullied. We refuse to have our free speech chilled by threats. America’s parents have a constitutional right to petition our elected officials -- and Parents Defending Education will continue to do so, with the support of parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens like you! The good news is that this proves the NSBA, the teachers’ unions, and radical school boards around the country are running scared. They’ve been bullying us for decades -- and now that parents are standing up to them, they’re terrified. The mere fact that they’ve summoned the Biden administration to back up their crazy power trip clearly shows they feel the power slipping from their hands. In cities and towns across America, we’re seeing a backlash against the school administrators and bureaucrats who disdain the parents whose children they are entrusted with educating. This behavior is arrogant and out of touch and these fiefdoms must be exposed and held accountable. And that’s exactly what Parents Defending Education is doing -- keeping the pressure on the NSBA, teachers’ unions, and school boards. But we need the support of parents, teachers, and concerned Americans like you to effectively fight back against these bullies and defend the rights of American parents and school children. So thank you for standing with us -- and standing up for America’s parents! Nicole Neily President Parents Defending Education 4532 Lee Hwy #119 Arlington VA 22207 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: this is serious, team
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Friends,

It's Terry McAuliffe, Democratic nominee for Governor of Virginia. I’m running against an extreme, Trump-backed culture warrior. I know you understand how serious the

Virginia governor’s race is for Virginia and America’s future. If Youngkin wins, Trump Republicans will get a huge momentum boost heading into 2022.

That’s why I’m so stunned that we haven’t gotten more support to hit our fundraising goal tonight!

Let me remind you why this goal is so important, friends.

We are just weeks away from Election Day, and polling shows a tied race. The final filing deadline of the campaign is TONIGHT and we have to reach our goal to have the resources we need for the campaign homestretch.

Please, split a donation of any amount right now between my campaign and Nikki Fried to power this campaign through the finish line: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-tm-split?refcode=2]

I really can’t overstate the importance of your support, friends.

Every dollar we raise helps us reach one more voter with our positive message for Virginia's future — and in a race this close, every single vote makes a huge difference.

Polls show a lot of Virginia voters are still undecided, so we need your help to keep our ads on the air and our organizing team on the doors.

Right now, will you split a donation to help fund our voter mobilization efforts in the final days? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-tm-split?refcode=2]

Thank you for everything,

Terry McAuliffe

name: Charles Booker
subject: Incredible news:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter, I have some
incredible news to share with you:

Planned Parenthood Action Fund just announced that they’re endorsing me to
represent Kentucky in the U.S. Senate — giving their full support to our
movement to defeat Rand Paul this election.

It has been my pride and privilege to fight for the women in my life and
the women of Kentucky with everything I’ve got. That is why I am so
grateful for this endorsement.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/11718?refcode=em20211021-1086&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=1086%2E346206%2EFReDAX ]Will you chip in $5 or anything you can right now to
show your support for our people-powered movement and our fight to
guarantee quality healthcare for all?

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/11718?refcode=em20211021-1086&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1086%2E346206%2EFReDAX ]Contribute $5

The constant warfare against women’s rights to make deeply personal
decisions for their families is harming women and Kentucky families as a
whole.

Whether it’s with a donation or by simply reading this email all the way
through, Peter,
I do hope you’ll join Planned Parenthood in supporting me today.

We’re at a critical moment in time. It’s more urgent now than ever that
there are leaders we can trust to stand with us, especially in light of
recent efforts to strip women of their agency in making critical health
care decisions. And together, we will fight to make sure women can make
the deeply personal choices they need to for them and their families.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/11718?refcode=em20211021-1086&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1086%2E346206%2EFReDAX ]So I’ll ask one more time,
Peter: if you can show your
support right now and make a $5 donation, every dollar
makes a big difference when it comes to our campaign. Thank you.

More soon,

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20211021-1086-footer&t=1023&refcode2=1086_346206_FReDAX&akid=1086%2E346206%2EFReDAX

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1086%2E346206%2EFReDAX

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

Derek,
The more time Maggie Hassan spends in New Hampshire and the more money she spends on TV ads, the more her favorability sinks to new lows.
She’s lost ground to three separate Republican candidates, two of whom are purely hypothetical. Maggie Hassan’s polling in New Hampshire has cratered right alongside Joe Biden’s, showing how increasing unpopular the Democrats’ D.C. agenda is among Granite Staters.
We are going to replace Maggie Hassan next year with a Republican who believes in the New Hampshire Advantage and supports our Granite State values.
\- Chairman Stephen Stepanek

body:
my friend Terry McAuliffe needs our help | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miM_JJ6uA61gaM_sKscLy84tDdtvH6gftuvbdUC12W7XmqLt_TbCM2m9j_lZJtYSJKsNehYLy6ONVht1enSVU2BPB1RiODZtXwOoSJ1CETfHOiS3aDshoURSTe5xJduYiAav73jJwfcd9hU565ryHmBi1HumgbbyK44cmJiHxaY9W0CTy2Z1Q7ALb7GyQp279gE1BOE7GIisIN8_qrpnKYX_hHxCK0druWqWxJvugyewjfbmyCsIcYFETd7vMhZkNpLz8AMCb5eoDgQI5NBPS9ItwJK1vE7TvI28XcKsRdtbU/3gc/VxUHfzSfSpCjrbMmrUOuyg/h0/ED4UJk2vgWPYzXMHoplJ_WHnzxSRh-5MNV3Ejpudyn4)
Derek: if we're going to secure a progressive future for our country, we cannot afford to take a single year off – and with the Virginia governor's race days away, my friend Terry McAuliffe needs our help today.

Right now, Terry's Trump-backed opponent is spending $75 MILLION of his personal fortune to launch attack ads, defeat Terry and flip Virginia red – and now, polling shows his race _statistically tied_. If we're going to win in Virginia – and lay the groundwork for our victories in next year's critical midterms – we need an immediate surge of grassroots support.

**Your donation right now, not days or weeks from now, will have the most impact, so I’m personally asking, Derek:[Will you split $25 or more between Common Good VA and my campaign – before our deadline at midnight tonight – to help us keep Georgia and Virginia blue and pass our Democratic agenda?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miM_JJ6uA61gaM_sKscLy84tu7zIFHDAdXhL47_rkBnuSfqZunscTveLhFMTXV03CUbk4IJCK5x5g1ta5EQUB43uucXpQffpvhCNsmtQtUCAV7-uye4soTBI2ztUT6Lj-9aJQLYSdEAfQlrQQAwsc1xOct3kbRbtZ776i2Tuq7BY2C-8Qjtbxsv95YJq_G93rEQxP6Ef8zSJ9jwmp--tZ0y02XV3PsuQW_FRQYPo_a9ExZ0zw1OGSyus6ULKXCW-R-UiR1g5AA_LWjYaUOzZBoCaF1AvtafTBivpffA6fqerUY7e1K_iFqRHXaFaF2Gwgc/3gc/VxUHfzSfSpCjrbMmrUOuyg/h1/9F2DJBCXzpLLVEdxuOjtCFT1vfkfeFiNg-mqRG9t5yw)**

I know a thing or two about running against Donald Trump's handpicked candidate. One of my opponents, Herschel Walker (R), was personally recruited to run against me by Trump – and now, he's using the GOP's playbook to turn Georgia red.

But here's the thing, Derek: unlike our opponents, Terry and I aren't running to represent Donald Trump. We're running to represent everyday people and build a future that we can all be proud of. But if we're going to overcome the GOP, we need folks like you by our side every step of the way.

**[So please, Derek: will you split a donation of $25 or more between my campaign and Common Good VA right now so we can keep Virginia and Georgia blue? The only way we can win these races is with your support, so I'm counting on you to chip in today.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miM_JJ6uA61gaM_sKscLy84tu7zIFHDAdXhL47_rkBnuSfqZunscTveLhFMTXV03CUcPVhJPU4Tsg8laksvbJXdfjwm5-d0OzLXsEFy3lJtNeloBzeTpEHDUcoKyud_9g-9S12kmAjNBUlkcAA8p02NCP8ooRwV4E-erSGEdYECNjVnHt_Od2SJzAVSaKYTnOhBrSNe6kqe33VPO_UWpj-8eFEQvooESOTLC184d-HkU6af_zdF5IkSmV89l1Bv0DOOH1tyfNyr9KA5Ilz5W3x-yUUKTqFv6w1YAWk6nhCE7tl1MeVqrb2JrBR7bkLXsL8/3gc/VxUHfzSfSpCjrbMmrUOuyg/h2/KdthSXC4EcCic_V8kgyPeMs7M_YrszSZcgq8FhxHGGk)** **[ Donate $25 ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miM_JJ6uA61gaM_sKscLy84tu7zIFHDAdXhL47_rkBnuSfqZunscTveLhFMTXV03CUQ7PIAosuKqjxWvB3vCuAO09VHt0UcchrSkH4US92exAityej1xTrTt0pFJwKvvwdqGBgQsLKKvh2wOLEd9CGshwCH3Y8mkA4D_gVtaNmrIOiptME-E9h69NlzzAxbMnWsF1CfuHxi1xJ1IwkOpB8mYNCAFZ4_5emtBbvbAG3dVI6I-V4U5pKSfbx5fAxwOOHvwUFJGwildUDkwhwsUB5uCH1acajgER-UO5_osA9x-1ddNtTruiw-KNq5Nc8csci/3gc/VxUHfzSfSpCjrbMmrUOuyg/h3/YTFKKK9xgTIsQJnSrqlICcYIV9Z_I_1LXR_fwdTJk3w)

clean_body: my friend Terry McAuliffe needs our help | | | Derek: if we're going to secure a progressive future for our country, we cannot afford to take a single year off – and with the Virginia governor's race days away, my friend Terry McAuliffe needs our help today. Right now, Terry's Trump-backed opponent is spending $75 MILLION of his personal fortune to launch attack ads, defeat Terry and flip Virginia red – and now, polling shows his race statistically tied. If we're going to win in Virginia – and lay the groundwork for our victories in next year's critical midterms – we need an immediate surge of grassroots support. Your donation right now, not days or weeks from now, will have the most impact, so I’m personally asking, Derek: I know a thing or two about running against Donald Trump's handpicked candidate. One of my opponents, Herschel Walker (R), was personally recruited to run against me by Trump – and now, he's using the GOP's playbook to turn Georgia red. But here's the thing, Derek: unlike our opponents, Terry and I aren't running to represent Donald Trump. We're running to represent everyday people and build a future that we can all be proud of. But if we're going to overcome the GOP, we need folks like you by our side every step of the way. Thank you for fighting beside us. – Sen. Raphael Warnock | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Terry McAuliffe, please .

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: One more campaign we need to power
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

On Tuesday, we announced our 5th Justice Democrat endorsed candidate,
Summer Lee. Summer joins Jessica Cisneros, Kina Collins, Rana Abdelhamid,
and Odessa Kelly as members of the 2022 JD Congressional primary slate.

When Justice Democrats get to Congress, they make an impact. Alexandria
Ocasio-Cortez, Ilhan Omar, Ayanna Pressley, Cori Bush, Pramila Jayapal and
our other JDs have gotten more done for working people in a few short
years, than some incumbents have done in decades. Electing more
progressives is the only way we can move our progressive priorities
forward, but raising enough money to get our candidates elected is our
biggest hurdle.

And with a 5th campaign joining our slate, we need to make sure we have
the resources needed to win ALL of the races we’re working on this cycle.
[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jdem-20211021-movement?refcode=em20211021-20120&t=1002&refcode2=20120_1203867_fwtt-N&akid=20120%2E1203867%2Efwtt-N ]In honor of Summer Lee joining the 2022 slate, will you rush a
$3 contribution to the Primary Power Fund?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jdem-20211021-movement?refcode=em20211021-20120&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&refcode2=20120_1203867_fwtt-N&akid=20120%2E1203867%2Efwtt-N ]Description of what’s in the photo

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jdem-20211021-movement?refcode=em20211021-20120&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&refcode2=20120_1203867_fwtt-N&akid=20120%2E1203867%2Efwtt-N ]Primary Power Fund

We’re up against the Democratic party and their entire ecosystem of
resources. From political technology, volunteer lists, party PACs, and big
corporate donors, all working together to raise millions of dollars and
elect candidates who are doing little in Congress to improve the lives of
working people.

But we’re also fighting powerful right-wing interests spending money on
Facebook ads, TV commercials, and text messages to smear the Squad and
other Justice Democrats. And they’ve already started directing their
racist, xenophobic, right-wing lies towards our primary challenges, and
we’re not expecting it to stop.

We’re relying on your support to fight the incoming attacks from both
sides, so our candidates can focus on the issues that matter most to
working people. [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jdem-20211021-movement?refcode=em20211021-20120&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1024&refcode2=20120_1203867_fwtt-N&akid=20120%2E1203867%2Efwtt-N ]Can you contribute $3, $5, or $27 towards the Primary
Power Fund to send Summer, Jessica, Kina, Rana, and Odessa to Congress?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jdem-20211021-movement?refcode=em20211021-20120&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1025&refcode2=20120_1203867_fwtt-N&akid=20120%2E1203867%2Efwtt-N ]Primary Power Fund

With your support, we’ll elect the next generation of Justice Democrats to
challenge corporate Democrats and start fighting for working people in the
halls of Congress.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1026&akid=20120%2E1203867%2Efwtt-N ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1027&akid=20120%2E1203867%2Efwtt-N ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20211021-20120-footer&t=1028&refcode2=20120_1203867_fwtt-N&akid=20120%2E1203867%2Efwtt-N

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1029&akid=20120%2E1203867%2Efwtt-N

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Official Biden Approval Poll
subject: Can you believe Biden’s approval rating is THIS low?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF JIM INHOFE
body:
| | Do you agree with the majority of Americans who disapprove of Biden? |
#### [View this email online](http://email.senatepatriot.com/q/1H9H6PUsQ2MPbwFLCijvg/wv)
---|---
| | | [ ](http://email.senatepatriot.com/c/15YDpKAXrSW9Dv10KXyonSmx)
---
| | ****Recent polls show the majority of Americans disapprove of Joe Biden.****👎**** **The latest national poll shows**ONLY 45%** of Americans approve of Joe Biden. _But honestly... I am wondering what he has actually done in office to win the approval of that many Americans. _** **Was it his botched withdrawal from Afghanistan? ** **Was it his embarrassing economic recovery and monthly jobs reports? ** **Was it the supply chain shortages that are interrupting nearly every industry in the US?** **Or is it the record levels of violent crimes resulting from his lack of support for law enforcement?** **The truth is... I can’t think of a single reason 45% of Americans would approve of Joe Biden other than the fact that he is NOT Donald Trump. clean_body: | | | | Get your stickers! Friend, We need to make something VERY clear. Kelly is America First. Always. If Liberal Lisa Murkowski ever comes back to Alaska, she should know that we want Kelly for Alaska as our next senator because she is America First! So, we came up with the great idea to make these new, extremely limited supply stickers! We are holding your TWO “America First. Always.” stickers for the NEXT 10 MINUTES. The next time Liberal Lisa comes up to campaign, we want her to see every car, truck, cooler, boat, and sign with one of these stickers on it. Remember, Kelly is pro-2nd Amendment, pro-Life, America First, endorsed by the Alaska Republican Party, and fully ENDORSED by President Trump! Thanks, Team Kelly | | | | ==

Dear Peter,
Two days ago, my Attorneys General colleagues and I wrote a letter to President Biden and Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen, **voicing our opposition to their plan to have access to NEARLY EVERY AMERICAN'S financial transaction information.**
Specifically, their **INVASIVE POLICY** would require all banks, credit unions, and financial institutions to **report all financial information of any bank account** that has a balance of $600 and exceeds $600 per year in transaction.
Folks, it's **EERILY** starting to sound like George Orwell's "Big Brother" from his novel _1984_.
_What's really incredible is that_ _**not even the West Virginia Attorney General can access your financial information**_ _in an investigation unless we have a reasonable cause to seek it._
But the federal government seems to want that information regardless of cause!
[_**Please check out our letter by clicking here.**_](http://url8766.teammorrisey.com/ls/click?upn=1Tdwy4hnuy5QvBqgHcrNAz2GrMrsQXOHHi6Hkka-2BBo3tfHpJwuxtbi6BuMDUEfYPN-2BAJEb3oK1l0kZXuHSc35p2JPiSXU4MvhlCfHxtHkGR4BPGqgYQcWpHJRnoGmNPSecnO_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6VQKjWWbjj1Sr2k446FcBK9qICzJuZnrrMMw58WbQ6Ki-2B5WYELw2HP1Q43-2Fb-2FH1-2Fr3ahd8DR7O-2Fn-2F5slg38YsNAfdthg0VdlXFwgLrQcVS9aIi6WGpxoDCHEOdBJ2oDAvLYsZOSW6-2BithlR68FluY0tEEtgNT0Br1NYy9ZO3MSH9owdtmMbawKNXrB670JP-2FskalUzcHY8rnTExCdkMPEedsvb5ux9JEOi-2BIl5Vf9xyuV6cabfDX3toMpzwgyxZdDLlzskeoHB-2B23J-2Folv0n-2BerDoQaPsPfvdYlyEsxauaycMX0EzEbaBafSCt9pvPJ4tT7msrOFp-2B7-2B9k7ag1v2X1-2BtYCvVn04at8e-2BWUt58OXcWKFd9xoytIxyzZ4UbCO-2BdNUZ1NI0zuBETYRHyit8uZ-2FJ-2FkkHd7O4wAp8kEy3OM28v-2FzC-2B249MYJB9-2F19luka94O8pl5ThXo2thZfg9ppR1H4ht7jhru0g71tjL-2BeprkgDHAvuqoH0wEsm3A5OdZPlms1GACuMzbS6ZPEvvsUZPjJZhOx6CfHNQH1WlJiX3-2BXcUiFijfF6IPenMyikDJTm00W8ThdAOZNyjRms5-2BIArWm2c4UXmhYN1eptKDPqM35GjEe-2B3b9SAMvQ1Ts-2BA2nSzh13vmQgLk4ApDxMsbWFR0LsdwyD-2Fru1fCDrjFJWAnzhxbb-2BpjugeWWIcA4-2FpA1tufDfKS-2F49lvEGUvKHD8sIxU-2FF3294axfTPAlbm5zeza0MKzZoEUDK5omS7P7JwcyIgH3GeJi7hcOznIBrlx8oXSQjkZzZR24wChaUyC9CwBwkM1EC9sDlyLAz1nGCrvqVtLj14lk87DRLDQesAO4G8pMro52N54y107p7vttLBs-3D)

clean_body: | | | | I told him that isn't going to happen. Dear Peter, Two days ago, my Attorneys General colleagues and I wrote a letter to President Biden and Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen, voicing our opposition to their plan to have access to NEARLY EVERY AMERICAN'S financial transaction information. Specifically, their INVASIVE POLICY would require all banks, credit unions, and financial institutions to report all financial information of any bank account that has a balance of $600 and exceeds $600 per year in transaction. Folks, it's EERILY starting to sound like George Orwell's "Big Brother" from his novel 1984. What's really incredible is that not even the West Virginia Attorney General can access your financial information in an investigation unless we have a reasonable cause to seek it. But the federal government seems to want that information regardless of cause! We will keep fighting every day and night to protect your freedoms and privacy! We must push back against Big Brother. Sincerely, Patrick Morrisey West Virginia Attorney General | Follow us on Social Media ****|****|****|****|** Paid for by TEAM MORRISEY, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit of Morrisey for Attorney General, Morrisey for West Virginia, Inc., Morrisey 2020, Blue and Gold Fund, and West Virginia Republican Party, Inc. c/o Red Curve Solutions 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor Beverly, MA 01915. subject: FL-13 doesn’t need another phony
body:
Florida doesn’t need another career politician or phony representing them in office, Florida deserves proud America First leaders... |
---
| | [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=b88af799cf&e=c2296cffff)
---
| | Dear Friend, If there's one thing we know, it's that Florida's 13th District doesn’t need another phony politician representing us in office. **Flip flopping Charlie Crist is giving up this seat to run against our great Governor, Ron DeSantis, giving us the chance to elect a representative we can trust who truly champions America First policies. ** But nominating another phony like Anna Paulina Luna, who supported the Obama/Biden ticket TWICE before claiming she's now a conservative, would guarantee the Democrats hold on to this seat. Luna could even cost Republicans our chance to flip the U.S. House! **That's why we need to nominate Amanda Makki** , a PROVEN conservative fighter who will take on the radical liberals, win the general election and stand up for our shared conservative values in Congress.
---
| [SUPPORT AMANDA MAKKI FOR CONGRESS](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=d7520bd344&e=c2296cffff "SUPPORT AMANDA MAKKI FOR CONGRESS")

Folks, we need leaders who put us first. If you agree, **[can you chip in $15 or more to our campaign today to unseat do-nothing Kevin McCarthy?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xk9NwEyjAoWg-sb9VIPpLo2cT52vdV0aWJKfhpoWrCSzclPf76WG7TUR4B7KMeE-amDIb9OvdLx_2EsH3b2ENzMsFtJIJTTSZeUaTiBrGwaK2UD8MQJ1WY0P2C-lHUatl0QcGvxJDr6ehQTotzQHtrahUmmPe3GkJPZ_sknmCLEVtBcpDfstvj0xkMOTRBwRxENu3reByLD4wTz_Knt2WR07-mPTVPmOmVaOIQFClc15jY04-CX34wkU3JQ530KWPF_Vg1vqHeAmPZBLLWYXu61xAOCkRq-rMzaWU9Ss3XMM15B3DOhbxA9keXr8Iv2-0ETPwqtK4jfXTCMbD1nWrYb7Xin-T5fWRM31XlyeD8ydhZemCI6y9ZSu9lWpn3D3Qlt01Ogr0k5wnxYYPj2n1N/3gc/Vr1geWFWQ5qJtQGh8zdEEg/h1/CMmNt_fby5s-fkFylMPwe4ATRf82rP4QkSYb8l4yAWE)**

Kevin McCarthy isn’t interested in our needs; he’s interested in staying in the good graces of Donald Trump.

Instead of fighting for CA-23 during these difficult times, he’s spent the last year protecting the domestic terrorists who attacked our democracy during the January 6th insurrection and stalling progress in Congress.

It’s clear that things need to change. That’s why Bruno Amato is standing up and working to give the people of CA-23 real representation. Bruno stands in the truth, and he will work day and night to ensure that the people’s needs are put first.

**[Let’s get CA-23 on the right track. clean_body: We need a fighter in Congress. | | | Folks, we need leaders who put us first. If you agree, Kevin McCarthy isn’t interested in our needs; he’s interested in staying in the good graces of Donald Trump. Instead of fighting for CA-23 during these difficult times, he’s spent the last year protecting the domestic terrorists who attacked our democracy during the January 6th insurrection and stalling progress in Congress. It’s clear that things need to change. That’s why Bruno Amato is standing up and working to give the people of CA-23 real representation. Bruno stands in the truth, and he will work day and night to ensure that the people’s needs are put first. Thank you, Bruno Amato for Congress | | ---|--- Paid for by Bruno Amato for Congress PO BOX 22472 BAKERSFIELD, CA 93390

subject: Radical Nation next week, VA's Governor's race
body:
and more...

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/dca1cb95002a/radical-nation-next-week-vas-governors-race?e=f6564bbe3b)
Logo
Order here (https://www.amazon.com/RADICAL-NATION-Harriss-Dangerous-America/dp/1630061719/ref=sr_1_2?crid=50OGRB4OANPL&dchild=1&keywords=radical+nation+sean+spicer&qid=1634839169&sprefix=radical%2Caps%2C187&sr=8-2&mc_cid=08044cdcab&mc_eid=UNIQID)

** Virginia’s upcoming Gubernatorial race...
------------------------------------------------------------

As a Virginian, I’ve been watching the race between Terry McAuliffe and Glenn Youngkin closely.

McAuliffe made news last week by saying in a debate with Youngkin that parents SHOULD NOT have a say in their children’s education. When this became a national story, McAuliffe did this interview (https://twitter.com/GlennYoungkin/status/1450616750907740168?s=20&mc_cid=08044cdcab&mc_eid=UNIQID) to clarify that he was NOT misspeaking when he said that, that only state boards should be in control.

Education quickly became the most important issue in this race.

** Praise for Radical Nation...
------------------------------------------------------------

With only 5 days until launch day for Radical Nation, wanted to share some of the endorsements I was honored to receive for it:

For a preview of Radical Nation, check out this exclusive excerpt in The Washington Times about the “pandemic of woke indoctrination (https://www.washingtontimes.com/news/2021/oct/20/a-pandemic-of-woke-indoctrination/?mc_cid=08044cdcab&mc_eid=UNIQID) ,” and critical race theory in our schools.

** Stories I’m reading...
------------------------------------------------------------

Loudoun County prosecutor has ties to Soros (https://t.co/GIGaNnQFyQ?amp=1&mc_cid=08044cdcab&mc_eid=UNIQID) — via FoxNews.com

Loudoun County prosecutor who sought to jail father of girl allegedly raped at school tied to Soros

Woman who won €1m literary prize turns out to be three men (https://t.co/gBLM9Zq5PE?amp=1&mc_cid=08044cdcab&mc_eid=UNIQID) — via FT.com

Late on Friday night the €1m Planeta prize — the world’s highest paying literary trophy — was awarded to Carmen Mola, supposedly a female university professor - in fact IT WAS 3 MEN.

Biden Calls for the Prosecution of Anyone Refusing Subpoenas in the Jan 6th Riot Investigation (https://jonathanturley.org/2021/10/17/biden-calls-for-the-prosecution-of-anyone-refusing-subpoenas-in-the-jan-6th-riot-investigation/?mc_cid=08044cdcab&mc_eid=UNIQID) — via JonathanTurley.org

This —> “Many of us criticized President Trump for crossing the line on seeking to influence the Justice Department. A chorus of legal experts declared such public comments to be an attack on the rule of law. Those voices are now largely silent...”

How TV lied about abortion (https://t.co/CpZp8n9HE5?amp=1&mc_cid=08044cdcab&mc_eid=UNIQID) — via Vox.com

Vox.com story makes the cases that "stories we see on TV help create who we are" - if they content this is true of abortions, then we can definitely blame Hollywood for violence, gun use, drug use, etc

Biden administration plans to restart Trump's 'Remain in Mexico' policy at border in mid-November (https://t.co/MTy789aUCv?amp=1&mc_cid=08044cdcab&mc_eid=UNIQID) — via NBCNews.com

Well its about time...

Senator Joe Manchin denied reports that he was considering changing his party, but I want to know what you think:
https://twitter.com/seanspicer/status/1451254668932354050?s=20&mc_cid=08044cdcab&mc_eid=UNIQID
https://www.amazon.com/RADICAL-NATION-Harriss-Dangerous-America/dp/1630061719/ref=sr_1_2?crid=1FGBNY6RPUHMT&dchild=1&keywords=radical+nation+sean+spicer&qid=1634837497&sprefix=radical%2Caps%2C170&sr=8-2&mc_cid=08044cdcab&mc_eid=UNIQID

** What I’m reading this week...
------------------------------------------------------------

Pre-order Radical Nation today to receive it on launch day, Tuesday, October 26th.

Next week on Spicer & Co we will have guests including President Trump’s former Chief of Staff Mark Meadows to break down the different issues in Radical Nation.
Get a copy here (https://www.amazon.com/RADICAL-NATION-Harriss-Dangerous-America/dp/1630061719/ref=sr_1_2?crid=1FGBNY6RPUHMT&dchild=1&keywords=radical+nation+sean+spicer&qid=1634837497&sprefix=radical%2Caps%2C170&sr=8-2&mc_cid=08044cdcab&mc_eid=UNIQID)

** Radical Nation events...
------------------------------------------------------------

I will be hitting the road to promote Radical Nation this fall, check out some of the events below to join us and get a signed book. If there’s somewhere I should add, send an email to Contact@SeanSpicer.com (mailto:Contact@SeanSpicer.com) .

Friday, October 22nd – Radical Nation Heritage Foundation

Washington, DC – Free book included in registration HERE (https://hafa.swoogo.com/seanspicer/1542409?mc_cid=08044cdcab&mc_eid=UNIQID) .

Tuesday, October 26th – Book Signing at Books and Greetings

Northvale, NJ – More info here (https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=b2423a8d89&e=d8748fc676&mc_cid=08044cdcab&mc_eid=UNIQID)

Wednesday, October 27th — New York Metropolitan Republican Club

New York City, NY — Tickets here (https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=7cb2141665&e=d8748fc676&mc_cid=08044cdcab&mc_eid=UNIQID) .

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Terry McAuliffe**
Date: Thurs, Oct 21, 2021 at 9:13 PM
Subject: Last call, last chance to match
To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com>

Derek,

The final filing deadline of the campaign is just a few short hours away, so I am going to be direct:

name: Terry McAuliffe

body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5559?t=1006&akid=1225%2E3611125%2EddVl0G ]A personal message from Terry McCauliffe

Folks, I’m running against an extreme, Trump-backed culture
warrior. I know you understand how serious the Virginia governor’s race is
for Virginia and America’s future. That’s why I’m so stunned that we
haven’t gotten more support to hit our fundraising goal tonight!

Let me remind you why this goal is so important, folks.

We are just days away from Election Day, and polling shows a tied race.
The final filing deadline of the campaign is TODAY and we have to reach
our goal to have the resources we need for the campaign homestretch.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5559?t=1007&akid=1225%2E3611125%2EddVl0G ]Please, split a donation of any amount right now between my campaign
and Tim Ryan to power this campaign through the finish line:

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5559?t=1008&akid=1225%2E3611125%2EddVl0G ]Donate $25
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5560?t=1009&akid=1225%2E3611125%2EddVl0G ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5561?t=1010&akid=1225%2E3611125%2EddVl0G ]Donate $100
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5562?t=1011&akid=1225%2E3611125%2EddVl0G ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5563?t=1012&akid=1225%2E3611125%2EddVl0G ]Donate $250
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5559?t=1013&akid=1225%2E3611125%2EddVl0G ]Other Amount

I really can’t overstate the importance of your support, folks.

Every dollar we raise helps us reach one more voter with our positive
message for Virginia's future — and in a race this close, every single
vote makes a huge difference.

Polls show a lot of Virginia voters are still undecided, so we need your
help to keep our ads on the air and our organizing team on the doors.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5559?t=1014&akid=1225%2E3611125%2EddVl0G ]Right now, will you split a donation to help fund our voter
mobilization efforts in the final days?

Thank you for everything,

Terry McAuliffe

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1001&akid=1225%2E3611125%2EddVl0G ][IMG]
We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,
[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/Fewer_Emails/?t=1002&akid=1225%2E3611125%2EddVl0G ]click here.

clean_body: [ ]A personal message from Terry McCauliffe Folks, I’m running against an extreme, Trump-backed culture warrior. I know you understand how serious the Virginia governor’s race is for Virginia and America’s future. That’s why I’m so stunned that we haven’t gotten more support to hit our fundraising goal tonight! Let me remind you why this goal is so important, folks. We are just days away from Election Day, and polling shows a tied race. The final filing deadline of the campaign is TODAY and we have to reach our goal to have the resources we need for the campaign homestretch. [ ]Please, split a donation of any amount right now between my campaign and Tim Ryan to power this campaign through the finish line: [ ]Donate $25 [ ]Donate $50 [ ]Donate $100 [ ]Donate $200 [ ]Donate $250 [ ]Other Amount I really can’t overstate the importance of your support, folks. Every dollar we raise helps us reach one more voter with our positive message for Virginia's future — and in a race this close, every single vote makes a huge difference. Polls show a lot of Virginia voters are still undecided, so we need your help to keep our ads on the air and our organizing team on the doors. [ ]Right now, will you split a donation to help fund our voter mobilization efforts in the final days? Thank you for everything, Terry McAuliffe [ ][IMG] We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [ ]click here. If you'd like to make a donation to our campaign, you can do that below! body:
The Radical Left is completely unhinged!

| [](http://links.tedbudd.com/u/click?_t=a2f7882adada427a931a38229f805105&_m=227673ce42a84794ae16a3076b1556de&_e=KpDEKAN1GK0Ii4uovrtH6p5k89FK8ql17bvaURAw6QaB0aIp_JUuQzgRvvOSNUFLOU2G92bsYdrFViQ7i0wsSk5orhd1K9KmEysM1L9Wg1zyXUlY57eusP0YMIHwbWvXVKwqfQqvG8ApAW6tNKZvg8UI070cj3UW6_HwuT2Vhkg6pY9Tb39P49iD3J0_wGjHugwezxE6V30gxom3Z3-3WWJ7B21REEu4oRgc_Wnx_uBdbKiYgOl_ji4bGS6JIbb0bdQ_x2RK_shpqTjwBQA9fW3jdBYMkGrmhcabbN3vEnGFuytZpTzF6xOjvXbtr48JlbXs4lhh-yM_xRIaqFbIe4gUB_PxFxHxFMw2W8xARGKeymI9H9L6DD5vvbL_3JvjOjBpSXExKKxIij_FKo6yvvIv1d2k7Ks5qDT1wEjS_t_BEunAY_Ncmv8x1kA1PjWFQsU4SMuCWmHSOqfSZLzKGas4aqam5Gf-QI718EFiEyJoeQCvKqWSLBanUutCXjG-) TED BUDD IS THE TRUMP-ENDORSED REPUBLICAN CANDIDATE FOR U.S. SENATE IN NORTH CAROLINA

Fellow Conservative,

**_The Radical Left continues to threaten our First Amendment Rights each and every day._** If you are voicing Conservative ideals then you are subject to being censored. We must fight back and that is exactly what Ted Budd will do when elected to the US Senate for North Carolina. [**Will you chip in to get him there?**](http://links.tedbudd.com/u/click?_t=a2f7882adada427a931a38229f805105&_m=227673ce42a84794ae16a3076b1556de&_e=KpDEKAN1GK0Ii4uovrtH6p5k89FK8ql17bvaURAw6QaB0aIp_JUuQzgRvvOSNUFLOU2G92bsYdrFViQ7i0wsSk5orhd1K9KmEysM1L9Wg1zyXUlY57eusP0YMIHwbWvXVKwqfQqvG8ApAW6tNKZvg8UI070cj3UW6_HwuT2Vhkg6pY9Tb39P49iD3J0_wGjHugwezxE6V30gxom3Z3-3WWJ7B21REEu4oRgc_Wnx_uBdbKiYgOl_ji4bGS6JIbb0bdQ_x2RK_shpqTjwBQA9fW3jdBYMkGrmhcabbN3vEnH2BJakbxXMAYo34XHFoULKLM22ooThbT3EHFkPp5ihxfjnTo3IMYASa595_x1VxLx-uAYM-NtaDVobME6EGh57NhFPZt_pbFnuXBmUnEVI9TFlv92yVCeCzyq2RsqwnKK4pNiEX_T2d-lkjVsNFYsFXYvzn4YEu85PkZFat-RpaXS9VS7-bV3MDsMEWIPPAyXGagJPhoStGwKhiGb2jev8) | [**PROTECT FREE SPEECH**](http://links.tedbudd.com/u/click?_t=a2f7882adada427a931a38229f805105&_m=227673ce42a84794ae16a3076b1556de&_e=KpDEKAN1GK0Ii4uovrtH6p5k89FK8ql17bvaURAw6QaB0aIp_JUuQzgRvvOSNUFLOU2G92bsYdrFViQ7i0wsSk5orhd1K9KmEysM1L9Wg1zyXUlY57eusP0YMIHwbWvXVKwqfQqvG8ApAW6tNKZvg8UI070cj3UW6_HwuT2Vhkg6pY9Tb39P49iD3J0_wGjHugwezxE6V30gxom3Z3-3WWJ7B21REEu4oRgc_Wnx_uBdbKiYgOl_ji4bGS6JIbb0bdQ_x2RK_shpqTjwBQA9fW3jdBYMkGrmhcabbN3vEnEW72aI-uwf2qme0OsepEFRR5pq5V4cKFNzjATqmga03_E4u5049PrwPkpIZdVTKK2iw2tpGsLFtVKJY7fXCczAzs_LpfAjUprOnzYf6QFqngRWLDaQMX6a8dhsosfAjUjIloE7jwmiWRctixZ0dT7j09thyz09IHVlcFotA6MSe0PP5f3pnELpt7dSCmDkuNfzEpB_hjWFVCkEOFQaqpXz)
---
[**SUPPORT TED BUDD FOR US SENATE**](http://links.tedbudd.com/u/click?_t=a2f7882adada427a931a38229f805105&_m=227673ce42a84794ae16a3076b1556de&_e=KpDEKAN1GK0Ii4uovrtH6p5k89FK8ql17bvaURAw6QaB0aIp_JUuQzgRvvOSNUFLOU2G92bsYdrFViQ7i0wsSk5orhd1K9KmEysM1L9Wg1zyXUlY57eusP0YMIHwbWvXVKwqfQqvG8ApAW6tNKZvg8UI070cj3UW6_HwuT2Vhkg6pY9Tb39P49iD3J0_wGjHugwezxE6V30gxom3Z3-3WWJ7B21REEu4oRgc_Wnx_uBdbKiYgOl_ji4bGS6JIbb0bdQ_x2RK_shpqTjwBQA9fW3jdBYMkGrmhcabbN3vEnH-2IQszwfub_jzlnjYslElaQ0EG1JcAUjMOZmvvyjfpvLkXKyxZq5YQ4Ydnp2VYgqczQ42GeYD4fZALgPucXpnZE8_v7SgYbKFZdZCkIgn_nncyJyhRjUa_pGUExkDjEvWsjC3aBai-gesxRUkqUunkkIyOs1OzTSrL0-LuapiA8oqgsI4TYoVNMJvEUSV0fvIXF4cX7RgvyPTAH03XmVh)
---

Conservative Values are under attack across the country. The Democrat party believes it is okay to censor anything that goes against what they believe. It is very dangerous and clear that this is an infringement of our first amendment rights. The Radical Left does not believe in individual rights for Republicans.

**_Ted Budd believes that everyone should be able to express their views and opinions regardless of your beliefs. He has vowed to take the fight to the Washington Elites that are trying to silence our party. Will you join him in support of his fight to make our voices heard?_** [**CHIP IN TO PROTECT OUR RIGHTS**](http://links.tedbudd.com/u/click?_t=a2f7882adada427a931a38229f805105&_m=227673ce42a84794ae16a3076b1556de&_e=KpDEKAN1GK0Ii4uovrtH6p5k89FK8ql17bvaURAw6QaB0aIp_JUuQzgRvvOSNUFLOU2G92bsYdrFViQ7i0wsSk5orhd1K9KmEysM1L9Wg1zyXUlY57eusP0YMIHwbWvXVKwqfQqvG8ApAW6tNKZvg8UI070cj3UW6_HwuT2Vhkg6pY9Tb39P49iD3J0_wGjHugwezxE6V30gxom3Z3-3WWJ7B21REEu4oRgc_Wnx_uBdbKiYgOl_ji4bGS6JIbb0bdQ_x2RK_shpqTjwBQA9fW3jdBYMkGrmhcabbN3vEnEH8aR5ICzBLykPF_CyPiGQDDyoPddgQBwtcXOLo_Yu9ZkM1VeOYP1whI49hqkh5p6b6bC70mojWv4lPkFQPOpjbotrwMF_bCLQF1wMZljCcFkjGLdemMcEmE-rhDI235QDRt4l90xwkGJwOKAqUBpFPzcQeMgT6UCIiKba8ZQ242A5TxdUnCkRpwVdEwJC5hOBbnHsr36tgypuYF7vNFn4)
---

If we do not fight back now, the Left will get their way and will continue to control what is seen on social media outlets. America is the land of the free. Democrats should not be able to act as the Kings of America in controlling free speech.

[**Now is your chance to fight back and show the Radical Left this is not okay by chipping in! >>**](http://links.tedbudd.com/u/click?_t=a2f7882adada427a931a38229f805105&_m=227673ce42a84794ae16a3076b1556de&_e=KpDEKAN1GK0Ii4uovrtH6p5k89FK8ql17bvaURAw6QaB0aIp_JUuQzgRvvOSNUFLOU2G92bsYdrFViQ7i0wsSk5orhd1K9KmEysM1L9Wg1zyXUlY57eusP0YMIHwbWvXVKwqfQqvG8ApAW6tNKZvg8UI070cj3UW6_HwuT2Vhkg6pY9Tb39P49iD3J0_wGjHugwezxE6V30gxom3Z3-3WWJ7B21REEu4oRgc_Wnx_uBdbKiYgOl_ji4bGS6JIbb0bdQ_x2RK_shpqTjwBQA9fW3jdBYMkGrmhcabbN3vEnFYJjfo17wpqVBzmRPz7sQ4IS0cBkok22Ap8slgPOU1XIRIHtPkh2rP2rLgultC9zhsHbd70StAg8U6VtsB87vBhgnwnR8V0Q6q2ccCsdMPhVa5I_siKImnPta7pYPvKAxE4O7RC-3ofGfzcNwLmuhGnrmtBKdOZ-fer38eRvTwL0ISridAxmxyPtwLFbkJctpyBBBrbUQTNe8Gql3wEncl)

Sincerely,

Mary - Budd Campaign Volunteer

name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: It’s time to get real
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
A small minority of corporate-backed senators are blocking a bill that 70% of Americans already support.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20211021-2600-header&t=1&akid=2600%2E2526796%2EhRNbD3)
What’s the point of Democrats holding a majority if we don’t do anything with it?
We know that the Build Back Better Agenda will build on the work the American Rescue Plan did to slash poverty, and invest in bold climate action, affordable housing, childcare, Medicare expansion, and much more. This is the work that voters elected Democrats to do – it’s why 70% of Americans support this bill.1
Alexandria is fighting to advance Biden’s agenda and pass this bill, but a small minority of corporate-backed senators funded by big oil and big pharma donors are blocking the legislation. **We cannot let this handful of corporate politicians derail the work Democrats were elected to do.**
From day one, Alexandria has held the line and spoken truth to power about the real motivations behind blocking this bill. But she needs a powerful movement behind her backing her up.
[If you’re able, will you make a $3 contribution to our movement fighting to keep the pressure up in Congress to pass the agenda that voters want?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211021?refcode=em20211021-2600-P_FND_EGR_LEG&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2600_2526796_hRNbD3&akid=2600%2E2526796%2EhRNbD3)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211021?refcode=em20211021-2600-P_FND_EGR_LEG&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=2600_2526796_hRNbD3&akid=2600%2E2526796%2EhRNbD3)**
Alexandria has laid it out: The real questions are, will we deliver universal pre-K to this country or not? Are we going to expand health care to our seniors and include vision, dental, and hearing or not? Are we going to invest in housing so that our communities can get hot water in winter time or not?
The answers to these questions are yes. It’s what voters elected Democrats to do, and it’s what Democrats must now deliver.
[Alexandria is leading the fight to pass the Build Back Better Act in Congress. And our movement’s got her back. If you can, make a $3 contribution to help us keep up the pressure in Congress to pass the Build Back Better Act now and do right by voters.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211021?refcode=em20211021-2600-P_FND_EGR_LEG&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=2600_2526796_hRNbD3&akid=2600%2E2526796%2EhRNbD3)
Thank you for everything you do,
Team AOC
